Dear Friend,

In homes across Iraq, Christian families gather to pray, teach their children, and pass on their faith. Each Christian living in Iraq survived ISIS terrorism and decades of other hardship. But while they rebuild their communities, for many, something is missing: a Bible they can read in their own language.

Even though they still speak Aramaic--the language Jesus spoke--most families have never had a Bible printed in their modern dialect.

You can help change that.

For just **$10** , you can place a modernized Aramaic Bible directly into the hands of a family still speaking the language of Jesus.
##

Each one is printed in Western Aramaic, using a newly corrected translation with vowels and simplified script--so everyday people, not just scholars or clergy, can engage with God's Word.

Each Bible you give:
* Restores Scripture access in the homes of persecuted Christians
* Preserves one of the oldest Christian languages in the world
* Equips families to grow stronger in their faith and pass it on

_" When families read the Bible together in their own language, it brings faith closer to their hearts."
--_ Issam, deacon and Syriac language teacher Each donation you give:
* **$10** sends 1 Bible
* **$50** equips 5 families
* **$100** strengthens an entire church community

Every gift helps preserve faith, culture, and identity in communities who have endured persecution, displacement, and the destruction of their churches.

**Will you send a Bible today?**

clean_body: | = | I’ll keep this quick: We’ve got just a few days left until the final FEC deadline of the year. This one matters. What we report on the 31st becomes public, and will be used by GOP strategists to decide how much money they will pour into flipping CA-45. = | = We flipped this seat by just 653 votes. That means every dollar, every supporter, and every ZIP code matters -- especially yours. To flip the House, Democrats need just three seats. And CA-45 is one of them. = Last cycle, we won this seat by a razor-thin margin. Now, Republicans are circling CA-45, eyeing it as one of their targets to flip. They want to outspend and overwhelm us, but I believe in our people-powered movement. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Grateful for your support, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. name: GOTV PAC
subject: This is worth paying attention to:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
This doesn’t happen often – but right now, rural America is listening.
Not because Democrats suddenly “found the right message,” but because Donald Trump’s own policies are hitting farm country hard.
Even lifelong Republican voters are feeling it.
And for the first time in years, Democrats have a narrow but real opening – not to win rural counties outright, but to cut into margins that have been north of 80%. That alone could decide control of Congress.
But here’s the part most people miss: this doesn’t work without investment, so that’s exactly what GOTV PAC is doing.
We’re identifying competitive districts where shaving a few points off the GOP’s rural margins flips the seat – and we’re putting real resources behind candidates who can talk honestly about costs, health care, and economic pressure without condescension or culture-war noise.
If we want to turn this moment into actual wins in 2026, we have to fund it now – while voters are paying attention.
If you’re able, chip in today to help us invest where it actually moves the math. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email122025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Every dollar goes toward early organizing, targeted outreach, and backing candidates who can compete where Democrats usually don’t.
Thanks for being part of this,
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: We’re not giving up — neither should you...
body:
This work is essential — thank you for being a part of it.
---
Derek, In just a second, we’ll be asking you to donate directly to the DNC. But first, we’ll take a moment and explain the urgency and importance of your support today: At the end of the month, we’ll be required to report how much we’ve raised over the last three months. _All eyes_ will be on that number. And a strong report with lots of donations will show Republicans just how unpopular their agenda really is. As Republicans keep trying to redraw congressional maps and rig the 2026 midterms in their favor, Trump and his allies would love nothing more than to see the Democrats throw in the towel and give up. **We’re not giving up — neither should you.** That’s why reaching our end-of-quarter fundraising goal is so important. We need to show everyone that Democrats are standing up and pushing back against Republicans’ historically unpopular agenda. We hope this message has shown you the urgency and importance of your contribution. So here comes our question for you, Derek: [**Will you be one of the supporters we’re looking for to chip in $7 to the DNC ahead of our end-of-quarter deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?refcode=em_20251227_5556_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5556_22930333_R6MDCl&akid=5556%2E22930333%2ER6MDCl) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251227_5556_fr&refcode2=5556_22930333_R6MDCl&akid=5556%2E22930333%2ER6MDCl)**

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The last leg of the VRA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
While the media has been hyper-focused on the redistricting fights, this case has seemingly flown under the radar -- even though its impact on voting and representation would be a larger swing than all the current redistricting efforts combined.
This decision could knock the last leg out from the Voting Rights Act (VRA), functionally ending a historic piece of legislation and setting our fight for fair representation back decades.
RUSH $25 or more right now to help protect what the VRA stands for and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122725_4&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
@ariberman.bsky.social: SCOTUS decision killing what’s left of Voting Rights Act could cost Dems 19 House seats, eliminate every majority-minority district in South, eviscerate 14th/15th Amendments & fulfill John Roberts 40-year crusade against country’s most important civil rights law [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122725_4&amount=25]
The impact shows how partisan this all is, Team. A complete dismantling of the Voting Rights Act -- a key civil rights law -- would only harm one political party and return parts of the country to a suppressive era we left behind sixty years ago.
During the oral arguments in Louisiana v. Callais , at least five conservative justices seemed ready to handicap the VRA so that it will no longer stop white majorities from locking racial minorities out of elected office through racial gerrymandering.
The consequences are simple to understand and grave for voter participation. The harder we make it to vote, the more politicians make voter participation feel worthless, the less people actually take part. Needless to say, the less people who participate, the less our democracy and our government looks like the people it's supposed to represent.
Team: We have to spread the word about this case and the consequences of dismantling the Voting Rights Act. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend the right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122725_4&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_4&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_4&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_4&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_4&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122725_4&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122725_4&amount=35]
At issue in the case is Section 2 of the VRA, which requires that racial minorities have an equal opportunity to meaningfully participate in the electoral process. This provision has been used to strike down districting schemes and maps that prevented Black voters and other racial minorities from electing their preferred representatives. Since 1965, Section 2 has given people of color a seat at the table, from school boards to the halls of Congress. It appears this 60-year era is coming to an end.
We've said it before and will say it again, but it's been clear long before the MAGA movement that Chief Justice Roberts has seen the removal of the VRA as one of his top goals for his time on the Court. It appears he may be on the cusp of succeeding.
Striking down the last remnants of the Voting Rights Act is exactly why the Supreme Court held this case over from last year. Gutting Section 2 would take us backwards in time and allow racial gerrymandering to be a standard practice, silencing more voters. Just like the redistricting fights across the country, this is all about whether the party in power can choose their voters in order to stay in power in perpetuity.
We simply can't afford to go backwards like this. Will you chip in with $25 or more to help us fight back against these partisan efforts to silence voters? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122725_4&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122725_4&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122725_4&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=P2lQ%2FiLX12PDFpXoZyyz3ELaPpevRkQvrhX5TQYCOm1FMJJ9JrR7kx5cu1u%2Fz8jHz4LHH3jpfBncKrFl%2Fiws93R0rlszxedps2ZVf1bKqvmNG4yirlbIu548m77kOP54rnAiO2g0%2Fo5B2DOnoheIfAzCsOu%2BgowEhOO1PZ5GJXTavjRqFIMpP3NXEPaTmoxWYmOUVuy3EpW%2Bq5OXQqLd0rtl2CyT49KN83NT4MTEbyQYFVgPlwRM2y%2BN7Sf1MR7G%2BNBp1uRIhnxDG09sjrdVcWT6bM%2BWfmDrdCbAxFFhEMjVA3ZI444ANPByznepYb5rGtobjjaUX1MrmAERiC1CP%2BEhpeT5JifUP9JtEhjecsPK0ibBJO2anprKdEIwSE2HF%2F7DF2lN4opSLGJNls1uKKZAweerdznjiHqtdxFEJms%3D .

name: Phil Weiser
subject: Thank you for signing up!
body:
Dear Friend,

Thanks for signing up to receive email updates from me and my campaign. Whether you are a long time supporter or someone new to my work and curious to learn more, I am glad to have you in the loop.

In this day and age, I know that many of us are flooded with emails and texts from political campaigns. That's why I want to be transparent about the kinds of messages you will receive from me and my team.

Every week, I sit down to write a newsletter that I send to you on Mondays. My campaign and my work as a public servant is informed by hearing from you; your feedback is not only invaluable, it is essential. I look forward to your engagement as I share updates on my work as your AG, and learn more about my priorities in my campaign to be your next Governor.

Our democracy is a team sport–and I really appreciate you being on my team.

Phil

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81362/images/Phil%20Weiser.png]

name: Team David
subject: Thank you for signing up!
body:
Hi friend,

Thank you for signing up to be part of Team David!

As Executive Director of Towards Justice, David has taken on corporate giants like Amazon, Uber, and the biggest corporate landlords in the country—helping thousands recover tens of millions stolen by powerful interests.

Now he's running for Attorney General to defend our freedoms, challenge concentrated power, and build a future where working people can thrive.

We'll send along more campaign updates, messages from David, and info on how you can support the campaign soon. For now, you can follow David's social media to see the campaign trail from his perspective:

he wrote this...
Charlie’s final book

| Peter,
---
| Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---

| Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... | | This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. | | Peter, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. | | Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Peter, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA | | | P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. | | 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Kyle Blomquist for Congress
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blomquist for Congress
body:
This is a people powered campaign. | | | Dear Peter, I’m Kyle Blomquist, a Democratic candidate for Congress here in Michigan, and I’d like your permission to stay in touch. Here are three things about me and what I’m fighting for:
1. I'm a lifelong Michigander, born and raised in the Upper Peninsula, and now raising a family of my own here. My Republican opponent, Jack Bergman, is a Trump loyalist who voted to gut Medicaid and slash healthcare subsidies for working-class families, while cutting taxes for his billionaire bosses. **Northern Michiganders deserve to be represented by one of their own,** not a partisan plant who will sacrifice their health and prosperity for billionaires' pocket change.
2. **Cruelty weakens America. Whether it's funding the massacre of children in Gaza or tearing apart families here at home, it’s past time we say “enough.”** We need strong voices unafraid to speak truth to power, defending and upholding America’s founding value of justice for all.
3. **Finally, I believe that in the wealthiest nation in history, basic needs must be guaranteed as human rights —****the same rights that FDR described in his Second Bill of Rights:** the right to decent pay, medical care, education, housing, and dignity in retirement. That’s why I will fight for Medicare for All, Housing First policy, living wages and paid time off for all American workers, and expanded Social Security benefits for seniors. [See my policy platform here →](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uukvxwKy0naF0exw1fBREMgU6D7e929kjW1d0xRxhTCC-cJV7yjqyC_Bd1X94Z-jOQr0j2wGtpQTUsSEZu0LpznE3Qwj3hsq7VQDTub2I1U7P_qBq2pymQBZqkT1oW-FwY1wAmSHWoVPdTRpki5N-0rppniK2F8lvRm2bhK04-rXfpr2lG-DuWWdJcqJxvntqo_nXlX0lSDEQVw8UzWobn2s96xY59nlh34Hht7uAjN9gZe50AszecNRZ2iCRTjerCAWxtyer4Ukddc8u-6xdnVE/4mt/ziIOXRQoR8-QK5vOoVREnw/h0/h001.ShRAT8h7VLjk26OPfzPUiK8KQUFxuLFnU57V3_l4MKA)

For a campaign like this to succeed, it can't be **my** campaign alone — it must be **yours** too. If you choose to stay in touch with me, here's my promise to you:
* In every email, I’ll share how policies are affecting people’s lives and what we can do to change them.
* I’ll always be open to listen to you because this campaign is built for people like you. You can simply reply to my emails or visit me at many events throughout Michigan.

And yes, I’ll occasionally ask for your support if you have the means to give. Your contribution helps reach more voters and build a working class movement that will be heard across our nation. Are you in? [ Yes! ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvbKBRjijH4M6kFuhYdbd5oBt82e7oONi6Skce6kKgKdshppRzmKKUiDsNk9ZGCWmVUhRAnxAx52GVrEVMlau-NPtsapO7qESdIF3LWrd-jdCSGRBalfn_gKjIWokfyyJu6ytpfhpwrR06r_KcfDckr5eK5uyzBkGzdG6VfkfwWOy-qJJTkJHka4o6a01-m0bcHM6a3DVrOQtOkDJ77DvHy16uam9YgQ0QsoGheK4XLgKd0xJ3E2VoabyG71tMP3SDnN5kTtA_9eQ3t5jxWoTphCBRhF2G94s6L8vOCzoQDZJTQk37kbH3WJ3kgJXwwrdHj_wE7lKe3UgZtJ-YAkp_f/4mt/ziIOXRQoR8-QK5vOoVREnw/h1/h001.4ObKBDYPG1zgmZe-S_clQPr0XuZsVMTij23fEBk2UUM) [ No thanks, not right now ](\[unsub link\]?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-question-that-shaped-how-i-see-everything&email_referrer=email_2936927&email_subject=introducing-myself&&) In solidarity,
Kyle Blomquist

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to childrenâ€™s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z04u80h628b13lrskts0l9r1lenl4h3bg2hcve7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1eka7u1bq2rnv54t70kl7060hocq3g23hrlgh80_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znigg5ptqh67or1607iiqntgd4n8gcmlspbkp61o_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn864skvtbc4pnsim816ihl2p0g3r06l49c20gr8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0vtnh75uotfjloif2j0rque9kobp57lmm2lplmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmcppgev0vcfdnv32h3qvu6fa38t5em034jndtdg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziopn26glqjo6cgkn66tqaaihv4630na5s4vikm0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zevg49vhjq3ql7mneh3t38iqprmps1c56g9ujgmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3h4sqhgn32np5q887582vud3ooahkbkbj6o1618_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcrp0kd27c0mnni8u36k4s6if2kdg242j8s58j0g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh64pj6cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zor26np9muor5hdv28li21fqf16hrm7bgig07pgg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgehl0l7cc8br3neutpsmab6eajmm2fg1ukint30_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z071ij6r802m615868k16j6j2l98inu41sdo7748_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfgktdd2bg89shj4jqh7mckkr2a4qn8lfjkk3bf8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ps2a67u0vhds4fdovkv044mrsfnnl0si6e9jq8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zli6oldo3dfnil05sfv4oiv8qd98n366mmpk8r6g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd8vi741ad88i7ojhnt7ov0p09771hiav6rpocfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcb7c9559810lat53gmtkjbhgvc62d9gcboc8acg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbuluan6ocnu4hhqaj4dd5uoi70ef8mi0u8dpo40_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlmb29cts58duaa98g5hp6q0jov2la5ulqf9plh8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3mq3kjteejih5uoncfe5vdeqqsp6ljo5ugfp2u0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6q92gi6k5tg1j832jaebh4aothajlncec22tnk0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb6lrr5o7pj005r2m73t0kjnconsravc0uot7e48_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)** P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote.
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9irn0ik5rh6ueaffsa6njntohd3ug2v9s3cmlro_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvp19kcj8kpiil18i625081mhph28cmpph346lmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh6coj2c1h2bs)**_**_

AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. clean_body: It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. P.P.S. It’s imperative that you and I help President Donald J. Trump hit the ground running - especially when it comes to defusing the ticking timebomb left behind by the previous regime in the form of “open borders” and allowing non-citizens to vote. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. name: Kristen Waggoner
subject: May God give us courage to defend freedom
body:
There’s a sense right now—you can feel it—that something is shifting.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jihndf7ndlcc99qplgvjhki3tpi103r7lk4iso_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh62p32c9h2bs)

## ****
Dear Friend of Freedom,

There's a sense right now--you can feel it--that something is shifting.

People are weary of censorship, weary of hostility to faith, weary of watching freedom bow to ideology.

Some call it a "vibe shift."

But a vibe shift alone will not sustain a nation.

A cultural moment is fragile. It doesn't pass laws, build institutions, or defend the next generation's rights.

That's why Alliance Defending Freedom exists--[to turn conviction into action and ensure that liberty endures in law.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlc2se9pv6l5131kedkugcf8vta2tisods7jg2vo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh62p32c9h2bs)

**America now stands alone in the Western world, still upholding robust protections for religious liberty and free expression.**

* In the UK and Europe, Christians have been arrested for praying silently outside abortion facilities and criminally prosecuted for posting Bible verses on social media.

* In Mexico, current and former congressmen have been convicted of "gender based political violence" for speaking biological truth.

* And here at home, our freedoms often hang by a single vote at the Supreme Court.

**Freedom is not self-perpetuating. It must be defended --case by case, precedent by precedent, generation by generation.**

Your gift today helps ADF defend that freedom in the courtroom, protect those silenced for their faith, and secure lasting victories that no administration can undo.

Please make your gift before December 31. And right now, every dollar you give will be matched--dollar for dollar while matching funds last.

This moment will pass. But your action today can make freedom endure.

[Give now to defend freedom before the match expires.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6s338apigpm2hqutu0rir5ulnj19upfffchi308_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cjh62p32c9h2bs)

May God give us the conviction to stand firm, the grace to speak truth in love, and the faith to defend the freedom that allows both truth and love to flourish.
With gratitude to God,

**Kristen Waggoner**
CEO, President & Chief Counsel
Alliance Defending Freedom
---
Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

---

name: Troy Downing
subject: It's not your fault.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
I hate to say it, but we're coming up short of our critical Q4 fundraising goal.
I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me. **But the response has been deafening silence.**
My name is Troy Downing, and I'm a combat veteran, a Christian, a husband, and a proud dad. I'm also a GOP freshman on a mission to put America First.
As you know, Democrats will stop at nothing to stand in the way of President Trump’s agenda.
They’re also throwing millions into battleground races nationwide to flip our razor-thin House Majority and take control.
I have to face the facts: If we don't defend every single seat in 2026, our conservative Majority will be lost, and **_President Trump's agenda will be over._**
I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. I just need a small contribution from Patriots like you to keep my campaign afloat.
If I can defend this critical House seat, it'll be a crushing defeat for the radical Left. But I need your help to make it happen.
[Will you stand with me and chip in a few bucks to help a combat vet take down the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[YES – I’M IN!
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you,
Troy Downing| |

body:
Court elections are not sexy. They are low turnout affairs. The average voter has no idea who their state supreme court justices are or what is at stake if MAGA seizes their court.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qOf8tQiHSHfnvnNbYWq1kHGNbt7gkrZ_dC3il9sZ4n3MzA1JcXwP1MSbgoMCRQkkfTeM7EiCW4ilMQu1txucDESuo-NZkOu78yUMyAU75-zVgvU3X7UGNqcYnzighYCQmrLU0YhWqe975EGisGw8KbEC-2qcm4tQAtDJ_pPm-d00dAFNGSgZ8FMxlNqV5WHbSU6mEPKzXRWvKezHyH_iklCqAunzuBSviYZ25JU9XmY=&c=cQJSIXmnjiZnEapEg4G-To0Y6O4AKuihPnunrHT34ihO6wWtMCqhwg==&ch=0ETVZp5jtQRKMsH14KzOQn71RrulU79cV148dWvvsizmTx8tz-w_QQ==)

| Peter,
The outlines of the blue wave are forming and across the nation Republicans are running for cover.
They are scrambling to get out while they are ahead rather than risk catastrophic career defining defeats. No one is safe.
In nearly every election held this year Democrats have had massive overperformances or in the case of Defend our Courts and the 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court, massive landslide victories.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qOf8tQiHSHfnvnNbYWq1kHGNbt7gkrZ_dC3il9sZ4n3MzA1JcXwP1MSbgoMCRQkkmOxukk4oyco6JHsUO905jjbcLcdMggPNRvDURBaOPRCvw0zLkWPbLTyVJ2GtKGPMkFv1ULzGti7QMTi5a6QxgXnE7GYevTYWC5zdk13ysEft0NWsfLIZMnTLdadCyh1zbU_h2AJCvQQnbNqu5dxcUvDDv0YFoQa1lcfSwOTswM0=&c=cQJSIXmnjiZnEapEg4G-To0Y6O4AKuihPnunrHT34ihO6wWtMCqhwg==&ch=0ETVZp5jtQRKMsH14KzOQn71RrulU79cV148dWvvsizmTx8tz-w_QQ==)
---
The interesting thing about that race though is that it almost could've been an exception to 2025's rule: a catastrophic Democratic defeat amidst a sea of national Democratic victories.
Court elections are not sexy. They are low turnout affairs. The average voter has no idea who their state supreme court justices are or what is at stake if MAGA seizes their court.
Three months prior to this past November's PA court election, polls showed Democrats losing this critical swing state court by a massive margin. Losing it would've meant Democrats never winning an election in PA again.
With little attention on the race and little support from the national level, it fell upon Defend our Courts to ring the alarm about the looming disaster. We sent out a distress beacon to Democrats across the nation and our call was heeded. We were able to spend millions on educating PA voters about the importance of their state Supreme Court and when the dust had settled we blew MAGA out of the water and put the fear of god into them.
More races like this are coming down the pike. Court races are so obscure, low turnout, and difficult for voters to wrap their heads around, that regardless of a blue wave forming in 2026 we cannot afford to be complacent. MAGA is motivated and will show no mercy, if we don't fight to defend these courts we will lose them.
Defend our Courts is mounting the defense of state supreme courts in the key swing states of Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. [Losing these courts would be catastrophic which is why we need you back in this fight. Can we count on you to rush a donation of $10 to help us continue on our fight to defend these critical courts?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qOf8tQiHSHfnvnNbYWq1kHGNbt7gkrZ_dC3il9sZ4n3MzA1JcXwP1MSbgoMCRQkkVa-i8ZPCwzf9coK9jq97TSNQPZb1SfpLUXiArTaCzxi1LJAZjXs_sG4xgzIT42O9PAsAm8PB8xxgC3Frw_T78vJKR7Q9ddiV-MQZvD3VIWxfbs2AQ9BMLAdCoAQ4mEXWtmTN__VQlWCA8p6PDSJl13jznAABl3836iR2TwWAIzgIK0d1MmhBPQ==&c=cQJSIXmnjiZnEapEg4G-To0Y6O4AKuihPnunrHT34ihO6wWtMCqhwg==&ch=0ETVZp5jtQRKMsH14KzOQn71RrulU79cV148dWvvsizmTx8tz-w_QQ==)

name: Vile racists
subject: The Neo-Confederates in the Republican Party
body:
Yesterday, President Trump’s administration announced it would remove the infamous photo of the enslaved man's scars and all information about slavery from US National Parks.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018nEGcQ7NVRcbzidTBEDVXn0qg4GukVia6PqZ1HmPIdVwP5jhiWDLjYLuk4nnKzflXx8eqv7ndrejeZj3vUwDBRnj_dd-FNBUw0Pr6slQ3J69OljhkGmOeTbGYdnRb7uG2yqCMKTciYEkbts_1h4ngfipEjsCNMgAHv609d1D4Mtb4-dW7c_N8qRgPpxAgvL_zIkiKV61RBIdMrAjEfq8lhLkHd9Lw-tdAjl85jSoYPw=&c=MzWu_dv3ez_v3Dgv6CZpxtfhwjNB94ztB7jy-FNl84iefBBRvWCjlA==&ch=w3sXeDl2GYRe-5vap3HNE4tpQ2noaM5o7H4sor7QMULdiWp_Mk9r_A==)
---
---
| Peter,
President Trump has announced he will remove the infamous photo of the enslaved man's scars and all information about slavery from US National Parks.
Yet another addition to Trump's continued push to rewrite the history of the civil war with the South as the good guys.
This Summer he announced that he would be restoring the names of Confederate generals to US military bases and also remarked that the Smithsonian focuses too much on "how bad slavery was."
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018nEGcQ7NVRcbzidTBEDVXn0qg4GukVia6PqZ1HmPIdVwP5jhiWDLjYLuk4nnKzflXx8eqv7ndrejeZj3vUwDBRnj_dd-FNBUw0Pr6slQ3J69OljhkGmOeTbGYdnRb7uG2yqCMKTciYEkbts_1h4ngfipEjsCNMgAHv609d1D4Mtb4-dW7c_N8qRgPpxAgvL_zIkiKV61RBIdMrAjEfq8lgBCQvdOa4k73kWirubn7Z0=&c=MzWu_dv3ez_v3Dgv6CZpxtfhwjNB94ztB7jy-FNl84iefBBRvWCjlA==&ch=w3sXeDl2GYRe-5vap3HNE4tpQ2noaM5o7H4sor7QMULdiWp_Mk9r_A==)
---
These actions and remarks are red meat for the growing faction of Neo-Confederates within the Republican Party.
Among this faction is Lauren Boebert who at every turn waters down the horrors of slavery by calling everything, from COVID precautions to the border crisis, slavery. She once tweeted "To disarm the people is the most effective way to enslave them - George Mason" and then was subsequently dragged for either ignoring (or not realizing) that Mason owned over 100 slaves.
Her family members have been photographed wearing Confederate flags and at an event at Colorado's Fort Garland, a recruitment point for the Union during the Civil War, she took photos with a Confederate War reenactor.
Someone needs to tell her that Colorado was not a part of the Confederacy.
Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running against Lauren Boebert and she needs your support to defeat her and her white supremacist ideology. [Can we count on you to make a donation of whatever you can spare to help get Trisha's campaign the resources she will need to win?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018nEGcQ7NVRcbzidTBEDVXn0qg4GukVia6PqZ1HmPIdVwP5jhiWDLjYLuk4nnKzflXx8eqv7ndrejeZj3vUwDBRnj_dd-FNBUw0Pr6slQ3J69OljhkGmOeTbGYdnRb7uG2yqCMKTciYEkbts_1h4ngfipEjsCNMgAHv609d1D4Mtb4-dW7c_N8qRgPpxAgvL_zIkiKV61RBIdMrAjEfq8ll0jo3SVO5XeKc9Kcc8fvPY=&c=MzWu_dv3ez_v3Dgv6CZpxtfhwjNB94ztB7jy-FNl84iefBBRvWCjlA==&ch=w3sXeDl2GYRe-5vap3HNE4tpQ2noaM5o7H4sor7QMULdiWp_Mk9r_A==)

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: A Tale of Two Medicaid States: Minnesota Fraud vs. Indiana Reform
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
In Case You Missed It No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-amkuld-hhlljjcji-b/) **IN CASE YOU MISSED IT** [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-r/)
# **A Tale of Two Medicaid States: Minnesota Fraud vs. Indiana Reform**
## More indictments in Tim Walz's state, while Mike Braun's reforms save hundreds of millions of dollars.
The Wall Street Journal
The Editorial Board
December 26, 2025
[A Tale of Two Medicaid States: Minnesota Fraud vs. Indiana Reform - WSJ](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-y/)Minnesota's great welfare heist is the grift that keeps on giving for prosecutors, with the Justice Department last week filing more charges. But on a positive note, Indiana Gov. Mike Braun's administration has announced hundreds of millions of dollars in Medicaid savings from common-sense reforms.The Justice Department charged six new defendants in schemes to defraud Minnesota's Medicaid program. "What we see in Minnesota is not a handful of bad actors committing crimes. It's a staggering industrial-scale fraud," Assistant U.S. Attorney Joe Thompson said. "When I look at the claims data and the providers, I see more red flags than I see legitimate providers."Mr. Thompson estimates fraud losses since 2018 could top $9 billion. Gov. Tim Walz says the fraud isn't large or pervasive, but the latest evidence suggests it is and goes well beyond the state's Somali community.In one alleged scheme, two men in Philadelphia heard from a friend that Minnesota's Medicaid program was a "good opportunity to make money." They registered as housing providers despite no connections in the state. Minnesota was the first state to let Medicaid funds be used for housing services for the disabled and recovering addicts. The defendants billed Medicaid for fake services.This is a pattern in the charges: Defendants set up sham companies, then submitted false claims. Two other defendants allegedly set up a company, Pristine Health, and worked with another provider, Foundation First, which was in the business of generating fake paperwork for those trying to scam Medicaid.The indictment says Pristine and Foundation First generated fake housing service plans, which Pristine submitted to the state. The two defendants also allegedly worked with an unnamed company, which promised to help welfare fraudsters "grow [their] clientele" and achieve "BIG profit." (The two defendants have pleaded not guilty. An individual who operated Foundation First was earlier charged in another fraud scheme.)The Justice Department also unsealed a search warrant for a home healthcare business, which it said billed Medicaid for services for multiple individuals that weren't provided. One individual with severe mental illness who was receiving services, according to state records, had been found dead in his apartment.Justice says the home-care program "has been vulnerable to fraud," as providers can bill the state for providing care up to 24 hours a day. Minnesota Medicaid spending on this in-home program surged to $170 million in 2024 from $4.6 million in 2021, which tracks a similar increase in spending on housing services.The state's Medicaid spending has increased by nearly two-thirds in six years. Mr. Walz says his administration has begun to inspect Medicaid claims more closely. But because the feds pick up most of the Medicaid tab, Minnesota and other states have less incentive to identify fraud and waste.***Medicaid spending nationwide has increased by some $380 billion since the beginning of the pandemic as providers and beneficiaries dine out on the all-you-can-eat buffet. The inexorable spending growth spurred Indiana Republicans this spring to impose reforms, including more rigorous eligibility checks and guardrails to prevent excessive billing.Last week the state said it expects to save $466 million on Medicaid over the next two years compared to its spring projections. Medicaid enrollment has declined by some 11% thanks to eligibility checks. The state also barred managed care organizations that administer the program from advertising for Medicaid patients.Indiana's Medicaid spending is expected to grow 3.2% this year versus its 9.5% forecast. Republicans are considering more reforms, such as stricter oversight of autism therapy services, which a federal inspector general last year found is rife with improper payments.This year's House GOP budget bill requires states to verify Medicaid eligibility at least twice a year and imposes work requirements for the able-bodied. But there's far more Congress could do to curb abuse.One ripe target is the 340B program, which lets hospitals and pharmacies they contract with buy drugs as steep discounts. They then charge insurers large markups when they administer the drugs to patients. Hospitals pocket the difference, often using the money to acquire competing providers or make investments.Republicans have focused on Mr. Walz in the Minnesota scam because it's easier than fixing the warped government incentives that created the Land of 10,000 Frauds. But if they want to show voters that it's worth re-electing a Republican majority next year, they could follow the Hoosier reform example. [Click Here to Read the Full Story](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-j/) [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-t/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-i/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-d/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-h/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-k/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-u/) [Click Here to Support Your Indiana Republican Party](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-amkuld-hhlljjcji-o/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-amkuld-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-n) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-u-amkuld-hhlljjcji-p/)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Powered by AI chips from a company you’ve probably never heard of. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | NASA deployed | Powered by AI chips from a company you’ve probably never heard of. ## Iran Declares "Total War" on West
Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian declared his country is in a "[total war" with](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI7whhgoXFxDl2uvRBt7CRsZG9mrIN7-xP8KfzfSJ32amX_P-YkcOb3_4kZOljwnOmokESrzhp9cDk5CpUouWzrJY_IUZ2jhoQ1oGOaAHM-5a4JbiIDuDTnTWzuacbRDs7rFh9YsHRKO1oQwkHkgvPrBw8MEY9uG3WUzAIMxrW3trfPda7iTXxbrhz4E1bUUWHK5fTInWWmJZ_5Sufm8NdGtIntV9z8KJgVTOvdc5UIKpkusYDJw5V7BdOQSg74mKpi4YGJMei9UOVASfWBJVQutBZPmqjlpyYLxAhrfyKmKPqiKgqkpLuwHx8jV9qpr3xty_Kkkv_rx6-B_AAAA___dp4h1) the U.S., Israel, and Europe, claiming the conflict is worse than the devastating 1980s Iran-Iraq war. The statement comes six months after Israel and the U.S. struck Iranian military and nuclear sites in a [12-day war](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFugzAURb8GNiP7hTjO4KELW7p2RAY_w4uMHdmvQfx9RfsJXY-ujnTP12N8OIqUlk-3oeWQx4R7jciMZdzcM5edEmOpnMuWDpxdmjGOIOEqFAgwo3cUj7FvvQ2IgJcWrbppfVf3uzbtan0AfzXgjdRK6yCnSUGQ3pjgZu_l1JI9bQrAKCW11F0_95O54ByCns3N-6aX6Ilz6Z6ZEq8Y4pHfWLo5b220K_OrNpePBoYGhn3fO6YNaw5Ui8N4rhoYeEXxBwQVl8TuipgOceL0vU1YqnCBsZyvvDuqyEEEWlamtDQwtMX6104xUtW3ppfL5uhX3fK_qr0t_AQAAP__HyqENg) that killed over 1,000 people, followed by UN sanctions orchestrated by France, Britain, and Germany over Tehran's nuclear program. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is set to meet President Trump on Monday at [Mar-a-Lago to pitch](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpiAUBeCn0Q4DV-TXgmIbu9l2S4N4Ge8sgoH7j_HtN-4rTP0lJ-ecPx_Lh6NI6fO3O9ByyEvCq0ZkxrIc7iuXixJjqZzLkW70LnmMC0gYhAIB47I5ivei280GRMC-RatexkxqmszY7lb6Xjs9DL10eoQAaz-N0-RNGCY0fcCW7JOmAEalpJGm016vY48-BOPH17Y1WuJGnEv3lSnxjiHe-RtL5_PRRrszn7XpfzUwNzBf19Wl1T8rHm9gPnMkJl8f3IlR7PldsYE5Ibt0u_0tzuhSFWshDILL-zjFmWulNaJIeAkqLonKhf5iFcUnB4NUCtpit_OiGKmaV6Pl5-Eo_i_FP3ry28K_AAAA__8CyYsC) new strikes on Iran's rebuilt ballistic missile facilities. Pezeshkian warned that any renewed Israeli attack would face "a more resolute stance," while claiming [Iran's military is](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO5CAQheHT2BmWwR6MA4JNnM2mG1o1UIyrhcGC6ka-_ap3jzD50_ek_8_n_gkUKX3_hhMth7wnbDUiM5b9hEcujRJjqZzLmW50kBzGXY3qQ0gllNk9ULz3ufc2ICqcerRy0XqV66pNf1hAHZTy07g4D9J_GZCrDBqNdwE-tOnJvjWplJFy1KMeZjd_mQldCNqZxftuHtET5zI8MiU-MMQ7v7AMLp99tAfzVbvpV6e2Tm2ttYHpxJoD1QIY36tObVQgVXEVrOQxsahwV-HyM3G5BSVxkq8schCcGaJoUEQjPsSziv-OgOQFPku-sFNbX6y_GsVIVS_dPH6fQP-uev5RxZdVfwMAAP__myaLkQ) now stronger than before June's conflict.
