Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Zero Gimmicks. | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: FWD: humiliating defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, what we are witnessing right now is an unprecedented assault on our most fundamental American values.

---
| | I emailed.
Marc Elias emailed. That's how important this is. [Because with 72 hours left until our End of Year Deadline, I had to reach out to make sure you didn’t miss this important message from Marc Elias.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122123727/591649586/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251228_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMyODJkNi0wZGU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=102rEcXnYw5t3hTgJ4jAWbJkfKyH917ivwYbKCuWqkw=) [_Peter, what we are witnessing right now is an unprecedented assault on our most fundamental American values. Donald Trump and his Rubber Stamp Republicans in the House are attacking our freedom of speech, ripping away our healthcare, suppressing our votes and gerrymandering congressional districts to rig the midterm elections. Democrats will continue to aggressively push back. We need to know you’ve got our backs. Please, Peter: Will you read Marc’s email and then answer his call by chipping in $15 before our massive End of Year Deadline in 72 hours? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122123728/591649587/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251228_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMyODJkNi0wZGU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=102rEcXnYw5t3hTgJ4jAWbJkfKyH917ivwYbKCuWqkw=) \---------- Forwarded message ---------- | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122123729/591649588/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251228_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMyODJkNi0wZGU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=102rEcXnYw5t3hTgJ4jAWbJkfKyH917ivwYbKCuWqkw=)
---
Peter, I’m proud to be one of the lawyers leading the fight in the Democrats’ lawsuit against Donald Trump to defend democracy and protect voting rights.
I only reach out when it’s important, so believe me when I tell you: this is as important as it gets.
[Hakeem Jeffries filed a lawsuit to block Trump’s attempt to undermine our elections – _and he needs your grassroots support to help us win._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122123731/591649589/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251228_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMyODJkNi0wZGU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=102rEcXnYw5t3hTgJ4jAWbJkfKyH917ivwYbKCuWqkw=)
[_The truth is: Winning a case like this won’t be easy, especially when we’re facing a corrupt administration backed by billionaires. That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help defend our democracy. If you – and everyone else reading – give before midnight, we can hold Trump accountable and hand the far right extremists a stunning rebuke. Can I count on you to kick in $15? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122123734/591649590/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251228_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMyODJkNi0wZGU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=102rEcXnYw5t3hTgJ4jAWbJkfKyH917ivwYbKCuWqkw=)
Peter, here’s what’s happening:
Donald Trump signed an executive order that attempts to suppress our votes and stop states from counting mail-in ballots.
We cannot let him get away with it.
Our legal team is using every tool we have to take on Donald Trump and we will never back down, but we need your help.
[We cannot let Trump and his allies seize our elections, silence our voices and reject any result they dislike. We must keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122123736/591649591/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251228_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMyODJkNi0wZGU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=102rEcXnYw5t3hTgJ4jAWbJkfKyH917ivwYbKCuWqkw=)
[_If you value our democracy, this is your moment to make a difference. Our work to defend our Constitution, our democracy and our freedom has never been more important. So I’m personally asking: Will you chip in any amount to support our work so we can win this legal battle and hand Trump a humiliating defeat? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122123738/591649592/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251228_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMyODJkNi0wZGU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=102rEcXnYw5t3hTgJ4jAWbJkfKyH917ivwYbKCuWqkw=)
| [**DONATE NOW: $15**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122123740/591649593/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20251228_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGMyODJkNi0wZGU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=102rEcXnYw5t3hTgJ4jAWbJkfKyH917ivwYbKCuWqkw=)

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. We’re running a different campaign. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122124174/591651024/1233683871?&refcode=E16971-20251228-Raph-Image-DeadlineEOQ&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODhiMGVhYS0wZWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efD4IIrL322jXqegpAeNu41nT6bu7kGSFIXl6i0LB-s=) Hi friends, My name is Raphael (everyone calls me “Raph” for short) and I’m excited to introduce myself as Eric Swalwell’s Digital Director. **The past month since launching this campaign has been nothing short of incredible. It’s been intense, energizing, and a true whirlwind in the best way possible.** In my role, I work closely with Eric to make sure our message is breaking through and reaching voters across California. I’ve seen firsthand how deeply he cares about California families. I’ve watched him take punches from Donald Trump and keep fighting. I’ve heard him speak directly with voters about his plans to make California more affordable and lower costs — and I can confidently say he’s going to be a great Governor because he’s already a great leader. [_**But right now, we need your help. Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is Wednesday, and all eyes are on this first report. It will set the tone for the entire campaign. name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
How Sabbath rest anchored Charlie’s life
Charlie’s final message—support Turning Point USA & receive his last book.
| | [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b336edba32c54c65babc67df6ab7971e&_e=MPtgxNgAVSuXqiOS7fhTmJL6aHYiyc9h2va8mCDU_hsAYOr_n2ydRAZo55JnRaZJ1GAVwAs69TOspDdnWOoYH24gG1_pJAk4AkePo1e78yDtMzSAPKtz9e3-W0W8M8AueHiIBdlsO75S8W4ogPraQh3ryLfNvlkbuQheEppr0oFTYA92FcN2zD1KPjWc1ozOdTFxtyjCUT8i24jb2J4hBgQNPp_5PPjoChSNT2CMBg3hscSJ9hhbpcsFSMwnP4x3_nfYltHukQJjKbQB9NnbUy1tt7dj13-UJrhjeW8eJvWVRyUlzdT-4eQi0S3xEo-CTuu_M05inMkixvagbF3hQI9niubjLMWe2N5-YuGb0B5_BNUAlR87rwW3vSF7V0zmm8wU-KfcKCf1610RW287-av2kZ-RmD63Ml_GHA3-0o2SoidqVzttMm12V-hLc1B1NTz63Sh_k1uYR87BFYSZHF9mbq5zX_7EVze70OTT8cnQEeYoh5fa3s3VDK636DwCfPBZY2SDvRc6YEM8wc76U6BIt4FGp2JCSY6Yc0v4V6XlDat6QpT9YcyC1vPXui9Df9Bn9vRDLG8xlwkfj3FCcc8HsAeAkcUFfqTAG2OSr9-DfxWM70M5rTK0DSs7ecsEs3SGnKCCcNZzbtda0no-X3SgkayopHspf-zM-BjueC8loDjbDiHMM0SP258pR23p)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
---
| Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
| [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b336edba32c54c65babc67df6ab7971e&_e=MPtgxNgAVSuXqiOS7fhTmJL6aHYiyc9h2va8mCDU_hsAYOr_n2ydRAZo55JnRaZJ1GAVwAs69TOspDdnWOoYH24gG1_pJAk4AkePo1e78yDtMzSAPKtz9e3-W0W8M8AueHiIBdlsO75S8W4ogPraQh3ryLfNvlkbuQheEppr0oFTYA92FcN2zD1KPjWc1ozOdTFxtyjCUT8i24jb2J4hBgQNPp_5PPjoChSNT2CMBg1UYI9TqnitDStMPzO1spwDx4rIU9BdtOmnHi1b1ob4jTRJ2mZRui-2bnTMF4GIRH3VjNbfSimQpLB1iYmVtPuc8EC9MskYHKQ3rnWwgCJJkdMksZZqN7mQMAF43tEkY1g-0uRnxsPc12RKcqjVExvoQEuBTeDb8yRthInhZnMA4C42d7gEtorLKpDqm4c1k61oy64J3H_HMJO2VVx3ivHVbQWS2WySBQqxsQIZtN82ErZUk_28sMsjeHkMjDsXOLLGis87Rv_fQiQMWQS_zQF_aL2mMFTRUHwoT5SmDS82N-0P_DguN9g-jg_ekb-c7SeAMWE1TCQgAk2xmiJ613SVQnDqZdM9G25HLFEqylvGRtjrJu1ykXf0sfwRE_NqABKX2iFAQPedcfOhdbrmCYO3sM92-elTzFQRqMTTSxXpNPS03NyBU2vskoQttAC38aY08OHdUYxNHqSzpnanjt-9)
---
| This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. Trump’s public broadcasting cuts are still under legal review and his attacks on the First Amendment are escalating! He’s pressuring and threatening public outlets to silence all journalism that exposes the corruption of his administration and disagrees with it. New Dems are fighting back in Congress, but we’re asking top Democrats like you to join us in support of the First Amendment by standing up for critical media watchdogs like NPR! name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Why we need you, Peter
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251228-1772-foote&t=1001&akid=1772%2E342411%2EW0WzEM ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’re staring down our end-of-year deadline — and we’ve set a goal to
raise $150,000 before Wednesday at midnight.

Here’s why:

The Squad is out front every single day — organizing, speaking truth to
power, and holding the Trump administration accountable.

Whether it’s fighting for working people, defending our democracy, or
standing up to billionaires and corporate special interests, we are
showing what it looks like when our government finally works for the
people.

But none of this is possible without you. Every moment of resistance,
every organizing push, every win we’ve built together — it all comes down
to whether we can meet our grassroots fundraising goals.

That’s why we need you in this fight. If we’re going to keep building
people power strong enough to take on Trump and his allies, we cannot
afford to fall short now.

We combed through our records for the month, and here’s where you stand:

Supporter Record for
Peter
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
December Donor: No — not
yet!
2025 Total:
$0
Suggested donation: $3
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251228-movement.x7yiWr&refcode=em20251228-1772&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1772%2E342411%2EW0WzEM ]Contribute $3

*This data reflects donations made online with this email address. If
you've made a previous contribution via check or with a different email
address, it may not be reflected above. Thank you for supporting our
Squad.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251228-movement.x7yiWr&refcode=em20251228-1772&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1772%2E342411%2EW0WzEM ]Can you chip in $3 right now to help us hit our $150,000
goal before Wednesday’s midnight deadline? Falling short means scaling
back our efforts — and with so much on the line, we simply can’t afford
that going into an election year.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251228-movement.x7yiWr&refcode=em20251228-1772&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1772%2E342411%2EW0WzEM ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1772%2E342411%2EW0WzEM

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
Your contribution couldn’t come at a more critical time

|

With our end-of-year fundraising deadline only three days away, we’re asking: [_**can you donate just $5 to reelect Senator Mark Warner?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122125739/591655754/-52083569?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOY3_251228_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWI3OGIzOS0wZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=79WfNqpaKnhs9jDIhMwdyG2MoTppbGkxCqrPBlwFfGI=)

You see, Senator Warner has been _the_ leading voice in Washington speaking out against the Trump administration's chaos and corruption. And when his Republican colleagues refuse to stand up to Trump, Mark calls it out for what it is: spineless.

But that means this seat could be a top Republican target in 2026. Trump and his allies are prepared to spend whatever it takes to expand their power in Washington. We need to be ready for whatever they throw our way.

We know $5 might not seem like much, but the truth is:

$5 will help us show the grassroots strength behind this campaign when we file with the FEC next month.

$5 could be the difference in Democrats taking back the Senate next year.

$5 can hold the line against whatever Republican billionaire tries to flood Virginia with dark money attacks against us.

**Because frankly, if everyone reading this email chipped in $5, we'd blow well past our $250,000 end-of-year fundraising goal.**

Mark Warner HQ **Before you go:**

subject: This deadline is real, folks

body:
This email matters

name: The Flyover
subject: A Final Note
body:
Just 3 days left in 2025--and this opportunity to own a piece of _The Flyover_ is closing soon.

---
| | |
---
| |
#
---
Dear _Flyover_ Reader, As we head into the final days of the year, I wanted to reach out to you personally. Just a few months ago, we made a deliberate decision at _The Flyover_ : to open ownership to a small, special group of our readers. People who don't just skim headlines, but care deeply about where the news is headed in this country. This opportunity won't last much longer. We have **three days left in 2025** , and our current investment round is scheduled to **close next month**. Once it does, that door closes for good. I know decisions like this don't happen lightly. But if you've been watching from the sidelines, wondering whether to step in, I want you to know--**this is the moment**. Three days from now, the year ends.
Next month, the round closes.
And when it's completed, there won't be another chance in this round. If you believe, as I do, that legacy media has failed and _The Flyover_ offers something better--this is your opportunity to be part of this movement. **[Invest in _The Flyover_ today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0L9u2zAQBvCnoTYb4pH644FDUVWb6w4Fik7EWTxaDCjSkE428vaBEhtZMmb-3X247_4d7RFDDOnyGycy7LN15MKATM4mui-RmGm26EPCmDKThRKqnYQdtPZn79cYPxdkVTjjiYBUQUY2dX3QAE1bjAYIdSkdKo9Kk_OtwrLWWuK5JXfwqghmC5YArWxkU7V7VTe-pPJcKU2NHFDoklzgPO9fckg8ko-v-UbzfshTEc3IfF2E-iGgF9CHdKOFv5jcWPUrT3bJ6zyQUF33vF9AvcFELqyTUN3pnsjtjuQCPmjA6YrhkoTq-o_MJ-TElFio7tfp_591GeEBTPMW9bc_dXYrB1UxG3e9hxjDUjdCl5cJQ3wvwd_w_5uBtwAAAP__Emec1w) **
* * *
**The Big Question** One of the most common--and most fair--questions readers ask is simple: **How do I get a return on my investment?** I believe in being direct and transparent. Every investment carries risk. But here's what makes _The Flyover_ different: We became profitable in just two years, with strong margins and disciplined growth--putting us among the top tier of media startups in the country. There are three primary ways Flyover investors could ultimately see returns: **1\. A Sale**
One day, a larger media company or strategic partner could acquire _The Flyover_. If that happens, we'll only work with partners who respect our mission and our readers. **2\. A Public Listing**
While we're private today, a future public listing could give investors the freedom to buy and sell shares. **3\. Profit Distributions (Dividends)**
Unlike most startups, we're already generating profit. That makes future distributions a real possibility as the business continues to scale. To put it simply:
**Sale. Listing. Distributions.** **[Invest in _The Flyover_ today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0L9u2zAQBvCnoTYb4pH644FDUVWb6w4Fik7EWTxaDCjSkE428vaBEhtZMmb-3X247_4d7RFDDOnyGycy7LN15MKATM4mui-RmGm26EPCmDKThRKqnYQdtPZn79cYPxdkVTjjiYBUQUY2dX3QAE1bjAYIdSkdKo9Kk_OtwrLWWuK5JXfwqghmC5YArWxkU7V7VTe-pPJcKU2NHFDoklzgPO9fckg8ko-v-UbzfshTEc3IfF2E-iGgF9CHdKOFv5jcWPUrT3bJ6zyQUF33vF9AvcFELqyTUN3pnsjtjuQCPmjA6YrhkoTq-o_MJ-TElFio7tfp_591GeEBTPMW9bc_dXYrB1UxG3e9hxjDUjdCl5cJQ3wvwd_w_5uBtwAAAP__Emec1w) **
* * *
**The Final Push of 2025** We're in the last **three-day sprint** to close out the year, with our funding round set to close next month. Shares are limited, and once this round is completed, no additional investments will be accepted. If you've been considering investing--whether to support the movement of bias free, fact-based journalism, to own a piece of a growing media company, or to position yourself for potential returns--I truly believe this is your moment. Will you help us finish 2025 strong? Join us as an owner before the year--and this round--comes to a close. **[Invest in _The Flyover_ today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0L9u2zAQBvCnoTYb4pH644FDUVWb6w4Fik7EWTxaDCjSkE428vaBEhtZMmb-3X247_4d7RFDDOnyGycy7LN15MKATM4mui-RmGm26EPCmDKThRKqnYQdtPZn79cYPxdkVTjjiYBUQUY2dX3QAE1bjAYIdSkdKo9Kk_OtwrLWWuK5JXfwqghmC5YArWxkU7V7VTe-pPJcKU2NHFDoklzgPO9fckg8ko-v-UbzfshTEc3IfF2E-iGgF9CHdKOFv5jcWPUrT3bJ6zyQUF33vF9AvcFELqyTUN3pnsjtjuQCPmjA6YrhkoTq-o_MJ-TElFio7tfp_591GeEBTPMW9bc_dXYrB1UxG3e9hxjDUjdCl5cJQ3wvwd_w_5uBtwAAAP__Emec1w) ** Warm regards,
Cole
CEO, _The Flyover_ **P.S.** The **15% bonus share opportunity** is still available during this end-of-year sprint--but once it's gone, it's gone. | | *Own The Flyover Disclaimer

clean_body: Just 3 days left in 2025--and this opportunity to own a piece of The Flyover is closing soon. | | | | | Dear Flyover Reader, As we head into the final days of the year, I wanted to reach out to you personally. Just a few months ago, we made a deliberate decision at The Flyover : to open ownership to a small, special group of our readers. People who don't just skim headlines, but care deeply about where the news is headed in this country. This opportunity won't last much longer. We have three days left in 2025 , and our current investment round is scheduled to close next month. Once it does, that door closes for good. I know decisions like this don't happen lightly. But if you've been watching from the sidelines, wondering whether to step in, I want you to know--this is the moment. Three days from now, the year ends. Next month, the round closes. And when it's completed, there won't be another chance in this round. If you believe, as I do, that legacy media has failed and The Flyover offers something better--this is your opportunity to be part of this movement. The Big Question One of the most common--and most fair--questions readers ask is simple: How do I get a return on my investment? I believe in being direct and transparent. Every investment carries risk. But here's what makes The Flyover different: We became profitable in just two years, with strong margins and disciplined growth--putting us among the top tier of media startups in the country. There are three primary ways Flyover investors could ultimately see returns: 1\. A Sale One day, a larger media company or strategic partner could acquire The Flyover. If that happens, we'll only work with partners who respect our mission and our readers. 2\. A Public Listing While we're private today, a future public listing could give investors the freedom to buy and sell shares. 3\. Profit Distributions (Dividends) Unlike most startups, we're already generating profit. That makes future distributions a real possibility as the business continues to scale. To put it simply: Sale. Listing. Distributions. The Final Push of 2025 We're in the last three-day sprint to close out the year, with our funding round set to close next month. Shares are limited, and once this round is completed, no additional investments will be accepted. If you've been considering investing--whether to support the movement of bias free, fact-based journalism, to own a piece of a growing media company, or to position yourself for potential returns--I truly believe this is your moment. Will you help us finish 2025 strong? Join us as an owner before the year--and this round--comes to a close. Warm regards, Cole CEO, The Flyover P.S. The 15% bonus share opportunity is still available during this end-of-year sprint--but once it's gone, it's gone. | | *Own The Flyover Disclaimer Equity crowdfunding investments in private placements, and start-up investments in particular, are speculative and involve a high degree of risk and those investors who cannot afford to lose their entire investment should not invest in start-ups. Companies seeking startup investment through equity crowdfunding tend to be in earlier stages of development and their business model, products and services may not yet be fully developed, operational or tested in the public marketplace. There is no guarantee that the stated valuation and other terms are accurate or in agreement with the market or industry valuations. Further, investors may receive illiquid and/or restricted stock that may be subject to holding period requirements and/or liquidity concerns.DealMaker Securities LLC, a registered broker-dealer, and member of | , located at 4000 Eagle Point Corporate Drive, Suite 950, Birmingham, AL 35242, is the Intermediary for this offering and is not an affiliate of or connected with the Issuer. Please check our background on FINRA's . DealMaker Securities LLC does not make investment recommendations. DealMaker Securities LLC is NOT placing or selling these securities on behalf of the Issuer. DealMaker Securities LLC is NOT soliciting this investment or making any recommendations by collecting, reviewing, and processing an Investor's documentation for this investment. DealMaker Securities LLC conducts Anti-Money Laundering, Identity and Bad Actor Disqualification reviews of the Issuer, and confirms they are a registered business in good standing. DealMaker Securities LLC is NOT vetting or approving the information provided by the Issuer or the Issuer itself. Contact information is provided for Investors to make inquiries and requests to DealMaker Securities LLC regarding Regulation CF in general, or the status of such investor's submitted documentation, specifically. DealMaker Securities LLC may direct Investors to specific sections of the Offering Circular to locate information or answers to their inquiry but does not opine or provide guidance on issuer related matter. | The Flyover, LLC 1910 Thomes Ave. Cheyenne WY 82001 | ---|---

name: Update via Team Conroy
subject: Did you see Carmela’s message?
body:
| | | | | | |
Peter,

Did you see Carmela’s message yesterday? She asked us to follow up because we’re at a critical moment - and our final fundraising deadline of the year is approaching fast.

With less than a year until the 2026 election, Team Conroy is building the momentum we need to secure a historic victory and bring accountable, commonsense leadership to Eastern Washington. **But we can’t do it without you.
**[**
**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=c671926c4a&e=a7b299e420)[**Will you chip in before midnight this Wednesday to help us hit this critical year-end goal? Every contribution moves us closer to victory.**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=1c4f4a4a03&e=a7b299e420)**
**
– Team Conroy

_Begin Carmela’s previous message:_
---
| | | | [|
---](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=44779376a6&e=a7b299e420)
| |
Peter,

**As the holiday season comes to a close, our neighbors are feeling the squeeze – meanwhile, Michael Baumgartner is** _**still**_**nowhere to be found.

** As folks worry about winter heating costs, rising food prices, and whether local clinics will stay open, Baumgartner has spent most of the past six months on paid vacation.

And when he does show up to work, he votes lockstep with extreme House leadership – extending the tariff chaos, raising costs, threatening healthcare, and leaving our communities behind.**

We have to hold him accountable, Peter – and make sure his freshman term is his last.

That’s why it’s absolutely critical we hit our final fundraising goal of the year and head into 2026 with the resources we need to win. **[**To stay on track, we set an ambitious goal of raising $28,500 before the clock strikes midnight on New Year's Eve. Will you rush a grassroots contribution to help us close the gap?**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=1766bec854&e=a7b299e420)
---
| _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._
---
| [ DONATE $5 NOW » ](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=386a462bbc&e=a7b299e420)
---
| [ DONATE $10 NOW » ](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=3db9d4d2cb&e=a7b299e420)
---
| [ DONATE $26 NOW » ](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=05ef30d429&e=a7b299e420)
---
| [ DONATE $50 NOW » ](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=210fb0ef60&e=a7b299e420)
---
| [ DONATE $100 NOW » ](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=7079eb67cf&e=a7b299e420)
---
| [ ANOTHER AMOUNT » ](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=bb6c28e8d6&e=a7b299e420)
---
| | Right now, clinics from Stevens County to Columbia County are warning they may have to cut services or close altogether. Vacant doctor, nurse, and counselor positions at Veterans’ hospitals and clinics have been slashed, straining remaining staff and creating longer wait times. Families are forced to choose between paying skyrocketing insurance premiums or putting food on the table.

**This is a crisis of leadership.

**Baumgartner abandoned Eastern Washington the moment he got to Congress. We deserve better. I’m ready to go to Congress and fight for you, your family, friends, and neighbors – every single day.
[**Will you pitch in now to help us continue building the campaign we need to win?**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=e524fd4373&e=a7b299e420)**

** Thank you for stepping up - and for being a part of Team Eastern Washington.

Carmela Conroy

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eduardo_Ver=C3=A1stegui=2C_Sound_of_Freedom_Foundation?=
subject: How you can help after the Sound of Freedom
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1083558/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvQWFwclJDeDQ4Vw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjg/LbmNsUEVYSUdyYQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNLS2tTb3d2UzhZNU1scw/gaVFnXg/sau7b2fb155)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, As the producer of the feature film _Sound of Freedom_ , I helped sound the alarm about the horrific realities of the $9.5 BILLION human trafficking and child sex industry. _Sound of Freedom_ was a box office hit and gave us the platform to spread awareness about children who must be rescued from unimaginably horrific realities. And now, through The Sound of Freedom Foundation, we identify and track cases of child abduction and trafficking, and we tirelessly search for and rescue defenseless victims. **[**Will you partner with the Sound of Freedom Foundation today in this critical work by making your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
A **massive surge in immigration** , **skyrocketing drug use** , and**homelessness** are some of the factors that increase the likelihood of being trafficked... ...but, the reality is that perpetrators of child sex trafficking are skilled in identifying victims and exploiting their vulnerabilities. The result is heart-wrenching for victims and their families. An empty seat at the dinner table. A backpack collects dust as it hangs in the hallway. The pain and anguish that comes from being the family whose child has been abducted by criminals and sold into sex trafficking. And, worst of all, the innocent child who’s scared, hurt, and abused by human traffickers. Right now, children are waiting to be rescued from horrific conditions, and it’s up to you and me – working together through the Sound of Freedom Foundation – to help God’s children return to their parents. **[Your immediate support of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more would be a blessing toward saving the lives of innocent children. I pray you’ll help us to rescue victims of sex trafficking with your tax-deductible gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
In many cases, including those of the children whose story was told in _Sound of Freedom_ , abduction occurs internationally and there are costs associated with hiring attorneys, filing petitions, and even traveling to the country where the child is located. While the cost of returning an abducted child varies depending on the case, the truth is that the rescue of a missing child is an incredibly complex and expensive task. _No family deserves to continue staring at an empty seat at the dinner table because there isn’t the financial ability to continue their fight._ God’s children are NOT for sale, which is why we must act immediately to SAVE these innocent lives from sex trafficking. **[**I hope I can count on your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or more to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today to help us reunite young girls and boys who have been trafficked.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Together, we can set them free! Many blessings, Eduardo Verástegui
_Sound of Freedom_ , Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
5442 Thornwood Drive, San Jose CA 95123
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’d like to explain why I have to keep asking.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Do you have a minute to hear me out?
**[Peter, I’m sure you know already that I have to ask for your support for our campaign. I don’t like to bother you with so many of these requests, but failing to meet our fundraising goals could sink our campaign, so I have to keep asking. Here’s why:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98663?refcode=em20251228-9850&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9850%2E614464%2EEzvdSU)**
We already know that this could be the most competitive U.S. Senate election of 2026, and the polls are getting closer and closer. Winning won’t be easy, but we have a blueprint to succeed. _You see, we’ve done it before._
Both of my elections for Governor of North Carolina were close, and both of those victories came in years that Donald Trump carried the state in the presidential election. We won by connecting with folks from all kinds of communities and making it clear that _people_ are my priority. Not a political party, not personal power — just making things better for folks right here in North Carolina. This is what we’ll do again.
**But I also know that this race for the U.S. Senate is unlike anything we’ve faced yet.**
To win, we will have to enact an ambitious campaign of voter outreach, meeting with folks in Raleigh and Charlotte and Asheville, but also in the most rural, hardest-to-reach corners of the state, just as we did before. That doesn’t come cheap. And we will also have to go toe-to-toe with the GOP’s massive campaign of spending against me.
The path to the U.S. Senate majority runs through North Carolina, so national Republicans are uniting around my GOP-insider opponent. PACs tied to Senate GOP leadership are already running ads attacking me, and we expect GOP groups will spend hundreds of millions more before this campaign ends.
**We have to meet them dollar for dollar in spending** — on TV, online, in the mail, and wherever else we can reach NC voters. In a race this close, every vote — and every cent — will count.
**[I’m asking you to split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots now so we don’t fall behind. I’m relying on you to give anything that fits in your budget right away.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98663?refcode=em20251228-9850&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9850%2E614464%2EEzvdSU)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98663?refcode=em20251228-9850&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9850%2E614464%2EEzvdSU)**
Thanks so much,
Roy Cooper

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)

To win, we will have to enact an ambitious campaign of voter outreach, meeting with folks in Raleigh and Charlotte and Asheville, but also in the most rural, hardest-to-reach corners of the state, just as we did before. That doesn’t come cheap. And we will also have to go toe-to-toe with the GOP’s massive campaign of spending against me. The path to the U.S. Senate majority runs through North Carolina, so national Republicans are uniting around my GOP-insider opponent. PACs tied to Senate GOP leadership are already running ads attacking me, and we expect GOP groups will spend hundreds of millions more before this campaign ends. We have to meet them dollar for dollar in spending — on TV, online, in the mail, and wherever else we can reach NC voters. In a race this close, every vote — and every cent — will count. Thanks so much, Roy Cooper | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

Peter, did you see Seth’s message about our end-of-year goal?

As we head into the final days of December, this end-of-year deadline is crucial because it sets the tone for our campaign's strength in 2026. The numbers we report will show whether we’re starting the new year with the work ahead. We need a **fighter like Seth — who stands up for Rhode Island families and the momentum needed to win.**

**_[Now, we need to send a message that we are geared up for the fight heading into 2026. Donate now by clicking here, and read Seth’s message below!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122127472/591660779/140362489?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20251228_FR_EOY_0_3MO_TeamMagaziner_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTgxMmRlMi0xMmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEc_76_nNyCzbA71GEsdgDClXFpzLAhJZPYmQmjCPek=)_**
* * *
**_Seth’s Message:_** Peter,

**As we approach the end of the month, the FEC public filing deadline is a key moment that shows whether we have the resources and support to stand strong in 2026. This snapshot will demonstrate our campaign's readiness and resilience.**

Every day in Congress, I’m fighting back against Trump’s reckless agenda. But Republicans are pushing policies that make life harder for ordinary people, from tariffs that are spiking food prices to slashing healthcare funding to efforts to undermine our democracy.

And heading into 2026, this fight will only get more heated. So we need to make sure we’re ready.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

_Here's an example:_

You're a 62-year-old who has put money away all your life.

You've done so to secure a comfortable retirement, on your own terms.

But you also want to pass your retirement savings balance to your loved ones.

This includes your 401(k)s... traditional IRAs... even your Roth IRAs.

Of course you want your hard-earned (and growing) money to last as long as it can, and — just as importantly — to get taxed as little as possible.

Better brace yourself.

The rules we've grown accustomed to are getting completely turned upside down by Congress.

[Here what to do](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=f24c2f3f2b26498ea61487b39e3a2a85&_e=VEd1kpbiZd0IZXvr7305K9HEavRWnCJPO96jgSJi_hTk_1lC0DqSQc_ANU_oSIcpRG0kcceVGPaaUKszV1ilWylpzY_TIFKEMMPKKWMzhUtIA_4kfq5gXFWRXj5J9xoEBFTrvoz--B4sxPJMwuhRtUv_eWGr-G4Lnlh6gnFKnFVthTr7lcQ1uhBw8vX1WTPBWohj6G9x7yl2Z2TrF11dXkpUTOwpWSmVNn67o7u5finVo136WO8zn5BoqE2yCtwbqz_srVomkhSHXEmPkKWi10BJF5n8IOyYTiNf3rPcGHFv3UW02jsd13vwdMB6rrzlpbW-Yh9NK8xjqgH7BggKWP18UDpmajva1Aa5lJCcBy1fI6Qaqws0MEzvRTCpRbFDl9MwYkakELfHTidIpJIoI7J1d-bf2pjnEfBXwGhZy9EMRwO2_pmimAVAdEAz47f9JM0OQ5moLg-BVOWDIMZHWp8-kBzJ_Fg4PMG0RyOJ82FxkmjM51Q1u3pOe3GqoLSEVsrmYLFyJhxFcxUiD0hUrUqewky8Qr4EiQYVgIQcAldtKyqOAAlwPSCuJSPmsBpSeEMG5rHDYDGjHcOrTUbHGF1qU37c-xfTb1amG96lVo8qwnXxn292PBj4eQW6TUne)

Here's an example: You're a 62-year-old who has put money away all your life. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | paints an ugly picture for American retirement accounts. | Here's an example: You're a 62-year-old who has put money away all your life. You've done so to secure a comfortable retirement, on your own terms. But you also want to pass your retirement savings balance to your loved ones. This includes your 401(k)s... traditional IRAs... even your Roth IRAs. Of course you want your hard-earned (and growing) money to last as long as it can, and — just as importantly — to get taxed as little as possible. Better brace yourself. name: AZ Dems
subject: Andy Biggs is coming for your healthcare (again)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Biggs is leading the push to let ACA subsidies expire. Millions will see premiums skyrocket — and Republicans have no real alternative. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122127765/591661490/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251228_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE3MTMyNzAtMTNlNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckC7ylKjczW6BAMsCuIPWrt0VHMt1y4_kUyWorsVnwE=)
---
Hi there, **Andy Biggs and his fellow Republicans are coming for your healthcare. Again.** Biggs is leading a conservative push to let Affordable Care Act subsidies expire at the end of this month. He's calling it a "free-market healthcare framework." What it really means: _tens of millions_ of Americans will see their premiums skyrocket, and Republicans have no real plan to replace what they're taking away. Republicans like Biggs have been trying to repeal the ACA since it was signed into law in 2010. They've failed every time because Americans see through their plans: strip away protections, throw millions off healthcare, and offer nothing concrete in return. Now Biggs is trying again — **and he's enlisted Eli Crane to co-sign his letter to Speaker Johnson.** Here's what Biggs is proposing: Let the ACA subsidies expire, arguing they've "inflated healthcare costs" and "expanded federal dependency." Replace them with expanded Health Savings Accounts and "market competition." Sound familiar? It's the same failed approach Republicans have pushed for 15 years. **Here's the reality: If enhanced ACA subsidies expire without a replacement, thousands of Arizonans currently relying on them will see premiums rise sharply.** A 60-year-old couple making $80,000 would see costs jump from $567 to $2,026 per month — _an increase of about $17,500 annually!_ [**Chip in to help us stop Biggs and defend healthcare for Arizona families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122127766/591661491/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251228_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE3MTMyNzAtMTNlNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckC7ylKjczW6BAMsCuIPWrt0VHMt1y4_kUyWorsVnwE=) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122127767/591661492/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251228_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE3MTMyNzAtMTNlNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckC7ylKjczW6BAMsCuIPWrt0VHMt1y4_kUyWorsVnwE=)
---
Biggs concluded his letter with the following: "If we plant our flag now, we can rebuild a healthcare system that reflects true conservative principles."
Here's what "conservative principles" really means: **higher premiums, less coverage, and more uncertainty for Arizona families.**
We're not letting it happen without a fight.
**[Are you with us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122127768/591661493/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251228_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzE3MTMyNzAtMTNlNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ckC7ylKjczW6BAMsCuIPWrt0VHMt1y4_kUyWorsVnwE=)**
Thank you,
Arizona Democratic Party
Arizona Democratic Party

Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123

clean_body: Peter, When we started our process, we never imagined your name would end up on the final unverified list. We frankly all assumed you'd be one of the first people to complete the process and move on. But here we are, hours before the midnight deadline, and your status is still showing as Do you realize what's about to happen, Peter? In a few hours, your Republican Party affiliation will be stamped if not completed before the midnight deadline. ****************************************************************************************************** Did our emails end up in spam? Or have you decided you don't want to be associated with the Republican Party anymore? ****************************************************************************************************** Thank you, NRSC HQ | Paid for by the NRSC. Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota.

**I’m a former Navy SEAL who doesn’t beat around the bush.** I’ve put myself in harm's way more times than I can count because I love what this country stands for.

Leadership doesn’t start on the day one is elected; it’s a quality that one learns from a young age - you exercise it, and it develops over time. President Trump personifies it - so does Marco Rubio.

**But Tim Walz?** He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone.

That isn’t leadership, it’s cowardice.

**As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including:**

* **$300m** to pay for the therapy of children with autism, who, in fact, didn’t have autism.

* **$250m** stolen from funds meant to feed hungry children.

So far, Governor Walz has taken ZERO accountability and **[I’m calling on him to RESIGN.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c61df718c64d42c5bd6537eac5461e92&_e=rccAEDP-tVdBbzu4XTfU0SIiXO3QioX3pIhgvvB2yNnEIY-lA-nh9haXPIg6Cd_9ZjkCEUPuanEbMYQ0lMsDFCQSZigK6x4knRoD3hPK4tB2IdrZxQFJ63AmySbi3KSek4EZPTF9kUvm-o1_pDpy1X-hKJVfS0fHgYWkcUugT2uh34RZGt255Z98v2jjDxyEsqbNumOVZp0zLYzbOC3TkDLV_h6POltWbkdBDRUTquHtOQRNKjEzYK0rjO-KaU83T4jqTMAexmD9sRw1t6sqrU-3Y603YeeKIPWEmOF2OjtOeJeB2aGMVfnsxxG9lMDXwT6FQtpOX5LXM9ht8XNYzso3qFTwYae_VYNwUP-wFCJvfVdRmQgKHuQubnBKpUU6ownk6xAjFkWkoNNo2lEnEPPUsHGMQl1HoqmUmD9CmrZQbox7mcNK0yC0D9ZPPA5n3_Sesp9V_0ESybk5EyM5Wqd4fANjs3IAdpHP-dzjBIib4cPOZfOnA3wlWXuaOVTsF0zHfNIhPKc3RVXQ6ikisXyp37BH4xU4if4shBMlIsRf_Rhi2OLz7sTeocqKNDHPw3xwds1tqwk-XZQZdZ2TG3OUBx_IJmr4W0nhPC6yCdyjRuKPuq6g8WS8Yex6ScCC7c26lxdjK7cspWsXx3WuZqXaegk1uqzYVV9rJB2ko_BMjhGCxmTDeVReTBIJ0YOzL9A9ozWAZ4PfzZrD6MiT-hdEU-tZ4A-OBkqoSCGh77tXBbthp5MMOgScMzjP-ivXISW8l0WMpya90R4tMwIWtMMeR1FqvkCxGbl2UwDSAHk%3D)**

clean_body: He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone. | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota. I’m a former Navy SEAL who doesn’t beat around the bush. I’ve put myself in harm's way more times than I can count because I love what this country stands for. Leadership doesn’t start on the day one is elected; it’s a quality that one learns from a young age - you exercise it, and it develops over time. President Trump personifies it - so does Marco Rubio. But Tim Walz? He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone. That isn’t leadership, it’s cowardice. As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including: $300m to pay for the therapy of children with autism, who, in fact, didn’t have autism. $250m stolen from funds meant to feed hungry children. So far, Governor Walz has taken ZERO accountability and In service, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: John Bisognano, NDRC
subject: What we already know about 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need your help to meet these threats with the resources required.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122130751/591667510/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlZGQ1OTExLTE3ZTQtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LfsxheV3XnY1CwRDYbD9lhgf06cBRAy1VkLO82wHnmo=&emci=6ab9f044-8be2-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=aedd5911-17e4-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, 2025 will be remembered as the year Donald Trump picked up the phone to demand five congressional seats from Governor Greg Abbott. And in doing so, he ignited a crisis — and a nationwide opposition movement. 2025 also gave new meaning to the adage that _there are no off-years_ when it comes to redistricting. After Texas forced through their gerrymander, Missouri and North Carolina followed suit, passing some of the most egregiously unfair maps in the country. Meanwhile, it started to become clear that the redistricting crisis Trump engineered wasn’t going as planned. Utah threw out an unfair map in favor of a fair one that creates the possibility of a Democratic district. Indiana lawmakers (including many Republicans) voted down their gerrymandering push despite incredible pressure from Washington to force it through. And 305,000 Missourians signed petitions to put the gerrymandered map lawmakers forced through on the ballot — a sign that the people could get the final say. **If 2025 proved that when we fight back, we can win — 2026 is already putting that notion to the test.** In January, as many as eight states could begin a mid-decade redraw, either as Republicans pursue egregious gerrymanders or as blue states move to counter them. That list includes: Kansas, Nebraska, Florida, New Hampshire, South Carolina, Virginia, Illinois, and Maryland. **In other words: This fight is about to get much, much tougher — and the fate of our very democracy is at stake. That’s why this ask is so important right now:[Will you invest in the NDRC’s work to stop Republican power grabs and fight for a level playing field in our democracy? clean_body: We need your help to meet these threats with the resources required. | Peter, 2025 will be remembered as the year Donald Trump picked up the phone to demand five congressional seats from Governor Greg Abbott. And in doing so, he ignited a crisis — and a nationwide opposition movement. 2025 also gave new meaning to the adage that there are no off-years when it comes to redistricting. After Texas forced through their gerrymander, Missouri and North Carolina followed suit, passing some of the most egregiously unfair maps in the country. Meanwhile, it started to become clear that the redistricting crisis Trump engineered wasn’t going as planned. Utah threw out an unfair map in favor of a fair one that creates the possibility of a Democratic district. Indiana lawmakers (including many Republicans) voted down their gerrymandering push despite incredible pressure from Washington to force it through. And 305,000 Missourians signed petitions to put the gerrymandered map lawmakers forced through on the ballot — a sign that the people could get the final say. If 2025 proved that when we fight back, we can win — 2026 is already putting that notion to the test. In January, as many as eight states could begin a mid-decade redraw, either as Republicans pursue egregious gerrymanders or as blue states move to counter them. That list includes: Kansas, Nebraska, Florida, New Hampshire, South Carolina, Virginia, Illinois, and Maryland. In other words: This fight is about to get much, much tougher — and the fate of our very democracy is at stake. That’s why this ask is so important right now:= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We are also busy preparing for a critical Supreme Court ruling that we expect to come down in the near future — and its decision in Louisiana vs. Callais could completely upend our work. At issue is Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act — a legal lynchpin in our fight for fairness — which prohibits states from diluting the voting power of communities of color in the drawing of district lines. The fair maps movement is fighting this out in the courts, and have been since the start of this case. But we must be ready to respond regardless of the outcome to build a massive, people-powered movement to preserve representative democracy in America. = Thank you, Peter, for steadfastly standing with us in this work. We are so proud to fight alongside you. — Biz John Bisognano President, National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Team, 2025 has been one for the books:
We have not received assurances from the Trump Administration that they will stay out of state-run elections.
We’ve seen federal agencies that once protected election security weakened.
We’ve seen renewed attempts to undermine faith in vote-by-mail.
And we’ve seen sweeping demands for sensitive voter data that have no legal basis.
None of this guarantees interference. _But it requires preparation._
Minnesota is working with other states to defend against every possible threat to the freedom to vote. That takes planning, resources, and public trust.

name: Gov. Andy Beshear
subject: 2025 was full of wins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

As we step into a new and very important election year, I’ve been looking back on 2025. This year has brought chaos and cruelty from Washington, DC.

But it has also featured energy, momentum, and big wins for Democrats up and down the ballot as Americans push back on a White House that is focused on corruption and retribution while making life harder for the American people.

We have seen Democrats win or overperform in almost every special election that has taken place in 2025.

In April, we won a Wisconsin Supreme Court seat despite massive spending on the other side from Elon Musk and Republican Super PACs. We won two governor’s races, holding New Jersey and flipping Virginia from red to blue. Dems broke the Republican supermajority in the Mississippi legislature and flipped two of five seats on the Georgia Public Service Commission.

And just this month in Kentucky, Democrats won a state senate special election by almost 50 points.

People are tired of the leadership that they’re seeing out of Washington, DC, from both the White House and Congress. Prices are continuing to rise as tariffs hit consumers and businesses alike. Health insurance premiums are spiking thanks to Trump’s big ugly bill and Congress’ refusal to act.

At In This Together PAC, we are focused on spending 2026 working to elect the leaders who will put a stop to the policies that are hurting Americans, and instead work to make their lives easier.

**I've seen what we can do when we stay focused and work together. And I believe that, this new year, we are going to win in places that people don’t expect.

[If you're ready to help make this a reality, I'm asking you to step up before December comes to a close.
