body:
Will you join folks in your area who are supporting our campaign?
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4270%2E582294%2EWdfI5e)
You’re on our list.
Our fundraising team has to keep a close eye on every potential donation in order to run a battleground Senate campaign at this scale. Right now we’re laser-focused on hitting our $150,000 goal before the end of the year.
**We have a ways to go.** But according to our math, if 5 people from your area chip in, we’ll be back on track. That’s why we’re asking this email list today:
[**Will you be one of the 5 people who chips in so we can hit our goal? It will directly power our effort to elect Chris Pappas and keep New Hampshire blue.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251228_2.yc7hVd&amount=5&refcode=em20251228-2&t=2&akid=4270%2E582294%2EWdfI5e)
**[Chip in »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251228_2.yc7hVd&amount=5&refcode=em20251228-2&t=3&akid=4270%2E582294%2EWdfI5e)**
Here’s the bottom line: Our opponent, John Sununu, is supported by GOP billionaire-backed super PACs. They’re doing everything in their power to flip this seat red. **We need to stop them in their tracks.**
We’re working every day to make sure every Granite Stater’s voice is heard, which means we need to reach every corner of New Hampshire.
But the thing is, campaigns are expensive. And this race is shaping up to be one of the _most_ competitive races in the country.
We need to step up our efforts NOW if we’re going to be able to elect Chris Pappas next year.
[**Be one of the 5 donors from****your area by rushing a donation of any amount right now.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251228_2.yc7hVd&amount=5&refcode=em20251228-2&t=4&akid=4270%2E582294%2EWdfI5e)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251228_2.yc7hVd&amount=5&refcode=em20251228-2&t=23&akid=4270%2E582294%2EWdfI5e)**
Together we will keep New Hampshire blue.
Thank you,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251228-2&t=24&refcode2=4270_582294_WdfI5e&akid=4270%2E582294%2EWdfI5e)**

name: Dr. Kristin Hook
subject: Every Family Deserves a Voice
body:
Elect Dr. Kristin Hook for Congress in TX-21!

| | | | | [|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=7eb7b9f674&e=395a33a3d2)
| | | | | |
# Happy Holidays to You and Yours!
---
|
---
| | As we wrap up another busy year,I wanted to pop in your inbox to say _Hello, Happy Holidays, and_ _Thank You for being here!_
Whether you’re traveling or spending time with loved ones,I hope you are enjoying some well-deserved time off doing the things that you love.
For my family, that is eating.
Last weekend we came together for our semi-annual tradition of making tamales!
---
[|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=efb6bf6f7a&e=395a33a3d2)
| |
Many folks may not know,but like so many South Texans,I come from a mixed family: my mom is a gringa and my dad is Mexican-American.
---
| |

My last name “Hook” is one I wear proudly, but it carries the weight of discrimination.
Generations ago, one of our ancestors changed the family name to sound more Anglo, a painful reminder of the prejudice Latinos have faced and continue to face here in Texas.

As the year comes to a close, I’m reflecting on the values that shape who I am and why I fight for our community – to build a future where every voice is heard and every family can thrive without fear or prejudice.

My family’s story reminds me that it takes a village to make progress. I hope you’ll join ours by making a contribution to our campaign today.
To those who have already contributed – MUCHAS GRACIAS!
Your early support ensures we can continue this important work and that no family is left behind.
With Gratitude and Hope,
---
|
---

name: Ximena, United We Dream
subject: Make a tax-deductible donation today, Peter
body:
| | | Peter, This year, our community faced relentless attacks — but we didn't face them alone. When DACA recipients were targeted by immigration agents... when Texas legislators fought to strip in-state tuition from our students... when budget cuts threatened to take away healthcare from our families... United We Dream brought our people together to fight back. Here's just a glimpse at what we built together this year: Through our **Summer of Dreams** program, we equipped young leaders with the tools to organize in their own communities. Our **Organizing Academy** trained hundreds of members in the skills they need to create lasting change. We gathered our movement at the **East Coast** and **West Coast** membership gatherings — spaces where undocumented young people could connect, strategize, and dream together. At our **National Power Building Retreat** in Arizona, we ran a transformative train-the-trainers program, multiplying our capacity to build power in communities across the country. In the DMV area, our **Regional Power Building Retreat** strengthened local organizing. And through **Digital Congress** , we brought members together online to plan, organize, and take action. We know the attacks on our communities will intensify next year — but we're not just reacting anymore. We're building the infrastructure, the skills, and the people power to fight back stronger than ever. Every organizer trained, every coalition built, and every strategy session held builds power in our communities. And Peter, none of this would have happened without you. Everything we accomplished this year was funded by supporters who believe in our movement. Now, as we prepare for an even bigger year ahead, we're counting on you to invest in this work again. Unlike previous End-of-Year campaigns that supported our advocacy work, this year your gift goes to United We Dream's 501(c)(3) work: **the community building, the leadership development, the gatherings that create the foundation for everything we do — which means it’s fully tax-deductible.** [**So please, Peter, will you make a tax-deductible donation to support our advocacy work today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBF6jZ584Ik8wwDrg-IrtTP4GQYmYZGT1bfb7rlLe1vpe_Y8IuHNuAdLImJEHb_WzeKcFkUhftxJXqh3kxtMrxlzgdlKgOfkX6RczDJ23jdFb3VJ86Ls-OlzJso6VcwtGgtJTkB4andXnzkd8QbicKlduMOSGipgn_EVPJiQa0gqGBzsq1_xwf5ZAQBFCrTrWBQ8sluRD-Sflk1lLSQf36zIqagY07ZQZsy6TPbPIcXg-G9jAYQLEOcgjjeyPiNGtexJvCb0b1CUovgGAMti8vDalln1RzkiY74FrR0uNdId3HvZ7J72MkHrVYn0CiL8ot_Uat5oQLp-i6WTAXs-b2q9ESD7lJ75sD3dy_sRJlcv2gQUM9wuSz4-G1YUmvnwso6ohM-pXm8m1pr1GYah9hCKYFCSD8tJZBgnte_5w_5kgHW0kmbiOJRdnbzjiydvXAy2lD5mSKnMZsDb3baofzgB5wtKgXlLHl_gT-LQD2tIJ9/4mt/cqtZdQYORoqTOll5u9KVnw/h0/h001.T9dAyvUgrCHhQOIA4KT1MUN0YelNkeVKAUA8OvW-Em0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $25](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvvSptAA5-xC0ZLMh3sw_H8hyCmECnODiQzfTWOA-yBF6jZ584Ik8wwDrg-IrtTP4GQYmYZGT1bfb7rlLe1vpe_LUnk63wzd9MiXrlE6OTuC1faR5aVsOLJipwoAXkA-BFcrNIV_x-nlJuSbsCul7jCRZ_NzWqwOcmAk8C2F2VJj59gM1rlptBfUByYInjGexXJ2_gcGzW4Kiq8k54BgpCBuy83d_0JOkoJDHpN00av1yDSRk4QFw0BtfmAYi4RMJEY8z4UuHHIKxLYQV0fVaMJqIjSJIImc3qmrs0awh4TAd1P-BpDXPC3gIhiuSHTOaujQoCo86wLBlyf--tqTuG3RPq-myoHH7YgngBwKQ12tmCUpGKiG-6ExMm5hIkzt-fM18LGbaQ67G83tqouuHk87pzXaUWJdYXc2SwUl4ZkdEkcvvPb5zAo8euVgVYDxhtMUy9hiwJc4zowcEar2GEZ_YjQ-gfCKpfulTgelO0e1Cqdhjtgq8ovY5rb4UXkIl3--MEYD1E7-ZLcKrGaXeOX8PcwxNfRS40ahl4RYHtTWw/4mt/cqtZdQYORoqTOll5u9KVnw/h1/h001.ciOMaoHf4PM0bNo4csSG9IlNm7H-iPVv0XGgf2hCFTA)

clean_body: | | | Peter, This year, our community faced relentless attacks — but we didn't face them alone. When DACA recipients were targeted by immigration agents... when Texas legislators fought to strip in-state tuition from our students... when budget cuts threatened to take away healthcare from our families... United We Dream brought our people together to fight back. Here's just a glimpse at what we built together this year: Through our Summer of Dreams program, we equipped young leaders with the tools to organize in their own communities. Our Organizing Academy trained hundreds of members in the skills they need to create lasting change. We gathered our movement at the East Coast and West Coast membership gatherings — spaces where undocumented young people could connect, strategize, and dream together. At our National Power Building Retreat in Arizona, we ran a transformative train-the-trainers program, multiplying our capacity to build power in communities across the country. In the DMV area, our Regional Power Building Retreat strengthened local organizing. And through Digital Congress , we brought members together online to plan, organize, and take action. We know the attacks on our communities will intensify next year — but we're not just reacting anymore. We're building the infrastructure, the skills, and the people power to fight back stronger than ever. Every organizer trained, every coalition built, and every strategy session held builds power in our communities. And Peter, none of this would have happened without you. Everything we accomplished this year was funded by supporters who believe in our movement. Now, as we prepare for an even bigger year ahead, we're counting on you to invest in this work again. Unlike previous End-of-Year campaigns that supported our advocacy work, this year your gift goes to United We Dream's 501(c)(3) work: the community building, the leadership development, the gatherings that create the foundation for everything we do — which means it’s fully tax-deductible. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for being a part of this team, Ximena, United We Dream | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Chip Roy
subject: I am making it official
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
I am ready to serve Texas. Are you on my team? | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=010df5cca5ec4e82907344f4a0920af9&_e=EuipyPzczZwjjLf7nd3kVfABogCPoF5LFpOSiJSKbxVD-lX55iLRQ1bpoomw0JDj6uaWFeeg_ztwCSDUEzO1EsGZwAJRL30KMuTJuk-eLj2bXWeR2Fk7piwnobliD1HJKo4MRyB1uKchsFusqcRpIxA8RLySNTgak-xxlUT4VARBCIp69biJy1yKEzoAtHHjKHLy20Wcqrnv9NiVY6m_xvKRh1zUNJzb5LAY-K8oepY1RG5Q2ptMySx8uChRgEpMtVwDjSrnEeiezb1i57FuUqCEBnQj8ZaQWC_IjqXwQdXJQ1GvL1k4kjRaT3VeQWIoTIvk6RAACHh8pVrGgtxK3Tu-q14fMIAnTmjIqoNoogJNDmRpMs7NbQDHulUxQohKM3JR0ObtdgDsVX6MvAsDB5W1AmRnNDpup8wttvZ5MfTCMn6oPCFn-AKAF0O4WYxwBQgxBX9VP7zy8X4_JbRzHn35PEaJtYtVV9hid3S7pDOGj08lA67VOLXz_5-LU8Dxp6flN-eEfVJTDbmsYjsLFLLoIBKnuBsPFq-3AuFDmAyc1Faehc4qQSL0a7iFC8fDU2bQdbrImBz2Ld1NULWXOJfku170wsSXxEwOvD-w34_kFk84AAahuOrS5hfkjLn1NXyWJGR9f0GvXH4vkRjbd11tPXwa3ICnBj9hbTza6as%3D)

It's official, Fellow Patriot.

Yesterday, I filed to run for Attorney General at the Republican Party of Texas's Austin office.

I could serve the 21st Congressional District of Texas for a lifetime and be professionally fulfilled. **But representatives should not be permanent.**

_It's time for a change._

I am ready to come home to Texas. I want to take my experience in Congress as a federal prosecutor and First Assistant Attorney General to fight for Texas.

But I cannot do this alone, Fellow Patriot. It doesn't need to be a big donation - **[even just $5 will help us continue this movement.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=010df5cca5ec4e82907344f4a0920af9&_e=EuipyPzczZwjjLf7nd3kVfABogCPoF5LFpOSiJSKbxVD-lX55iLRQ1bpoomw0JDj6uaWFeeg_ztwCSDUEzO1EsGZwAJRL30KMuTJuk-eLj2bXWeR2Fk7piwnobliD1HJKo4MRyB1uKchsFusqcRpIxA8RLySNTgak-xxlUT4VARBCIp69biJy1yKEzoAtHHjKHLy20Wcqrnv9NiVY6m_xvKRh1zUNJzb5LAY-K8oepbgDlGxMNL8VYcpn1XivBifAcX86a_kZu9ocGdyWdkbNH8EdHX1S2xZWzxiEKUDrfOq3PtXOcEu7akONsLslpVb_Eh-V738zAbjCFfUpJ-jdrGDsY6J6DvrYOx_gsq4grByx9DADBX_f_91xflLQtnT0lq_ypz5Vm41SRyqMMKcpKGzjON-ofvkZ37FK-DhXz4cI-JN7_g63hYiCdGJiq9ZVmznvJWBkVuv2G4Z214OL8GWF6eCpu1jaGBkmgiyrX3LQmDA97d6krdzd48yHN8FU4uQhmVPBJc9PS_mDHEJYH7POPlSRq_OxGizcnPcAyaBWLGhwqEUopmsiXb9FPoYqCA9WFfHhaa69MKUYx2Vdkfto3a-wUsKJkMT2ick95V9zHACzJuy2RD7kH7D16t3otUvk86N64_u2i4CIpTfu_szVWZPbxbarJrY_TBooy4%3D)**

That's why I am looking for another 28 patriots to step up from your area in the next 30 minutes.

_**Will you be one of the folks we need?**_

**[I hope you will join our team for freedom and fiscal responsibility.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=010df5cca5ec4e82907344f4a0920af9&_e=EuipyPzczZwjjLf7nd3kVfABogCPoF5LFpOSiJSKbxVD-lX55iLRQ1bpoomw0JDj6uaWFeeg_ztwCSDUEzO1EsGZwAJRL30KMuTJuk-eLj2bXWeR2Fk7piwnobliD1HJKo4MRyB1uKchsFusqcRpIxA8RLySNTgak-xxlUT4VARBCIp69biJy1yKEzoAtHHjKHLy20Wcqrnv9NiVY6m_xvKRh1zUNJzb5LAY-K8oepY2g-EebZWGhHHchlYEuGJG6wuq7a4c_aVCp9zAYpT3K9-0X41i0L8V4LN6EznV7hLy59CS9DRAKoVncLtzSDKX5gjE_Wl6N9sN2efdDiTQRRBLapgERP_2nNfJPcygI9rvmv-yqtnXjj7jGoqD7bbnN4xJXnZzplKLJy9TX-cTb1TK-E7THZQOmdb0Udi6yN9O4ro-dQIr4G-QbuYXL8TF9ayiXn3rtOsXvdyOceWPx-IGRjmpmfCYricUWthDddAUlQs8JmHkJRWjQZLtPt_v2WNcVKN5jIn82eytGGW8rD7i0nbRf-JIOrwnCIV7qk7U3G2R3YEpDkaOKGYuJuwwxHxi-t6lSdL4bCDt5kwg4PvHEyMcYhj5ihnIOjxEqoZj0D8-83LCe1zL2Tgmdc2ZJ0hFzU0AIDgW6M6DtzutSW7rg8rjtBhQPzeQwVRNPNs%3D)** Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination. Let's ensure our legacy endures.

Thanks,

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=010df5cca5ec4e82907344f4a0920af9&_e=EuipyPzczZwjjLf7nd3kVfABogCPoF5LFpOSiJSKbxVD-lX55iLRQ1bpoomw0JDj6uaWFeeg_ztwCSDUEzO1EsGZwAJRL30KMuTJuk-eLj2bXWeR2Fk7piwnobliD1HJKo4MRyB1uKchsFusqcRpIxA8RLySNTgak-xxlUT4VARBCIp69biJy1yKEzoAtHHjKHLy20Wcqrnv9NiVY6m_xvKRh1zUNJzb5LAY-K8oepYs8GITk6dNaGhm1RpvIfhBadvGaCIPJntwVvcAF2IkgX57hHxfnpCI_j4PhKAjcCaZaWfNhi3j7aycg5BnXbUf5iZhs1dIFjlo_LWWtS2NQuCPhab9SEwtnUGQ_e-s1LSlod-MHNvzmbIUgj6oW_CjLyad5TmWrYCxFqZB82IBATKCMmF4IKbYrxQ5PxwpBXgmYm-d_x5v8Po_IiTxgw5K0_dlAdDsiTwthglc_PolJAuEGATqYdvz0gTjBCAVWGHhNA8yBoeONl8sjbtFqqawsTkiqoD7WI-c1VwwnDQ0i1g_wkJpq-lQx-V5jUImu28WT8jqnRvBy3MtkDzU5M_qkfqeyKMjUDIb6GmvohuW7nfnJIwX7ZVOAa6luzrCQf4s-Juyay5qqAz2Otq4J8w4hOqRmRLumB0fTWAoZbnlPUj7YydlYOzxFrlPDwhGNys%3D)

subject: Here's to a Happy and Hopeful New Year! Thank you Volunteers!
body:
Thank you volunteers, new endorsements, Caucus/Assembly trainings, Donate before January 1st so it's counted before Caucus/Assembly

| | **Thank you, Volunteers!**
Hi Everyone,
Thank you to all of the volunteers on the campaign including: Thatcher, Nadia, Aunt Tam, Ceil, Andrea, Muka, Newlin, David G, Barb, Kathy, Warren, Glenn, Adam, Krissy, Amanda, Kalyn, Rhonda, Patti, Mary Ellen, Beatrice, Maria, Laura B., Naomi, Crystal, Cassie, Zariah, Jack, Layla, Milo, Wiske, Ira, Ed, Ashley, Emily G., Emily S., Cara, Ben, Eric, BJ, Haley, Keith, Jake, Lexi, Kathleen, Lennon, Jess, Steven, Mikayla, Mikaela.Baloo the Dog and Scarlett the Cat
This is truly a grassroots campaign.
Thank you to everyone who signed up to volunteer but hasnt been able to volunteer yet! There will be lots to do in the new year, including postcards, phone banking, and door knocking by popular request.
**Caucus and Assembly Are Extremely Important and I need Your Help!**

_I am getting on the primary ballot through Caucus and Assembly so I need at least 30% of the vote in March._
**Please**[**donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=826c708a3e&e=738470dca6)**to the campaign before January 1st, 2026.** It’s the last FEC filing before Caucus/Assembly and people care a lot about how much we raise. It helps voters decide who to support. Anything helps. If you were planning to donate in the new year, donate now.
[**Donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=5e7bfe2e6d&e=738470dca6)
**We will have weekly EPCO Dem Caucus and Assembly trainings in January and February so you’re prepared for Caucus and Assembly in March, 2026:** You will learn about Caucus and Assembly, what you will be doing at Caucus and Assembly, how to check your precinct, the date/time for Caucus based on your precinct, & how you can support me at Caucus and Assembly.
_Please share the times and dates that work for you and whether you prefer to train in person or online!_
_This is super important, we will work around your schedule._
**We have two new endorsements from community leaders Makayla Hollifield, current Miss Black Colorado, and****Dr. Angelica Givler, award winning educator and union member:**
****

Our first campaign video is getting lots of buzz!
Share it on your social media:[TikTok](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=774cc2cf3b&e=738470dca6)[Instagram](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=f89b7c3e83&e=738470dca6)[Facebook](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=b3341dd87a&e=738470dca6)[Youtube](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=3e55be8012&e=738470dca6)
Thank you for your help in electing me to U.S. Congress.We can have representation in El Paso County, CO that puts people first!
Here’s to a happy New Year, that brings about hope and positive change for all of us.
With love,Zuri Horowitz
[**Donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=7916779cce&e=738470dca6) to this campaign and support our fight for a better more joyful future.
**Caucus & Assembly Info:****Caucus & Assembly for the Democratic Party \- Let me know if you will support me at Caucus/Assembly. **
This is how I get on the June primary ballot and I need your help.
(Just take it step by step. It is a confusing process. Democracy takes work but it is worth it. Please ask questions).
**There’s two parts:** First there’s Caucus and then there’s Assembly.
**At Caucus:** You must go to Caucus to choose delegates for Assembly. It’s even better if you can become a delegate for Assembly.
**At Assembly:** Delegates vote on whether Candidates will get on the primary ballot in June.
_I need 30% of the delegate votes at Assembly to get on the primary ballot in June._
**Do you Qualify for Caucus & Assembly in El Paso County?**
* You must be registered to vote and affiliated as a Democrat at least 22 days prior to Caucus in El Paso County in order to participate. Check your registration [here](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=4cecc15467&e=738470dca6).
* If you turn 18 within those 22 days, then you can still participate in Caucus/Assembly. You can preregister to vote if you’re under 18.

I would suggest affiliating sooner so you have time to problem solve in case of snafus.
**This is the Congressional District 5 map, if you live within in these red dots you can become a delegate for me and vote for me at Caucus/Assembly:**

**Important Dates for Caucus & Assembly:**
**February 1, 2026:** Affiliate as a Democrat: Register to vote/update registration [here](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=1ece49d310&e=738470dca6).
Let me know if you have any problems. You can unaffiliate after Caucus/Assembly.
**March 3-5th, 2026:** El Paso County Caucus _Locations/Dates may change. Tentative locations noted below._
You will only go to caucus for one day and your location is based on the precinct. Check you precinct and caucus location [here](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=9ad6b10dc9&e=738470dca6).
You can participate in person or remotely.
If you’re going in person, you can just show up, as long as you’re a registered Democrat in the correct precinct.
If you need to be remote, let the party know between 30-15 days prior to caucus.
**At Caucus:** People become precinct organizers, there are straw polls for elections with primaries, people become **Delegates at Assembly** eg the people who ultimately decide who gets on the primary ballot, (reminder I need 30% of delegates to vote for me), platform resolutions for the state.

**March 5th, 2026****Sierra High School - HD 17 -Confirmed** 5:30pm- 169 182 185 194 199 619 620 623 6246:30pm- 601 605 609 610 612 613 622 625 627 6317:30pm- 137 187 193 196 611 614 615 616 621 626
**Coronado High School - HD 18 - Confirmed** 5:00pm- 89 105 106 107 111 117 176 189 471 744 745 7466:00pm- 87 109 114 133 177 603 727 729 740 742 7437:00pm- 93 110 112 113 115 118 119 604 721 724 7308:00pm- 108 602 606 720 722 723 725 726 728 745 839
**Welte Big Picture High School (Education Center)- HD 21 and HD 15 Aux -Confirmed** 5:30pm- 634 635 644 645 652 800 801 802 805 807 8296:30pm- 633 636 637 643 646 648 650 651 656 657 803 808 809 810 8207:30pm- 630 632 638 639 640 641 642 654 655 804 806
**March 14th, 2026: District/County Assembly****Location:** Wasson High School, tentative**Assembly:** Delegates vote on the candidates that go on the June primary ballot. I need 30% to get on the primary ballot in June. There’s also a presentation of platform resolutions and election of delegates for the State Assembly.
You can participate in Caucus & Assembly in person or remotely.
No need to register if you’re attending in person.
Notify the party 15-30 days ahead if you need to participate remotely in Caucus & Assembly.
Let me know if you have any questions. I will update with more information as it becomes available and will have short trainings if people have questions about Caucus & Assembly.
Sign up for my email list using the contact form to stay up to date on my campaign and Caucus & Assembly 2026.

clean_body: Thank you volunteers, new endorsements, Caucus/Assembly trainings, Donate before January 1st so it's counted before Caucus/Assembly | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Volunteers! Hi Everyone, Thank you to all of the volunteers on the campaign including: Thatcher, Nadia, Aunt Tam, Ceil, Andrea, Muka, Newlin, David G, Barb, Kathy, Warren, Glenn, Adam, Krissy, Amanda, Kalyn, Rhonda, Patti, Mary Ellen, Beatrice, Maria, Laura B., Naomi, Crystal, Cassie, Zariah, Jack, Layla, Milo, Wiske, Ira, Ed, Ashley, Emily G., Emily S., Cara, Ben, Eric, BJ, Haley, Keith, Jake, Lexi, Kathleen, Lennon, Jess, Steven, Mikayla, Mikaela.Baloo the Dog and Scarlett the Cat This is truly a grassroots campaign. Thank you to everyone who signed up to volunteer but hasnt been able to volunteer yet! There will be lots to do in the new year, including postcards, phone banking, and door knocking by popular request. Caucus and Assembly Are Extremely Important and I need Your Help! I am getting on the primary ballot through Caucus and Assembly so I need at least 30% of the vote in March. Please the campaign before January 1st, 2026. It’s the last FEC filing before Caucus/Assembly and people care a lot about how much we raise. It helps voters decide who to support. Anything helps. If you were planning to donate in the new year, donate now. We will have weekly EPCO Dem Caucus and Assembly trainings in January and February so you’re prepared for Caucus and Assembly in March, 2026: You will learn about Caucus and Assembly, what you will be doing at Caucus and Assembly, how to check your precinct, the date/time for Caucus based on your precinct, & how you can support me at Caucus and Assembly. Please share the times and dates that work for you and whether you prefer to train in person or online! This is super important, we will work around your schedule. We have two new endorsements from community leaders Makayla Hollifield, current Miss Black Colorado, andDr. Angelica Givler, award winning educator and union member: ** Our first campaign video is getting lots of buzz! Share it on your social media: Thank you for your help in electing me to U.S. Congress.We can have representation in El Paso County, CO that puts people first! Here’s to a happy New Year, that brings about hope and positive change for all of us. With love,Zuri Horowitz to this campaign and support our fight for a better more joyful future. Caucus & Assembly Info:**Caucus & Assembly for the Democratic Party \- Let me know if you will support me at Caucus/Assembly. This is how I get on the June primary ballot and I need your help. (Just take it step by step. It is a confusing process. Democracy takes work but it is worth it. Please ask questions). There’s two parts: First there’s Caucus and then there’s Assembly. At Caucus: You must go to Caucus to choose delegates for Assembly. It’s even better if you can become a delegate for Assembly. At Assembly: Delegates vote on whether Candidates will get on the primary ballot in June. I need 30% of the delegate votes at Assembly to get on the primary ballot in June. Do you Qualify for Caucus & Assembly in El Paso County? You must be registered to vote and affiliated as a Democrat at least 22 days prior to Caucus in El Paso County in order to participate. Check your registration . If you turn 18 within those 22 days, then you can still participate in Caucus/Assembly. You can preregister to vote if you’re under 18. I would suggest affiliating sooner so you have time to problem solve in case of snafus. This is the Congressional District 5 map, if you live within in these red dots you can become a delegate for me and vote for me at Caucus/Assembly: Important Dates for Caucus & Assembly: February 1, 2026: Affiliate as a Democrat: Register to vote/update registration . Let me know if you have any problems. You can unaffiliate after Caucus/Assembly. March 3-5th, 2026: El Paso County Caucus Locations/Dates may change. Tentative locations noted below. You will only go to caucus for one day and your location is based on the precinct. Check you precinct and caucus location . You can participate in person or remotely. If you’re going in person, you can just show up, as long as you’re a registered Democrat in the correct precinct. If you need to be remote, let the party know between 30-15 days prior to caucus. At Caucus: People become precinct organizers, there are straw polls for elections with primaries, people become Delegates at Assembly eg the people who ultimately decide who gets on the primary ballot, (reminder I need 30% of delegates to vote for me), platform resolutions for the state. name: Team Kaptur
subject: Christmas is more expensive this year.
body:
MAGA's mismanagement of the economy is taking its toll on the holiday season.

| |
---
Friend, Christmas is more expensive this year. **Thanks to MAGA's mismanagement of the economy, inflation has hit everything from the food on the holiday table to the presents under the tree.** Tariffs are pushing prices higher, and working people are struggling to make ends meet. Plus, millions of people are bracing for their healthcare costs to skyrocket in the new year, after House Republicans let a critical part of the Affordable Care Act expire. **Friend, we deserve better. Marcy is fighting for a fair economy where people can get ahead, not just get by — and that has made her a top target for MAGA attacks.** It's critical that we finish this fundraising quarter strong, so that we can defend our battleground district and send one of our toughest champions for working people back to Congress. **[Right now, we're on track to fall $8,673 short with only 3 days left until our deadline. ### About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. name: Team WFP
subject: Three more days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We didn’t just stand our ground against Trump — we gained it. | | | Peter, With just a few days to go, we’re still $19,192 short of our $100,000 fundraising goal. Clearing this mark is ambitious. But 2025 has been nothing short of historic for our organization and broader movement. We didn’t just stand our ground against Trump — _we gained it._ And with so much at stake in 2026, we want to make sure we’re setting ourselves up for even more success. **[So if you’ve been waiting for the right time to give, now’s your chance: pitch in to the Working Families Party today and help continue to build a political movement to defeat MAGA and elect working class champions in 2026, 2028, and beyond.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RFUgjn8bA1-RbIC_o42grJz2wfiC0O0ePV96jWT3OvT70_6ro5LNbks_fSOMEtf9bsVjydcQVZvIGzM7m4L32zMIUQatH51dV_4qpmsnMVz4vUToeXaz8zqo1q2kxoQLvcKR7smvMQWd0p5n9Zk1UvgP1G_4JHOD7RueyQqAux1SS43g1yNDeGlmL2Ag_5IJiawes0beLkuCGNQAgWK8N5bN9Bo38bsk5FvnStJvw_XtsPQ-fhPbcD0G1eZlFYe5m8/4mt/mv2lj3v8QO6WFJ3ThAizNw/h0/h001.xAGPfWiOvwHCyP9LcsHoMj2pAMlIBsjJsWUElYho6lA)** **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9TYM2ujKOIJdCIDub-bHyeZ0r9V0YqSHsZ-a23c8_6RHhKOvdzYBxdisFSqePeRwoHUsteXA4zXR_GX8diYlTX_XjEI-AphlwMQj8J2BDczEHIQLbwKTbEcmf8tfQoieOSwUFtJhWxg1qz-xt_paTSERTwpq_5LecRJpkQ9e9IfUoVamnkBrumuVt2iCUkRD7j9qhYDaoacoVqOvjEmRg11_Az6IUGEaJmczYN2q396CUBWpm0lIkExzAqvtdohv5uZT3DzT_nf8FbTu7L4OQUnxcPiqVgPo0L1jtZ_WkAOU/4mt/mv2lj3v8QO6WFJ3ThAizNw/h1/h001.0XFyAQ9a4rXryuWogYZ-I6T7NDt2r1nbjgqA4Ckh_hU)** With the spring primaries just a few months away, we’re already recruiting new candidates, endorsing working class champions, and building the infrastructure needed to win elections all over the country. We’re also going to keep blocking Trump and MAGA every chance we get — especially as their congressional majority continues to shrink and their disastrous, unpopular policies continue to fail. clean_body: We didn’t just stand our ground against Trump — we gained it. | | | Peter, With just a few days to go, we’re still $19,192 short of our $100,000 fundraising goal. Clearing this mark is ambitious. But 2025 has been nothing short of historic for our organization and broader movement. We didn’t just stand our ground against Trump — we gained it. And with so much at stake in 2026, we want to make sure we’re setting ourselves up for even more success. With the spring primaries just a few months away, we’re already recruiting new candidates, endorsing working class champions, and building the infrastructure needed to win elections all over the country. We’re also going to keep blocking Trump and MAGA every chance we get — especially as their congressional majority continues to shrink and their disastrous, unpopular policies continue to fail. The money we raise in this final week of the year will go towards hiring organizers, training staff, mobilizing volunteers, and talking to voters about the alternative political system we’re building across the country — a political system that actually works FOR working families. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Scott Wiener
subject: The fight I'll bringing to Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott WIENER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | Peter,

There is a reason MAGA extremists are attacking me so aggressively.

It is because I have spent my career taking on hard fights and winning.

We reformed CEQA to allow more housing to be built and lower costs.

We capped insulin copays and took on prescription drug price gouging.

We protected transit from collapse.

**We defended immigrants, LGBTQ communities, and public schools.**

This is the work I am ready to bring to Congress.

And it is exactly why the attacks are escalating.

**Hundreds of supporters have already chipped in because they know how much this campaign matters. But to show we can compete with self-funded opponents and outside money, we need to post numbers on 12/31 that prove we can win.**

name: Lucy McBath
subject: Emerge turned purpose into leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Emerge is where women learn how to run, win, and serve with purpose. It’s where women find their voice, build their skills, and gain the confidence to step into leadership.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122133610/591674928/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-12-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2NTc2MGEyLTFkZTQtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e58n22AuqFh2RhhWQQG4DCylBQBo3rvCYtcGTwkb0mE=)
---
| Peter,

My journey to Congress began in tragedy, but I pushed forward with purpose. I’m Congresswoman Lucy McBath from Georgia, and Emerge helped me turn that purpose into leadership. [_**Now, as we approach the year-end deadline, I’m asking you to help Emerge open that path for more women.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122133611/591674929/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-12-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2NTc2MGEyLTFkZTQtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e58n22AuqFh2RhhWQQG4DCylBQBo3rvCYtcGTwkb0mE=)
---
| [SUPPORT EMERGE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122133612/591674930/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-12-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE2NTc2MGEyLTFkZTQtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=e58n22AuqFh2RhhWQQG4DCylBQBo3rvCYtcGTwkb0mE=)
---
When my son, Jordan, was murdered in 2012, my life changed forever. I stepped away from a 30-year career with Delta and became an advocate. No parent should have to experience what I did, and our leaders in Washington were refusing to act.

When Congress still refused to confront gun violence after the Parkland school shooting, I realized something very clearly: If the people in power won’t stand up for our families, then it’s up to women like me to step forward and lead.

That path led me to run for Congress against an NRA-backed incumbent in Newt Gingrich’s former district. I became the first Black woman to hold that Congressional seat, winning by just one percent.

Since then, I’ve passed bipartisan legislation to lower healthcare costs, protect veterans, and strengthen our gun laws. None of that would have been possible without the training and support networks Emerge builds for women candidates.

**That’s why I believe in Emerge.**

Emerge is where women learn how to run, win, and serve with purpose. It’s where women find their voice, build their skills, and gain the confidence to step into leadership.

clean_body: Emerge is where women learn how to run, win, and serve with purpose. It’s where women find their voice, build their skills, and gain the confidence to step into leadership. | = | Peter, My journey to Congress began in tragedy, but I pushed forward with purpose. I’m Congresswoman Lucy McBath from Georgia, and Emerge helped me turn that purpose into leadership. = | = When my son, Jordan, was murdered in 2012, my life changed forever. I stepped away from a 30-year career with Delta and became an advocate. No parent should have to experience what I did, and our leaders in Washington were refusing to act. When Congress still refused to confront gun violence after the Parkland school shooting, I realized something very clearly: If the people in power won’t stand up for our families, then it’s up to women like me to step forward and lead. That path led me to run for Congress against an NRA-backed incumbent in Newt Gingrich’s former district. I became the first Black woman to hold that Congressional seat, winning by just one percent. Since then, I’ve passed bipartisan legislation to lower healthcare costs, protect veterans, and strengthen our gun laws. None of that would have been possible without the training and support networks Emerge builds for women candidates. That’s why I believe in Emerge. Emerge is where women learn how to run, win, and serve with purpose. It’s where women find their voice, build their skills, and gain the confidence to step into leadership. Today, 12 other Emerge alums serve with me in Congress, and they are some of the strongest fighters we have protecting our democracy. And next year, Emerge has the chance to double that number. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Rep. Lucy McBath Emerge Alum & U.S. Representative (GA-06) = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

name: Josh Shapiro HQ
subject: 3 good reasons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
This email is going to be a little more direct than usual.

Derek, this email is going to be a little more direct than usual. With just three days to go until our biggest fundraising deadline of the year, [_**we’re asking you to pitch in $3 before midnight tonight**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122133856/591675334/-1777333754?refcode=email_122825_3reasons&amounts=3,15,25,50,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGFkYzQ5Yy0xZWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sQDk0-Lqla9M1pJ5MkWyqAvok3rvMiax9gXkBvBnoVs=) to make sure Team Shapiro kicks off the new year on the right foot. But if you’re not sure, or you need a little more context before chipping in, here are three reasons we hope will convince you:
1. **Pennsylvania is the most competitive state in the nation — bar none.** More often than not, our elections come down to just a few percentage points, Derek. That means just a handful of votes could be the difference between a government that actually delivers results — or a far-right takeover.

2. **Josh is putting money back in people’s pockets.** The Trump Administration is doing... the opposite. While the President’s reckless policies jack up the cost of groceries, health care, and everything else, the far-right is marching in lockstep behind him. Josh Shapiro on the other hand? He’s cut taxes _seven_ times, putting more money back in Pennsylvanians’ pockets.

3. **We have to close our fundraising books at the end of the year — and soon after,_everyone_ will see our numbers.** Listen, we wish money didn’t have such an outsized role in our elections. But right now, it does — and you can bet Donald Trump, JD Vance, and all their far-right allies will be looking very closely at our data. That means we can’t show any weakness. We have to prove that Team Shapiro is a force to be reckoned with.

[_**Please, if any of those reasons speak to you, will you rush $3 or whatever you can to help us hit our End-of-Year fundraising goal and keep Pennsylvania moving forward? This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for Team Shapiro, so we’re really hoping a few folks from Cresco can step up.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122133857/591675335/-1777333754?refcode=email_122825_3reasons&amounts=3,15,25,50,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGFkYzQ5Yy0xZWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sQDk0-Lqla9M1pJ5MkWyqAvok3rvMiax9gXkBvBnoVs=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122133858/591675336/-1777333754?refcode=email_122825_3reasons&amounts=3,15,25,50,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGFkYzQ5Yy0xZWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sQDk0-Lqla9M1pJ5MkWyqAvok3rvMiax9gXkBvBnoVs=)

Team Shapiro

subject: Four quarters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122134500/591677272/-2063340125?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhhNzA3My0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l78KqykUWecHIa0OazKLZB3ZpPcpVgrTwXThW2azCVI=)
I apologize for reaching out on a Sunday -- please know I don’t take your support for granted.

It’s because of folks like you telling a neighbor about this campaign, donating your time or money, that I’m in Washington fighting every day for working families.

Believe me: Asking supporters like you to donate is my least favorite part of running for Congress -- but with the stakes higher than ever before, it’s a crucial part of my re-election.

**[That’s why today, before the end-of-year fundraising deadline, I’m only asking you to chip in $1. If everyone reading this message chipped in four quarters, we would instantly hit our goal and send a message of strength.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122134502/591677278/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.28.25-all-b&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhhNzA3My0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l78KqykUWecHIa0OazKLZB3ZpPcpVgrTwXThW2azCVI=)**
| **[Donate $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122134505/591677281/-2063340125?refcode=em-12.28.25-all-b&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDhhNzA3My0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l78KqykUWecHIa0OazKLZB3ZpPcpVgrTwXThW2azCVI=)**

The midterm election year is almost upon us, and there are less than 100 days until primary Election Day in Illinois.

Right now, I’m facing multiple GOP challengers in this race. I flipped IL-13 from red to blue back in 2022, and national Republicans have been trying to flip it back ever since.

We can’t let them win.

Not when only three seats separate House control.
Not when millions of working families are living paycheck to paycheck.
Not when the GOP majority is refusing to extend affordable healthcare subsidies.

**[We expect outside spending and attacks to increase in the new year, and hitting our FEC deadline on Wednesday is key to funding the voter outreach we need to protect this seat. clean_body: | = I apologize for reaching out on a Sunday -- please know I don’t take your support for granted. It’s because of folks like you telling a neighbor about this campaign, donating your time or money, that I’m in Washington fighting every day for working families. Believe me: Asking supporters like you to donate is my least favorite part of running for Congress -- but with the stakes higher than ever before, it’s a crucial part of my re-election. = | = The midterm election year is almost upon us, and there are less than 100 days until primary Election Day in Illinois. Right now, I’m facing multiple GOP challengers in this race. I flipped IL-13 from red to blue back in 2022, and national Republicans have been trying to flip it back ever since. We can’t let them win. Not when only three seats separate House control. Not when millions of working families are living paycheck to paycheck. 1. **We have to stop the chaos.** Between the longest government shutdown in U.S. history, cuts to SNAP, and skyrocketing health care costs, Americans need a House majority that will stand up for them — not Donald Trump.
2. **This is a people-powered campaign.** Valerie is proud that her campaign is powered by people like you — folks who give what they can, when they can because they believe in Valerie’s vision for a fairer, stronger future.
3. **Valerie’s record speaks for itself.** She's been proud to stand up for our shared progressive values in Congress by advancing legislation like the ICE Badge Visibility Act, the Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act, Medicare for All, and the Block the Bombs Act.
4. **The affordability crisis is hurting hardworking Americans.** Too many families are struggling to make ends meet. Valerie is running for reelection to do what she's always done: fight for working families. But she can’t do it alone.

**With a new opponent jumping into the race, every dollar matters.** When you chip in $4, you’re helping Valerie stay competitive and helping Democrats flip the House. **[So if any of these reasons resonated with you today, chip in $4 (or whatever you can!) now to help us defend NC-04, and hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal before time runs out in just 4 days→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122134599/591677420/-1566497354?amount=4&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_122825_EOQ02_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDhhNzA3My0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t6piqjHhgACKXRmvBM_p4ktyT5pkn3C0-vS_g0gLj2g=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: When you pitch in $4 to this campaign, you’re helping Valerie stay in this fight and help fellow Democrats flip the House. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Quick question for you, Peter: = Here are 4 reasons your $4 would go a long way right now: 1. We have to stop the chaos. Between the longest government shutdown in U.S. history, cuts to SNAP, and skyrocketing health care costs, Americans need a House majority that will stand up for them — not Donald Trump. 2. This is a people-powered campaign. Valerie is proud that her campaign is powered by people like you — folks who give what they can, when they can because they believe in Valerie’s vision for a fairer, stronger future. 3. Valerie’s record speaks for itself. She's been proud to stand up for our shared progressive values in Congress by advancing legislation like the ICE Badge Visibility Act, the Dignity for Detained Immigrants Act, Medicare for All, and the Block the Bombs Act. 4. The affordability crisis is hurting hardworking Americans. Too many families are struggling to make ends meet. Valerie is running for reelection to do what she's always done: fight for working families. But she can’t do it alone. With a new opponent jumping into the race, every dollar matters. When you chip in $4, you’re helping Valerie stay competitive and helping Democrats flip the House. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. name: Team Moulton
subject: Standing up matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
EOQ is one of those moments

| |
---
Hey there, In Washington, the easiest thing to do is stay quiet. It’s easier to avoid hard fights. Easier to accept bad deals. Easier to let powerful interests keep things exactly the way they are. And too often, that’s what leadership looks like: silence, dressed up as strategy. Seth is running for Senate because silence has consequences. When leaders don’t speak up, families pay the price. Costs rise. Rights erode. Accountability disappears. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122134740/591677706/2090747700?refcode=251228_tm_eoq3_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Njk1ZmMwNy0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TtDSlb-J1nWgcWsBh-Iioifj9aaXvyrlYsNqL5UWhCQ=) Standing up takes something different. It takes a willingness to challenge the status quo. And it takes real support behind you. That’s why this end-of-quarter moment matters. EOQ is one of the clearest ways campaigns demonstrate whether there’s real strength behind their message, whether people are willing to back leadership that doesn’t wait its turn or look the other way. We’re close, but we’re not there yet. **[If you believe leadership means standing up when it matters — not staying quiet when it’s convenient — we’re asking you to help us close the gap before the quarter ends.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122134744/591677710/2090747700?refcode=251228_tm_eoq3_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Njk1ZmMwNy0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TtDSlb-J1nWgcWsBh-Iioifj9aaXvyrlYsNqL5UWhCQ=)** | [CHIP IN $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122134748/591677714/1375639745?amp;refcode=251228_tm_eoq3&amount=15&refcode=251228_tm_eoq3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Njk1ZmMwNy0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TtDSlb-J1nWgcWsBh-Iioifj9aaXvyrlYsNqL5UWhCQ=)

clean_body: EOQ is one of those moments | | Hey there, In Washington, the easiest thing to do is stay quiet. It’s easier to avoid hard fights. Easier to accept bad deals. Easier to let powerful interests keep things exactly the way they are. And too often, that’s what leadership looks like: silence, dressed up as strategy. Seth is running for Senate because silence has consequences. When leaders don’t speak up, families pay the price. Costs rise. Rights erode. Accountability disappears. = Standing up takes something different. It takes a willingness to challenge the status quo. And it takes real support behind you. That’s why this end-of-quarter moment matters. EOQ is one of the clearest ways campaigns demonstrate whether there’s real strength behind their message, whether people are willing to back leadership that doesn’t wait its turn or look the other way. We’re close, but we’re not there yet. = | = = = This is a pivotal moment. And the support we show now determines what comes next. Thank you for being part of this team, Team Moulton | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to: Seth for Massachusetts - PO Box 2013, Salem, MA, 01970 Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Republic.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2e7a535eda4a4ee5922afa3692e0d56a&_e=7b2e0u31FlCh6gJKlKoQiPWUSC4kjyiM71FjeLU-EdaUShM_3bsKVQrpzta1MAwOAjq0QYyAChoswxoimEHwvHTcT5PAeEAwyC1i3F_um5RZw9DfBfYv2JXWrFKPc3d1N6LdFTJMPPhst4nQ2vZDBVRfIznBn6_6ceWL7-qLIqht9Kz5dqSBaI38WkPPtR15OfbhDF_6jkbjnr1wkTHTh292ju2OZdloFI8idBuB1cMxUI3DpDH9E65wvvtUwiLTe_6fI7W_xUls3E6IfDlmzKGPcePDeIhRmk88sVUf0vbXIj5Z8LPrjDMS1WSC32dxYhWzMg9dyogJQZ9K7sgXWvHBq2CwPB10QCsALUxy065ocRlLGE7b5_KpHtUxIBu4Zxu-errf0bL1cxOzzHU4pIrverLRlAxAaIu3GyCb1Cc7KasmII7RLUOkFdbsi56BK-stB5qLc9_x-dfXb9Jiji2lhPWKyDliG_Qi7OKaCgrl137b94vQGEAW7klIAPvwFC2K5xvYkFFntFtrO5BOnHaXUt9ariKIV02zyaOMoxj6a4M6amDGIdBHhJE7THX06mnwZ__Y7sTjI9lgKFc25pKLtG6Cu7BticR8Wmn9hyjpUMWRo7SFahYuc5Aq5HFOFHwJMcCo-o6UO1uhEOp6d4dhXKK4UiOHw9r9zdwFeIcQwVp7-zwNV8kVIPK6jTf2SXMl_9nhcymWGfVA1f5ixHRBh_ClDdeIdSez6Ts9ThOzYAyEk05_SFFiRnhkc1nufTNb1nARM3-ym8eTFoCFpx1OCHwtk0e1sv7euH0-yibgqD7dhTyWq3Ht_Tud2_hTIU_1Sv_0dQvYbh2LiJyvqR5wxh_d_6kv4gAwmbRY3Z-OBsPWlTcCz8nw5kl4AbUsz90LFkkPzME-lVVTKIj3S8zZ1DxVLXSX5dNDn5h5h41oTFY0YeVylFtW1YGZ8STQvQbld4gyiNyHNT-BztlKGE_3Ljto_KiIpNKTIusFlextapLzB_5jgZC8jz9YN8-yCMfmK2DA2wkhLMqcuayl8i9jS9hy9NNODzQptxajuqA%3D) I have just received the intelligence that confirms it. What they are about to do will bring a permanent and devastating change to our country, and they think we are completely helpless to stop it. They are wrong. We have a plan. We have identified the weak point in their strategy, and we know exactly how to neutralize their attack before it’s too late. If we are unsuccessful, they will undo all of the progress we have made over the last year. But this is highly sensitive. I cannot, and will not, write the details of this counter-plan in an email that Big Tech can read and instantly censor. clean_body: I’m risking everything to get this private briefing to you. This is an eyes-only message about what's coming.| | | Peter, I am writing to you right now with an urgency I have rarely felt in my time in Washington. This is not a drill. This is not hyperbole. The coastal elites and the radical Left have finally executed the final stage of their plan – a plan designed to silence conservatives and fundamentally I have just received the intelligence that confirms it. What they are about to do will bring a permanent and devastating change to our country, and they think we are completely helpless to stop it. They are wrong. We have a plan. We have identified the weak point in their strategy, and we know exactly how to neutralize their attack before it’s too late. If we are unsuccessful, they will undo all of the progress we have made over the last year. But this is highly sensitive. I cannot, and will not, write the details of this counter-plan in an email that Big Tech can read and instantly censor. This message is for your eyes only. If you are reading this, you are part of the solution. You need to know the entire, unvarnished truth about what they are planning – and how you are the key to our defense. | | The whole country is counting on you to read this now. — Ted Cruz U.S. Senator (R-TX) Paid for by Whatley for Senate

name: Voter Action Project Registration Team
subject: A long way to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Our voter registration and mobilization work for the 2026 midterm elections may have started a while ago, folks, but there is a long way to go to accomplish our goal of increasing voter participation in our elections.
Help keep the momentum going by fueling our registration and mobilization work with $24 or whatever you can afford to give right now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122825_2&amount=24]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team,
We kicked off our end-of-year voter registration campaign at the beginning of December simply because we have no time to waste to make every voice heard in our elections. If "voter registration campaign" was all you needed to hear to support our work, you can click right here and skip the rest of this message [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122825_2&amount=24] .
If you're a long-time supporter of ours you've likely heard this a lot, but -- it only costs us about $3 to register a voter. That means for every $15 we raise, five new voters could be added to the rolls ahead of the midterm elections. Defenders of voting rights have shown up strongly at the polls in 2025 but with recent voter suppression bills defining who gets to vote and how, we have to do everything we can to make sure we get as many pro-democracy voters filling out a ballot next year as possible.
Remember, we're a 100% grassroots-funded organization. We don't have any millionaires bankrolling us from the shadows. Everything we've done to defend voting rights has come from our supporters getting these emails and trusting us to get the job done. We're grateful for your support -- but we've got to call on you again as we ramp up for next year.
Team: Fuel our voter registration efforts with $24 or whatever you can today. Every dollar goes towards registering voters and protecting your right to vote >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122825_2&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122825_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122825_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122825_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122825_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=122825_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122825_2&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last decade.
These 2026 midterm races will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories of the recent past or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=122825_2&amount=24]
We hope you'll continue to stand with us -- not just this week, but to the next election and beyond.
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122825_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122825_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=AzjdtGpbowfpBxE8S1fl5XmIp%2Bc0vXQZwmTEyLUqU9AelCZ58NZR3UJeQsbvz%2BwgwgTriMCYgl%2Fdu%2FbDN1OhiLpXes6DKdsihuN2fwf6v1WhQB58nVrQ2n9ymeISeqOOHiVBc8SEC66BEtZsYS9aplOaGryMZjVHDte5VVgtBPhLNK32CuykCnWiI5u0drphNPNRacKBmd2gD%2FNr5GiTGTd52W5%2FwoF2%2Bv8FRg2FT4z6eHuO%2BMAJ4lmCZjT3b7Vv9JAArIPWwRJCzhKMAtttZ56GPLaReTPngq5Q%2Fx1%2BsnlhfWxHsewwx2YQfQWdlUgEAydGqSYQrswdmgtN4IkbAgJT7V9VXWQgD50%2B1OuziidHKDgYn8KnTtfz5LbNIztgLQKLTeXEB4YH0LQ25oOLdjmhgWIneJRU9yH3a0Tap14%3D .

subject: A quick note about George Whitesides
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122135171/591679002/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTI1NDhjMy0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eBbiYEdFD8lffKukR43vmp1HCz-rTCf8wGLxCnEScsM=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122135173/591679007/148511826?refcode=em-12.28.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTI1NDhjMy0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eBbiYEdFD8lffKukR43vmp1HCz-rTCf8wGLxCnEScsM=)

Hi Peter, it’s Adam Schiff.

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122135174/591679009/148511826?refcode=em-12.28.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTI1NDhjMy0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eBbiYEdFD8lffKukR43vmp1HCz-rTCf8wGLxCnEScsM=)** to support George Whitesides. But first, I want to explain why I’m reaching out today.

George didn’t just win a tough race in CA-27 and flip this seat. He showed that voters will choose seriousness and integrity over chaos when given the chance. Now that he’s in Congress, George is doing exactly what he promised: standing up for working families, pushing back against dysfunction, and refusing to accept politics as usual.

That’s precisely why national Republicans are already targeting him. With new district lines in place and control of the House once again up for grabs, we can’t let CA-27 fall back into GOP hands.

What happens in George’s race will help determine who controls the House next year. Republicans know that flipping seats like CA-27 is their clearest path back to power, and they are already preparing to spend heavily to make that happen.

I’ve seen this pattern before: When someone threatens the Republican grip on power, the attacks come quickly and the outside spending follows. The only way to counter that is with early, sustained grassroots support.

[**If you’re able, please consider chipping in $3 today to help George defend this seat and continue fighting for California values in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122135175/591679010/148511826?refcode=em-12.28.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTI1NDhjMy0xZmU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eBbiYEdFD8lffKukR43vmp1HCz-rTCf8wGLxCnEScsM=)

clean_body: | = = Hi Peter, it’s Adam Schiff. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = to support George Whitesides. But first, I want to explain why I’m reaching out today. George didn’t just win a tough race in CA-27 and flip this seat. He showed that voters will choose seriousness and integrity over chaos when given the chance. Now that he’s in Congress, George is doing exactly what he promised: standing up for working families, pushing back against dysfunction, and refusing to accept politics as usual. That’s precisely why national Republicans are already targeting him. With new district lines in place and control of the House once again up for grabs, we can’t let CA-27 fall back into GOP hands. What happens in George’s race will help determine who controls the House next year. Republicans know that flipping seats like CA-27 is their clearest path back to power, and they are already preparing to spend heavily to make that happen. I’ve seen this pattern before: When someone threatens the Republican grip on power, the attacks come quickly and the outside spending follows. The only way to counter that is with early, sustained grassroots support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** I appreciate you taking the time to read this and for standing with candidates like George who put country over politics, and fight every day for our democracy. name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: The climate can’t wait—neither can we
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=RN3jB9Zaavh/7WhJ5yRCmWOYVioqFaYxuNSR83hbGDq8tKobq+I9gVwNZaIqTrkSTYzxaIB4fSFX06GSVLxrQbzdgkqEoCtd8HVS7mWDgSFy8D1gttip2sD2dOf45oE1 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=RN3jB9Zaavh/7WhJ5yRCmWOYVioqFaYxuNSR83hbGDq8tKobq+I9gVwNZaIqTrkSTYzxaIB4fSFX06GSVLxrQbzdgkqEoCtd8HVS7mWDgSFy8D1gttip2sD2dOf45oE1]
Dear Peter,
I hope you are having a wonderful holiday season so far. I’m interrupting your break today to remind you that while the rest of the world seems to be on pause now, the climate crisis is not — and neither is OLCV.
Because of our supporters like you, this past year we:
* Pushed legislators to act on climate through lobbying, advocacy days, and emails to lawmakers;
* Demanded accountability from lawmakers on their climate inaction;
* And exceeded our 2025 member action goal by over 4,000!
None of this happened by accident. It happened because people like you chose action over silence, and making a gift to OLCV today is what gets it started [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2] .
Right now, we’re facing a critical moment. The decisions made in the coming months will shape our climate future for decades. To meet this challenge, we need to enter the new year strong — and that depends on your support today.
Will you make a generous end-of-year gift of $50 or $100 to OLCV before midnight on December 31st? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2] Your contribution fuels organizing, advocacy, and rapid response, at a time when our climate is under threat. With Trump in the White House, what we can accomplish at the state level is increasingly vital for ensuring a sustainable and livable future for all.
Make a gift [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=RN3jB9Zaavh/7WhJ5yRCmWOYVioqFaYxuNSR83hbGDq8tKobq+I9gVwNZaIqTrkSTYzxaIB4fSFX06GSVLxrQbzdgkqEoCtd8HVS7mWDgSFy8D1gttip2sD2dOf45oE1]
Every dollar you give today helps us push harder and have a greater impact for a livable future. No matter what you’re able to give, your gift matters. It’s an investment in clean energy, environmental justice, and hope.
Thank you for standing with us this year. Together, we’re building a future where people and the planet come first.
With determination,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Lindsey%20Scholte%20signature-page-001%20%281%29.jpg]
Lindsey Scholten (she/her)
OLCV Executive Director
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: A personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I want to reach out today to thank you for your tremendous support for House Democrats.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122135904/591680881/387763960?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.28_Hakeem-Jeffries-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWY1N2Q4OC0yMWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8XJYA7f7PAQYXPGbDwB7mVfh50fxNzlnrB65OrijW4=) I want to reach out today to thank you for your tremendous support for House Democrats. It would mean a great deal if you could take the time to read this entire message.

**Together, we are building a grassroots movement that will pave the way for a historic victory next year.**

All across the country, supporters like you are chipping in to fight back against extreme MAGA Republicans. So many of you are making donations, volunteering your time and spreading our winning message to your friends and neighbors.

I’m proud that our movement includes:

– Veterans dedicated to protecting our freedoms

– Union members fighting for good-paying jobs

– Parents and grandparents who want a better future for their loved ones

[**_I’m reaching out to our strongest supporters to personally ask you to split a $10 gift between Maggie Hassan and the DCCC to keep us on track to reclaim the House and elect Democrats across the country. I know we have what it takes to win. We can’t do it without your continued support >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122135906/591680885/387763960?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.28_Hakeem-Jeffries-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWY1N2Q4OC0yMWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8XJYA7f7PAQYXPGbDwB7mVfh50fxNzlnrB65OrijW4=)

**House Democrats are working hard to lower the high cost of living, fix our broken healthcare system and clean up Republican corruption. We will get it done with your help.**

We are at a pivotal moment in our nation’s history.

Instead of meeting the needs of everyday Americans, Donald Trump and the GOP are prioritizing tax breaks for billionaires, slashing healthcare and ripping food from the mouths of children.

Their behavior is despicable.

We cannot let Republicans get away with this betrayal of the American people.

That is why we must flip the three seats we need to reclaim the House majority and end this national nightmare once and for all.

This election is going to be extremely competitive and incredibly expensive, and we cannot win without you by our side.

[**_It would mean so much to me if you’d split a donation between Maggie Hassan and the DCCC to help reclaim the House majority, defend our democracy from Republican extremists and put a much-needed check on Donald Trump >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122135910/591680887/387763960?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.28_Hakeem-Jeffries-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWY1N2Q4OC0yMWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8XJYA7f7PAQYXPGbDwB7mVfh50fxNzlnrB65OrijW4=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to DCCC and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ ******** | | ****[ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122135912/591680892/387763960?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.12.28_Hakeem-Jeffries-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWY1N2Q4OC0yMWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G8XJYA7f7PAQYXPGbDwB7mVfh50fxNzlnrB65OrijW4=)****

clean_body: I want to reach out today to thank you for your tremendous support for House Democrats. = I want to reach out today to thank you for your tremendous support for House Democrats. It would mean a great deal if you could take the time to read this entire message. Together, we are building a grassroots movement that will pave the way for a historic victory next year. All across the country, supporters like you are chipping in to fight back against extreme MAGA Republicans. So many of you are making donations, volunteering your time and spreading our winning message to your friends and neighbors. I’m proud that our movement includes: – Veterans dedicated to protecting our freedoms – Union members fighting for good-paying jobs – Parents and grandparents who want a better future for their loved ones = House Democrats are working hard to lower the high cost of living, fix our broken healthcare system and clean up Republican corruption. We will get it done with your help. We are at a pivotal moment in our nation’s history. Instead of meeting the needs of everyday Americans, Donald Trump and the GOP are prioritizing tax breaks for billionaires, slashing healthcare and ripping food from the mouths of children. Their behavior is despicable. We cannot let Republicans get away with this betrayal of the American people. That is why we must flip the three seats we need to reclaim the House majority and end this national nightmare once and for all. This election is going to be extremely competitive and incredibly expensive, and we cannot win without you by our side. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to DCCC and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: ****** | | = | = | = | = | = | = Keep the faith, Hakeem If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. | Before anything else, I want to say thank you. You’re the reason this grassroots campaign is as strong as it is, and I never take that for granted.

I know your inbox is full — so the fact that you choose to open my emails truly means something.

There’s a lot at stake. Republican megadonors are flooding key districts with cash, and their committees are sitting on massive war chests. Their strategy is simple: Overwhelm us with dark money so they can push a dangerous agenda that doesn’t reflect the values of West Michigan.

We don’t have the luxury of matching their billionaire networks. What we do have is a powerful community of people who believe in honesty, decency, and a government that works for families.

If we want to keep this seat blue and protect our House majority, we have to show we’re ready to fight back together.

name: Laura Gillen
subject: Looking ahead to the new year
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
I refuse to let them take this seat back, but I cannot do that without real momentum going into the new year.

---
| Peter,

I am already looking ahead to 2026 because the truth is simple: **if we do not hold this seat, Democrats cannot take back the House.**

This district was decided by just **2 points** last cycle. Anthony D’Esposito is eying another run and national Republicans are raising staggering sums of money. They believe flipping this seat is their fastest path to holding their majority.

name: Joe Males for Congress
subject: Welcome to the team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOE MALES FOR CA
body:
I'm glad you made it!
|
---
Peter,

**I just got the notification that you made the best decision of the week --joining my team to send a Hispanic Marine Veteran to the United States Congress!**

I'm not asking for anything in this email other than your promise to have my back when I need it most. Nancy Pelosi, Gavin Newsom, and Adam Schiff are building massive coalitions against my campaign - they'll do ANYTHING to keep a Hispanic Californian Republican out of Congress.

_2026 is the year that we fix what is broken in California and make it RED, but I 'll need your help to get it done._

I'm looking forward to getting to know you better!

Keep in touch,
Joe Males for Congress

|

Meet Joe Males:

**Joe Males is a Marine Veteran, small business-owner, city council member, and most importantly, a father. Throughout his life, he has put service to his community at the forefront of his life 's mission.

Shortly after turning 18, Joe enlisted in the Marine Corps. He attended boot camp in Camp Pendleton and later served overseas in the Philippines and Guam. After being discharged as a Sergeant, Joe remained committed to supporting his fellow veterans. He took on leadership roles in his local Elks Lodge and American Legion post, working to ensure veterans in the community had the resources and support they deserved.

Following his time in the Marine Corps, Joe carried his strong work ethic and discipline into the field of computer networking services. He started in an entry-level position, worked his way through multiple leadership roles, and in 1996, he built his own business from the ground up. Joe knows firsthand the hard work and sacrifice of this journey, and he's determined to make it easier for hardworking Americans to do the same.

Joe's entry into politics was deeply personal. After his son, a Marine who followed in his footsteps, was tragically murdered back home, Joe vowed that no parent should have to endure such a loss. Determined to take a stand for public safety and the rule of law, he ran for Hemet City Council to help ensure no other family would experience the same tragedy.

During his tenure on the City Council, Joe has led numerous initiatives to improve infrastructure, drive business growth, and keep neighborhoods safe and clean. He takes pride in his ability to collaborate with fellow council members and get results, even when facing different perspectives. Joe is committed to bringing this same results-driven approach to Washington D.C., to ensure the voices of the American people are heard and their needs are met. **

---

PAID FOR BY JOE MALES FOR CA
---
Copyright (C) 2025 Joe Males for CA, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you are interested in updates from Joe Males for CA.

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore?
