Combat election fraud ahead of the midterms. Dismantle the Deep State. Defeat the radical Left's violent, socialist ideology. We cannot let the radical Left destroy the victories we've achieved. We must continue to push forward and advance the principles that make America great. Please make your year-end gift before the December 31 deadline using the secure link below. Your gift today will be matched up to $500,000 thanks to a special matching gift. Don't let your country down. Act now to save America. Best, Virginia Haggerty Assistant Director, Membership P.S. Don 't miss the year-end deadline. Help defeat the radical Left and save the American Dream by making your year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation here: The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

name: Lucero for Congress
subject: Lucero for Congress - Thank you for joining the campaign
body:
Hi Peter ,
Thanks for joining the Rob Lucero for Congress campaign. Rob is a "Kennedy Democrat" because he honors the tradition of John F. Kennedy and Robert F. Kennedy.
John F. and Robert F. Kennedy, along with Martin Luther King, represented an orientation toward peace. Once they were assassinated, the country was immediately plunged into the Vietnam War - an unjust and unnecessary war. And it was the first of many.
Rob is putting his neck on the line because it's finally time to put a stop to these endless wars.
It means challenging the power of some of the richest and most powerful people in the world - the defense contractors, the Wall Street speculators, and the "old money" banking families who made their fortunes in the opium trade and the slave trade of the 1800s.
Rob is part of a coalition that includes tens of thousands of state and local elected officials who support H.R.5356 - the $5 Trillion National Infrastructure Bank Act.
You can [sign our petition](https://www.luceroforcongress.com/national_infrastructure_bank_petition) calling on Congress to enact H.R.5356 and immediately help to bring pressure on our politicians.
We'll be sending you periodic updates from the campaign to help you learn more about this world-changing legislation and what Rob is doing.
Please feel free to reach out to us at: info@lucerofrocongress.com
Best regards,
Lucero for Congress

clean_body: But I promise you this email is different. | Peter, You're probably getting lots of fundraising emails. Believe it or not, I get them too! In fact, Senate Republicans recently OUTRAISED Senate Democrats, so I'm not going to give you a sky-is-falling fundraising pitch. Senate Majority Leader, I'm focused on the ONE and ONLY thing that wins elections: So, my priority right now is fixing the fact that our party's voter file isLAGGING behind the Democrats'. Look, we can be winning in the polls (we are), we can be winning by passing President Trump's agenda in the Senate and HOLDING THE LINE against Schumer's Shutdown (we are), and we can be winning in popularity over the Democrats (we absolutely are)... ...But unless we have a 100% verified voter file, we'll lose everything to the Democrats, We need to MATCH that energy and determination. We can't let Democrats take back the reins of the Senate for the second half of the Trump-Vance presidency. Thank you, Senator John Thune If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. body:
Can you support our work before the end-of-year deadline?
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251228-1&t=1&akid=2986%2E587540%2EGnbWgt)
Peter, I’m Audrey, the Fundraising Director here at Leaders We Deserve.
I wanted to give you a transparent update about our progress toward our goal:
We’re a few thousand donors away from reaching our 250,000 individual contributors goal. **[Will you step up and make your first contribution of just $1 now to help us close the gap?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3954?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251228_1_goalupdate.8jvKMS&refcode=em20251228-2986&t=3&akid=2986%2E587540%2EGnbWgt)**
This goal isn’t arbitrary, Peter. We NEED to finish this year strong and start 2026 in the best position possible. It’s the only way we’ll fulfill our mission and elect the inspiring young Democrats we’re endorsing in the midterm elections.
We don’t take corporate PAC money, and neither do our candidates. That means that we rely on grassroots support from people like you who believe in this fight.
**[Peter, please pitch in $5 now before the FEC end-of-year deadline.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251228_1_goalupdate.cFfiv3&refcode=em20251228-2986&amount=5&t=4&akid=2986%2E587540%2EGnbWgt)**

Audrey Ryan

Leaders We Deserve

subject: what Trump DOESN’T WANT you to see…

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=3&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy) Listen – this is the FINAL TIME we are reaching out to you about ABOLISHING the outdated Electoral College.

We keep asking to get your signature on our viral petition, **_but you don’t seem to care??_**

[**REMEMBER:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=4&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy) Top Democrats like Elizabeth Warren have been tirelessly advocating for Congress to ABOLISH the Electoral College if we want to stop Republicans from stealing all future elections.

[**You are the only Democrat from your city who has yet to respond, so we’re re-opening our petition JUST FOR YOU!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=5&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy)

Please: Our viral petition to ABOLISH the Electoral College is ONLY OPEN for 10 MORE HOURS.

[**Don’t miss your FINAL chance to join thousands of other Democrats in our mission to save democracy →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=6&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy) [ **10 HOURS LEFT: Add your name to our VIRAL petition URGING Congress to ABOLISH the Electoral College once and for all!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=7&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy) | [ADD MY NAME →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=8&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy)
---
Thank you,

Fight for Reform

—- FORWARDED MESSAGE —-

**BREAKING via _NBC_ :** "Trump just realigned the entire political map. Democrats have 'no easy path' to fix it."
[**Elizabeth Warren is calling for an END to the Electoral College now. Without 125,OOO signatures, ****we won 't be able to show Democrats in Congress there's a critical mass. Please sign the petition now:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=9&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=10&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy)
---
This petition is registered to you only.

Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

_Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million. But the Electoral College overruled her popular vote victory._

**Now, Sen. Elizabeth Warren is urgently pleading with Democrats:**
We couldn't agree more. But now that Trump is in office, he and his Republican cronies will do everything in their power to uphold the Electoral College.

**So we need to act now -- because we must prevent unpopular, unqualified candidates from EVER becoming President again.**

[**_If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=11&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy)
[SIGN NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71286?t=12&akid=23769%2E4449941%2ECtQudy)
---
Thank you,

_Fight for Reform_

name: Haley S.
subject: Tell us what’s on YOUR mind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We need 40 more responses from 18326

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11068?t=2&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10916?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation reminded me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my December Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10916?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10916?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 40 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10916?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10917?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11068?t=8&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=9&akid=1750%2E49239%2Es7L37t)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Jeff Allen, Campaign Manager [Team Cooper for NC]
subject: End-of-Quarter Update for Peter
body:
We want you to know where things stand.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=226%2E124072%2E9v9Cyk)
Peter, I’m emailing from my office because campaigns like ours can’t take weekends off when we’re only days away from major financial filing deadlines. **[(If you already know the stakes of our end-of-quarter deadline on Wednesday, consider pitching in right away.)](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3300?t=7&akid=226%2E124072%2E9v9Cyk)** I wanted to take a moment to send a brief update on where things stand as we near our final end-of-quarter filing deadline of 2025 and the year closes out:
* Our opponent claimed his campaign is directed by Donald Trump’s own campaign team — and Trump attacked Roy Cooper personally from the stage at one of his rallies. **It’s clear that this race is top of mind for the president and his allies.**
* A far-right super PAC funded by the ultra-wealthy Koch family recently dropped six figures on TV here in NC to prop up Michael Whatley. This is just the start of the onslaught of GOP cash that we know is coming our way. **It is setting the stage for this to become the most expensive U.S. Senate campaign in history.**
* We set our highest online fundraising goal yet — $1 million — ahead of this public filing deadline because we need the resources to stay competitive against this network of Republican mega-donors. **And we need to prove to our opponent and his allies that the grassroots momentum is on our side.**

With only three days remaining before the year ends, we have to file this public report, and this is where things stand, Peter. You also need to know that _we are still short of our goal._ **[This is the most competitive Senate race in the country, and to win, we need to have the resources to match our opponent’s efforts dollar for dollar. Falling short of this end-of-quarter goal would seriously limit our campaign in the coming months — we can’t let that happen. Please make a donation as soon as possible to close the gap to our goal before time runs out.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3300?t=8&akid=226%2E124072%2E9v9Cyk)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3301?t=9&akid=226%2E124072%2E9v9Cyk)
---

clean_body: We want you to know where things stand. | Peter, I’m emailing from my office because campaigns like ours can’t take weekends off when we’re only days away from major financial filing deadlines. I wanted to take a moment to send a brief update on where things stand as we near our final end-of-quarter filing deadline of 2025 and the year closes out: Our opponent claimed his campaign is directed by Donald Trump’s own campaign team — and Trump attacked Roy Cooper personally from the stage at one of his rallies. It’s clear that this race is top of mind for the president and his allies. A far-right super PAC funded by the ultra-wealthy Koch family recently dropped six figures on TV here in NC to prop up Michael Whatley. This is just the start of the onslaught of GOP cash that we know is coming our way. It is setting the stage for this to become the most expensive U.S. Senate campaign in history. We set our highest online fundraising goal yet — $1 million — ahead of this public filing deadline because we need the resources to stay competitive against this network of Republican mega-donors. And we need to prove to our opponent and his allies that the grassroots momentum is on our side. With only three days remaining before the year ends, we have to file this public report, and this is where things stand, Peter. You also need to know that we are still short of our goal. name: Luke
subject: Breaking development could shatter MAGA’s Chicago occupation
body:
The streets of Chicago feel right different now.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gVm6w57nZIQhSJky-_G71CUhEYZF2VnoSdqAbqNvKQrt_Z7AY0ACgP7gQVRcmfMEZc0s3vjOcd3gsB7UdE-y0IAK_tp_u49LkZiMhlZWVZ7YvSlVXamX5b0YT3A7Zw6MaELzyC0TnO1AkwlpDda6Y0P10nH7l3r9CcoZVPOFinjzGJVuhmK3OMCaFPEjOt-y3iiOT0QqPBqykcq-PfWWlxnOe1CvAnSh&c=J85HkBuialYmhW9aqUnH65dbPS9nMHHBS6cwnv-bhptxpJE3tnoLDw==&ch=IryhlYZsUszs4aPnJANGTQovfXt4D_KQabXjnhzxEr9GwwpPchRHoQ==)
---
|
Peter,
The streets of Chicago feel right different now.
Unmarked vans prowl at night--masked ICE agents snatching neighbors in silence. Protesters are dragged across pavement by masked federal agents whose names are hidden behind black tape. Soldiers march through city intersections meant for kids on bikes and buses to work.
At food banks across America, recently laid off workers wait in line. Families scrape together meals as grocery prices skyrocket.
Children fall asleep hungry. Seniors cut their pills in half, praying it's enough to last the week.
This is Trump's America--and it's only been 12 months.
But in November, there was a beacon of hope.
Across the country, Democrats won landslide victories. Not the kind propped up by corporate donors or political dynasties--but led by a new generation of Democrats, unfazed by Trump's fascist threats, determined to defend democracy and deliver for the people suffering most.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gVm6w57nZIQhSJky-_G71CUhEYZF2VnoSdqAbqNvKQrt_Z7AY0ACgP7gQVRcmfMEZc0s3vjOcd3gsB7UdE-y0IAK_tp_u49LkZiMhlZWVZ7YvSlVXamX5b0YT3A7Zw6MaELzyC0TnO1AkwlpDda6Y0P10nH7l3r9CcoZVPOFinjzGJVuhmK3OMCaFPEjOt-y3iiOT0QqPBqWbfcdK7hBDqIWzL9sgHtv&c=J85HkBuialYmhW9aqUnH65dbPS9nMHHBS6cwnv-bhptxpJE3tnoLDw==&ch=IryhlYZsUszs4aPnJANGTQovfXt4D_KQabXjnhzxEr9GwwpPchRHoQ==)
---
|
They came from every faith, every color, every corner of America--a generation forged in crisis but united in purpose. And together, they dominated Republicans from coast to coast, determined to rebuild this nation for the working class.
I saw that energy firsthand when I worked for Zohran Mamdani during the primary in New York City. The establishment spent millions trying to destroy our movement--but our campaign was powered by people, and we won anyway.
That same exact spirit brought me home to Chicago to work for Bushra Amiwala.
And I'm seeing it again. The same fire. The same defiance. The same hope.
Bushra's campaign isn't fueled by big donors--it's powered by neighbors, students, and working people who believe in a better future for America. While establishment campaigns write checks, Bushra is building a movement.
When ICE began terrorizing our neighbors, Bushra stood by their side even in the face of tear gas and rubber bullets. When AIPAC poured hundreds of thousands into our opponent's campaign, Bushra outraised them with grassroots donations from ordinary people. And when others paid canvassers to collect signatures, our entirely volunteer-led team hit the streets--door by door, block by block--until we got Bushra on the ballot.
This is what democracy looks like in the hands of a new generation.
Now we need to keep building. The stakes are too high to let up for even a day. Please Peter,[ will you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to send Bushra's movement from the streets of Chicago to the halls of Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gVm6w57nZIQhSJky-_G71CUhEYZF2VnoSdqAbqNvKQrt_Z7AY0ACgP7gQVRcmfME7i5VIUi0Jdwe8aBh69WgZ_1dx4jXM9kSITPcWA0GsNKjT0ZTfxgzn0kjNxCTCjmFxqu877DaJMhhvW183yz2XQX88ZJoFVBqlDXCSPadZwfF_PEtS-Nq1NQvUfERCr6Q9kgH3hnH9lruBWIRuwA4-z1r1lfVoY8VMb7wSxgVLAE=&c=J85HkBuialYmhW9aqUnH65dbPS9nMHHBS6cwnv-bhptxpJE3tnoLDw==&ch=IryhlYZsUszs4aPnJANGTQovfXt4D_KQabXjnhzxEr9GwwpPchRHoQ==)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: My meeting at the White House

name: This is dark
subject: Boebert’s new conspiracy: Minority Leader Jeffries is “Reptilian”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
We laugh at Boebert’s antics because she's a joke, but why she’s pushing this one is sinister...
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015w6TJchNrNl446CAXrSC8CD5kGEtA_gvTM90chgMk3NdfUicKX2yLCUDxaOS51YRA-gMfvq8UJt4JOG00qlvAPVLhFPT3XUTFVPTzFaPEw35qdlO41VIBYHznbbACtBFpGBNRc2dC9iDsJFvDJmeW-qMXuVspIIH50T21Ln4XLqo7BumSzF5ufNHSN1kIDm-_EdTQpfAy9T10_3DN1q1sIzQvKd7yV47Jj0IwhgFyAA=&c=_aY7TrnxZlqWKHJim-_tFfoJZXBirBDFX1q0pTP-6R44lyaOo-vM-A==&ch=bHjwqrOSx3dQ1luk4tu1hHH6iCNmkzw5xW533bQgKp-dIhPJzvH6xQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert is pushing a new conspiracy theory-- that House Speaker Hakeem Jeffries is a "reptilian."
This is based on a conspiracy pushed by Holocaust denier David Icke who posits that most Jews, and many in positions of power across the world, secretly belong to a race of reptilians that plan to eradicate humanity.
It's funny to laugh at Boebert's antics because she's a joke, however she has a dark reason for pushing this one...
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015w6TJchNrNl446CAXrSC8CD5kGEtA_gvTM90chgMk3NdfUicKX2yLCUDxaOS51YRA-gMfvq8UJt4JOG00qlvAPVLhFPT3XUTFVPTzFaPEw35qdlO41VIBYHznbbACtBFpGBNRc2dC9iDsJFvDJmeW-qMXuVspIIH50T21Ln4XLqo7BumSzF5ufNHSN1kIDm-_EdTQpfAy9T10_3DN1q1sMOaynUveX1ZxyiU6CZj2mE=&c=_aY7TrnxZlqWKHJim-_tFfoJZXBirBDFX1q0pTP-6R44lyaOo-vM-A==&ch=bHjwqrOSx3dQ1luk4tu1hHH6iCNmkzw5xW533bQgKp-dIhPJzvH6xQ==)
---
Congressman Clay Higgins is a close ally of Boebert. In 2023 when an activist asked Boebert an unfriendly question at a presser with Higgins, he went on the attack manhandling the protestor and dragging him away.

The reason why Boebert is spreading this theory is because it dehumanizes her political opponents and primes her base to accept and participate in violence committed against them.
It's the same reason why she claims that Trans people are behind a wave of mass shootings or that Ilhan Omar is a jihadi.
Democrats, LGBTQ, Muslims, and Jews are all groups she is targeting-- and she wants violence committed against them. She is pushing for it at a policy level and she is priming her base for it.
Lauren Boebert is in Congress because of a mere 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese went head to head with her, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points. Now Trisha is back to finish the job.

clean_body: We laugh at Boebert’s antics because she's a joke, but why she’s pushing this one is sinister... | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert is pushing a new conspiracy theory-- that House Speaker Hakeem Jeffries is a "reptilian." This is based on a conspiracy pushed by Holocaust denier David Icke who posits that most Jews, and many in positions of power across the world, secretly belong to a race of reptilians that plan to eradicate humanity. It's funny to laugh at Boebert's antics because she's a joke, however she has a dark reason for pushing this one... | == Congressman Clay Higgins is a close ally of Boebert. In 2023 when an activist asked Boebert an unfriendly question at a presser with Higgins, he went on the attack manhandling the protestor and dragging him away. The reason why Boebert is spreading this theory is because it dehumanizes her political opponents and primes her base to accept and participate in violence committed against them. It's the same reason why she claims that Trans people are behind a wave of mass shootings or that Ilhan Omar is a jihadi. Democrats, LGBTQ, Muslims, and Jews are all groups she is targeting-- and she wants violence committed against them. She is pushing for it at a policy level and she is priming her base for it. Lauren Boebert is in Congress because of a mere 546 votes. In 2024 when labor leader Trisha Calvarese went head to head with her, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district and outperformed Kamala Harris by 6 points. Now Trisha is back to finish the job. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | We can beat Boebert and stop the violence she is pushing. No donation is too small. Even $1 is doing your part. Thank you. It’s up to us to shape this district, and time is running out. **Together, we can show Republicans that CA-25 isn’t flippable.**
[Will you chip in $10 or any amount you can manage to secure a blue CA-25 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122137765/591687482/936185492?amount=10&source=RR_EM_FR_122825_B1_EOY3_D1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDdlNDQ2MTYtMmFlNC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TGWjjJCMEwgnZH87h98st5LYvHn15A-TduBzBhnVcPc=)
Every dollar goes toward reversing the red trend we saw in 2025 — expanding our field operation, reaching new voters, and building the infrastructure we need to keep CA-25 blue and flip the House in 2026.
We have a lot of ground to cover and we can’t do it without you. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to donate, this is it.

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. The reality: We're at 65% with only 4 days left, which means we need to pick up the pace. = = | | = Our FEC numbers go public on January 15th. They'll show one of two things: whether we have the deep-rooted grassroots strength to defend this seat, or whether our district is vulnerable and ripe for Republican attacks. It’s up to us to shape this district, and time is running out. Together, we can show Republicans that CA-25 isn’t flippable. = Every dollar goes toward reversing the red trend we saw in 2025 — expanding our field operation, reaching new voters, and building the infrastructure we need to keep CA-25 blue and flip the House in 2026. We have a lot of ground to cover and we can’t do it without you. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to donate, this is it. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. 2026 is the firewall.
If we lose the House or fail to take back the Senate, the left finishes the job they started.
That’s why Turning Point PAC is deploying the most sophisticated ballot-chasing operation the conservative movement has ever built — bigger and more advanced than anything we've done before.
**In Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Michigan we are:**

* **Identifying** every single low-propensity America First voter

* **Registering** unregistered Patriots

* **Chasing** every legal ballot with thousands of paid chasers using our first-of-its-kind mobile app

* **Curing** ballots and building authentic relationships door by door, call by call, text by text

* **Constructing** a permanent Red Wall that no Democrat can breach in 2026, 2028, or beyond

The left had a decade head start and billions from their billionaire donors. We're not just catching up — _we're surpassing them in the states that decide everything, right now._
**[Whether it’s $1 or $100 — every dollar you give today fuels paid ballot chasers in the field, banking the votes that secure Senate seats, House majorities, and the America First agenda.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9097606/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0zX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIyMS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjg/LbmNsd0VCSU5MWg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNTdfd3I0/gaVGReA/s6m698b3eb0)**

Turning Point PAC Team

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Peter,

Did you see our most recent message? Right now, we're up against well-funded opponents and Trump administration allies who helped create the reproductive health care crisis we're living through. But we have something stronger on our side: **you**.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/dc7ada85-58d2-431b-9c76-004b0b436280?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As I have done since 2012 (and publicly posted since 2015), I make predictions of what might occur during the following five years. The process of drafting my annual list of global developments to watch takes months, during which time I test my craziest ideas on corporate leaders, government officials, academics, journalists, and former students.
This week, I'm seeking input from _**Navigating Uncertainty**_ readers and to reward you for the 5-7 minutes it might take you to answer the following 20 questions, you'll see real time poll results as you submit your responses! You'll also be getting a glimpse into what an extraordinarily diverse global audience of leaders is thinking about.
A final note before we begin: the questions are presented in random order; there is no significance to the first or last question! Thanks again for your help!
So let's begin...
| | POLL
---
What do you think is the biggest threat to geopolitical stability over the next five years?
| [Great power fight for the Arctic](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.KTvSgbdTOkpzJH9nWa0xs8Qfr-BL7S5DeznJSYDf0sM?)

[Armed conflict in Venezuela ](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.FikfXy51U8TN7oTrGJ8Zptc4aHrL92L_mREqPIxTcUs?)
[An Iranian nuclear attack on Israel](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.5tHd5eKBfJwog03OzXGXwToYF0Giiz485aynkLXvv3Q?)
[Russian aggression in Europe](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.2rUTGDOGwWbDTd_NYgHvXD9R7zo4eCwNYdimzgMPnns?)

Which technology is likely to have the biggest impact over the next five years?

[3D printed food becomes viable](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.775OiYKI478dHvjQ34fggtsGGghFAGbA5-JyaNtxvAE?)

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/fa257957-6fcd-4a6b-9693-4ee9dea9762b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/2bddc924-113e-46f5-9214-825e1459fc0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/94fceec5-d837-484e-bcfc-bdd89d11bd49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

I'm seeking your input for my annual predictions. | | | Dec 28 | | | | | | | | | | | | As I have done since 2012 (and publicly posted since 2015), I make predictions of what might occur during the following five years. The process of drafting my annual list of global developments to watch takes months, during which time I test my craziest ideas on corporate leaders, government officials, academics, journalists, and former students. This week, I'm seeking input from Navigating Uncertainty readers and to reward you for the 5-7 minutes it might take you to answer the following 20 questions, you'll see real time poll results as you submit your responses! You'll also be getting a glimpse into what an extraordinarily diverse global audience of leaders is thinking about. A final note before we begin: the questions are presented in random order; there is no significance to the first or last question! Thanks again for your help! | | Peter, I hope you are reading the emails I send, but quite frankly, we're not seeing many of our supporters take action. While Republicans kept a U.S. House seat in our hands on Tuesday in Tennessee, the margin dropped by over HALF from one year ago when President Trump easily won the same district over Kamala Harris. It's got me wondering if there is a correlation between the lull in contributions we're seeing, and the low margins are candidates are winning by this year. Is the writing on the wall, and I'm the only one who doesn't see it? Are you still motivated to win, or have you lost faith in spite of our many accomplishments this past year? I'm curious to know what's going on. Next year's election is going to be a turnout election, and I can assure you that the Left is going to show up. I'm really worried about our folks, voters like you, getting out to vote when President Trump isn't on the ballot. **I 'm asking a small favor:** could you please let me know if you're still with us by making a small contribution of at least $10 today? I know this isn't a poll exactly, but my team and I will use the results of this email to determine the size and the strength of our movement as it stands today. clean_body: We won on Tuesday, but that’s where the good news stops and the bad news starts. We won on Tuesday, but that’s where the good news stops and the bad news starts. | | | | | Peter, I hope you are reading the emails I send, but quite frankly, we're not seeing many of our supporters take action. While Republicans kept a U.S. House seat in our hands on Tuesday in Tennessee, the margin dropped by over HALF from one year ago when President Trump easily won the same district over Kamala Harris. It's got me wondering if there is a correlation between the lull in contributions we're seeing, and the low margins are candidates are winning by this year. Is the writing on the wall, and I'm the only one who doesn't see it? Are you still motivated to win, or have you lost faith in spite of our many accomplishments this past year? I'm curious to know what's going on. Next year's election is going to be a turnout election, and I can assure you that the Left is going to show up. I'm really worried about our folks, voters like you, getting out to vote when President Trump isn't on the ballot. I 'm asking a small favor: could you please let me know if you're still with us by making a small contribution of at least $10 today? I know this isn't a poll exactly, but my team and I will use the results of this email to determine the size and the strength of our movement as it stands today. Thanks, Sen. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. | | | Disclaimer: This email includes marketing materials from Brownstone Research. If you have any U.S. dollars in your bank account... You must see this presentation explaining the new financial shift impacting the U.S. Dollar. Reports indicate a massive change is coming. Insiders are calling it "Trump's New Dollar". As Forbes says, this innovation could "replace conventional bank deposits." And Bloomberg admits it could "completely shake up the US financial system." That means if you don’t prepare now... You could be left holding cash in an outdated system while the "Smart Money" moves on. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. If you’re reading this email, we’re probably in the same boat: we’re both Democrats from red states — so we’re used to not getting everything we want. We have to work hard, defend our beliefs, and yes, find common ground, even with people we oftentimes disagree with. Sometimes, that’s the only way we can get things done.
But that’s how the government is supposed to work. Kansans aren’t going to agree on everything — but everyone still has the opportunity to make sure their voices and their values are reflected.
**But the National Republican Party? They disagree. Instead, they want to rig Kansas’ maps and only give a voice in Congress to a select few.**
And if they succeed on January 12th? They won’t just wipe Kansas Democrats off the map. They’ll rig themselves into a permanent, unaccountable majority.

But the National Republican Party? They disagree. Instead, they want to rig Kansas’ maps and only give a voice in Congress to a select few. And if they succeed on January 12th? They won’t just wipe Kansas Democrats off the map. They’ll rig themselves into a permanent, unaccountable majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **** | **** | **** | **= ** | **= ** **** | **** | **= ** | **= ** | **** | **= ** | **= Thank you for standing with me. name: Nellie Pou HQ
subject: They control Congress. And they have no plan.
body:
That’s why this race matters

| |
---
Hi friend, Right now, the people controlling Congress have no plan to lower health care costs. **None.** Democrats have put forward proposals to cap drug prices, protect Medicare, and stop premiums from skyrocketing. House Republicans have blocked them at every turn, including earlier this month when they failed to extend ACA tax credits once again. What's their alternative? Let premiums rise, and limit reproductive health coverage. That's it, that's the best they could come up with. This is what happens when politicians who prioritize their own careers stay in power. Costs go up. Quality care declines. Families fall behind. And nothing changes. If we want a Congress that actually delivers for working people, we have to take back the House. And that starts with winning seats like this one in New Jersey. **[This district is competitive, and we need to win it to take back the House. Our end-of-quarter fundraising push will determine whether we have the resources to win it. We’re halfway through our EOQ push. Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. clean_body: That’s why this race matters | | Hi friend, Right now, the people controlling Congress have no plan to lower health care costs. None. Democrats have put forward proposals to cap drug prices, protect Medicare, and stop premiums from skyrocketing. House Republicans have blocked them at every turn, including earlier this month when they failed to extend ACA tax credits once again. What's their alternative? Let premiums rise, and limit reproductive health coverage. That's it, that's the best they could come up with. This is what happens when politicians who prioritize their own careers stay in power. Costs go up. Quality care declines. Families fall behind. And nothing changes. If we want a Congress that actually delivers for working people, we have to take back the House. And that starts with winning seats like this one in New Jersey. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, Nellie Pou HQ | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Wes Moore
subject: Frankly
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)
Peter, I’ve got to be honest.
This is the first office I was ever elected to, and frankly, it takes some getting used to! I’m more comfortable in cargo shorts than a suit. And while I can’t meet everyone who **[donates to this campaign,](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251228-2._iUqKM&refcode=em-20251228-2&t=2&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)** I wanted to share a bit more about myself.
As you may know, I first got my start by serving in the Army.
I was sent to military school when I was twelve. At the time, it was the absolute last place I wanted to be. But getting my start in the military taught me humility, teamwork, and the importance of serving others. And even as I started my life of public service, **I had no idea I would grow up to be Maryland’s first Black governor.**
Now, a lot has changed, but the important things have remained the same: service, gratitude, and humility continue to be the foundation of everything I do.
These principles are what keep me grounded as governor, and they’re the foundation of everything we’re doing for Marylanders.
**[If you agree with this type of leadership, can I count on you to chip in $5 or any amount today? Your support will be crucial.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251228-2._iUqKM&refcode=em-20251228-2&t=3&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251228-2.WgV9qn&amount=5&refcode=em-20251228-2&t=22&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)**
**Now, I’m fighting for every Marylander to succeed and thrive.** It may feel like an uphill battle right now, but I know we can do this together.
To succeed I need support from folks like you who believe in our mission. That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you make a donation of any amount to help us out?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251228-2._iUqKM&refcode=em-20251228-2&t=23&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20251228-2._iUqKM&refcode=em-20251228-2&t=24&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251228-2&t=25&refcode2=1125_1086043_tQEICU&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1125%2E1086043%2EtQEICU)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

If healthcare was featured on a Saturday Night Live Skit - Linda Richman would get verklempt as the Affordable Care Act is Neither Affordable, Nor does it provide real care, Nor does it Act through preventive measures to make Americans healthier.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..L2L6GaFPW5z9nMqpO4KZKEFgXAZBacTxBXHf_qCrdV8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=182790102)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=182790102&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNzkwMTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjY5NTY3NzMsImV4cCI6MTc2OTU0ODc3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7zhr_fVzYSQ18asClpNY8_-Dn1ctR8C6F7gUfsvlP2k)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43c2cb3e-eba4-403f-801f-ea7aca09d479?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As a physician and attorney who has been concerned about the dangers of greater and greater consolidation of the healthcare industry and its anticompetitive consequences, I have always be disappointed with the Federal Government's unwillingness and inability to stop both the vertical and horizontal integration of health insurance companies. _**These have only grown exponentially since the ACA went into effect while Insurance Companies have become more profitable. See the Chart Below:**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3283d60b-fc38-4363-97a7-3ddc76a3f3a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Vertical and Horizontal Integration - Its Monopoly Time**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9fa59f04-d9ec-4952-b935-d8c98c5f72a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Health insurance companies have expanded and acquired other insurance companies (_horizontal integration_) and have purchased or built other kinds of healthcare businesses including Pharmacy Benefit Managers (which control drug prices and copays) and acquire or create medical practices (_vertical integration_).
**Spotlight - United Healthcare/Optum - Washington State - Medicare Advantage**
United Healthcare owns Optum, a network of approximately 1,600 medical practices throughout the United States with 36 of them being in the State of Washington. In some communities they are the dominant provider of primary care.
In Washington State, United Healthcare is the largest provider of Medicare Advantage plans with Humana being the second largest covering approximately 120,000 seniors with 25% market share. _**Up to this point, Optum owned practices have accepted Humana insurance as an in network provider. That means that if you have Humana Insurance you can be seen at an Optum owed practice and be covered.**_
**Major Optum Changes in 2026 - Humana Not Accepted**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/91e19dd4-ef8f-4025-8059-2ddfb99f33fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Starting in 2026, Optum owned practices will no longer take Humana insurance. _**That means that if you are a patient at an Optum owned practice in Washington State your Humana insurance will no longer be accepted.**_ This is forcing seniors on Medicare Advantage plans to make a choice. If they want to keep their Optum doctors they must change their insurance from Humana to United Healthcare.
Optum is forcing patients to buy their insurance from United Healthcare or if they don't switch and keep their Humana insurance thy must find another doctor. This is the first publicized instance of an insurance company jamming its plans to patients through their own medical practices. _**The result is that 8 out of 10 Seniors on Humana will change to United Healthcare to see their existing physicians.**_
**How Big is Optum Health?**
Optum Health has over 90,000 physicians of which about 10% are direct employees. In any market where Optum has significant market share, they can expand this practice to refuse to accept any other insurance other than United Healthcare.
_**The Result is to drive other insurance companies out of the market and expand the reach of their anti-competitive monopoly at the expense of America 's most-vulnerable - Our Seniors.**_
**What are the consequences? Market Specific (based on market share)**
In Spokane County where Optum has no clinics, it will have no effects. But in Snohomish County with population of about 840,000, Optum controls almost 45% of the primary care market. **In that county, Optum patients with Humana who want to keep their doctors must switch to United Healthcare.**
**What will be the effect on Medicare Advantage?**
Before this Optum policy change, United Healthcare controlled almost 49% of the county's Medicare Advantage market and Humana controlled 25%. This policy change will force a huge number of Humana's Medicare Advantage policy holders to switch to United Healthcare. The result will be United Healthcare market share over 50 percent of all Medicare Advantage.
Washington State is not the only market at risk. Oprum has similar dominance in parts of California, and Nevada. In Contra Costa County, California Optum controls over 40% of the primary care market and in Clark County, Nevada Optum has an almost 36% market shares.
**Increased Illnesses Increase Medicare Costs**
Medicare Advantage Plan Insurance Companies are paid a fixed monthly fee per member and the more illnesses the member has, the higher the fee. It is not surprising that when your doctor that determines what conditions you have is also employed by the insurance company that would benefit from a higher fee there is a likelihood of the illnesses being overstated. _**There have been scandals of insurance companies overstating illnesses for higher reimbursement that were the subject of a recent Wall Street Journal Investigation on various forms of Medicaid Fraud.**_
**The Runaway Train Must Be Stopped**
If these trends are not stopped, we will be creating a situation where the insurance companies will control the insurance premiums, the drug costs, where the care is provided, who provides the care. The final vertical integration will be a health insurance company owned hospitals with total control of the healthcare system and our Medicare/Medicaid System.
For decades, the DOJ has done very little to stop the mergers and vertical integration of healthcare by insurance company giants. The result has been less competition and higher prices for healthcare. Yet, no one bat an eyelash.
_**It is a basic economic principle of our free enterprise economy is that competition leads to better quality at lower prices. However, since the ACA, the government has taken the opposite approach which has resulted in a rapid price increase in health insurance. It is time for this to come to an end.**_
If consolidation continues, tax payers will be forced to bear the increasing costs of Medicare Advantage Plans as the members get "sicker" as these employed doctors determine what conditions a member has.
**Scandals Increasing**
According to a January 2, 2025 article in the Wall Street Journal entitled "**How Health Insurers Racked Up Billions in Extra Payment From Medicare Advantage** " by Christopher Weaver "Medicare Advantage insurers diagnosed patients with conditions that triggered extra payment of $50 billion form 2019-2021, even though no doctor ever treated the diseases".
**Patients Get Sicker in Insurance Captive Care Model**
With specific regard to doctors who work for United Healthcare (Optum), when patients were treated by these employed doctors, the patients got 55% sicker. United Healthcare claimed that their diagnoses was more accurate.
The Wall Street Journal article's analysis states that when patients switch to United Healthcare Medicare Advantage plans and are treated by United Healthcare doctors, they will have more illnesses than previously listed in their medical record. Miraculously, the monthly reimbursement by the Federal Government to United Healthcare increases.
**Another aspect to Medicare Advantage Plans is that advantage plan must spend 85% of the premiums on medical costs. When they own the care they can easily pay more for medical costs because they are paying themselves.**
If these trends are not stopped we will be creating a situation where the insurance companies will control all aspects of care, Insurance premiums, the drug costs and the location of and provider of care with the final goal to take over the hospitals.
**Where are the trust busters? Absent**
For decades, the DOJ has done very little to stop the mergers and vertical integration of healthcare by insurance company giants. The result has been less competition and higher prices for healthcare.
It is a basic economic principle of our free enterprise economy is that competition leads to better quality at lower prices.
When it comes to healthcare, the Government's inability or unwillingness to preserve competition in the healthcare market is a major factor for the rapid price increase in health insurance. **It is time for this to come to an end.**

name: Stop ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop ICE’s deadly detention regime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Yet another tragedy just struck at a for-profit ICE processing center.
Another person lost their life in custody.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34903?source=email-20251228&t=1011&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Rep. Ramirez on X calling for an investigation into Mr. Gantchev's
death in ICE custody

The warning signs were impossible to ignore: freezing temperatures, meager
meals, filthy bathrooms, and blocked access to medical care. Rep. Rashida
Tlaib’s recent oversight visit uncovered even more horrors – multiple
suicide attempts, desperate pleas for health care, and a dangerous
shortage of medical staff.

No human being deserves to suffer behind bars, trapped in cages or torn
from their family.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34903?source=email-20251228&t=1012&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Yet right now, Congress is funneling billions of our taxpayer dollars
toward ICE’s terror campaigns. Will you demand your representatives stop
funding ICE to terrorize our communities and unleash death, neglect, and
abuse on our neighbors, family, and friends?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34903?source=email-20251228&t=1013&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]ADD YOUR NAME

A record-breaking 30 people have died in ICE custody already this year.
That’s 30 lives cut short by inhumane policies and industrial-scale
neglect – all while ICE terrorizes our communities across the country.
It’s clear: ICE is outright endangering our neighbors’ lives.

And it’s about to get even worse. Donald Trump is laying the groundwork
for even more aggressive roundups and workplace raids in 2026. He wants to
supercharge ICE, promising a massive new wave of deportations.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34903?source=email-20251228&t=1014&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Headline: Trump set to expand immigration enforcement in 2026 despite
backlash

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is mobilizing rapid response protests
across the country, calling out every corporation funding ICE’s abuses.
But that alone won’t stop this machinery of terror. We need Congress to
feel the scale of our outrage from every state and every city. Which is
why we’re gearing up to scale UP this work in 2026 to take on Trump’s
deportation nightmare head on.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34903?source=email-20251228&t=1015&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Will you join thousands of Our Revolution supporters in flooding
Congress’s inboxes, demanding it stop sending billions to enable ICE’s
deadly detention regime?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34903?source=email-20251228&t=1016&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251228.NlFPFr&t=1007&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251228.x1SmT7&t=1008&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251228.P55Ewc&t=1009&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251228.tsgbdl&t=1010&akid=10018%2E5885482%2EZ_ISTr ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics — it was about peace
body:
The quietest thing Charlie ever did was the most powerful
Charlie’s final message—support Turning Point USA & receive his last book.
| | [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f354a3db40d46688dac71af88b82b3e&_e=FcYjtXByJS3TVYTFZl-1NGcKrXDGqGtn38nbQQYnUIUO-hz2ID50LZp7DugXfjIAjZ_BDY_6Es23IKMQvMJ4GrkfrkQ8ZE-wqgb-CkK5sCv-sVdPtuU8itv4xYY8cpnApBmlm-Ia4mlSBzPzE7UWBsonV2ShgVdpmw6FA2vXtM4NpX9184hZSanSV38BSJrCeTwE8y54VB5uN98cuX9Cay5FJ8CUdjwCKRG5ZDe4Egh45xQOXANIhPWIjpCf1atmmmLfNcPJtdcxyVM9tMviyTzjzUIxAnM_ApJZo22ljEGNeDElpimvb2AQ8WwgJl4BOAtboJ-oDob3Dvo0QWsB0Y6ok_8MUZMJ7wW5xE3nR7ZQNtd3XEzpsF6C3zI4tA4yOd_NiGK89RBPcN7RcdIJol4H1dFhVx2I57MYJaHEnZx1M6UKQBct3LAmv77zc02YIsEF8KXye38lo3jC5xnT9zZgFSCKl69GgkcTWPk5sXVBeRJAoSfES0_uLY8lNo2d_HO-pfEIl2oSAjlKN7mlb3tMZCV8O2-rXz7q6qqlrf9047Wipb-oda6Ex9n4u6yaiX1dRLs6iGYZm5G-uDcfI7dERRVfARURfJ3O5uF-oz85Zbinz_5kKALi22uTTr2r6AJjhYcRmj7Kb5HAO8hFAL2WBnCc5FlkWXfsSSsYHNbaqhfZuzC15WJ5H4z0XWK-)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
---
| Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---
| [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2f354a3db40d46688dac71af88b82b3e&_e=FcYjtXByJS3TVYTFZl-1NGcKrXDGqGtn38nbQQYnUIUO-hz2ID50LZp7DugXfjIAjZ_BDY_6Es23IKMQvMJ4GrkfrkQ8ZE-wqgb-CkK5sCv-sVdPtuU8itv4xYY8cpnApBmlm-Ia4mlSBzPzE7UWBsonV2ShgVdpmw6FA2vXtM4NpX9184hZSanSV38BSJrCeTwE8y54VB5uN98cuX9Cay5FJ8CUdjwCKRG5ZDe4EghYQtVVpFxhA7zKpXfjQotFrwsxScwJTRd29U4a59JAfPRHGqWhKu6XWNSktZjEoERRopp-H4ADRipxUdCWAsvaMKjA-DDOR_QC2McGouq9BtH5RYNF_pukwMepsuvBBWDtSab60H4XpEUwfw35fAoOb7CElnxSAa7V91vM0NTz42EVztqdGtaSwHxLRIsGTLHYfF8iVGdnoqziIh39kzEAGQUIHeImhpznAwpgt8-Vk0gk2lAClv9DwtVPWFq4usq48uol7ioKzi6l0qimbV_3WgVn15y2IubzGu5L_mTXkgLI4tekVMiI-whR3MhrcU5nSlG1n_qn89cnoTuBWg5TwCa08olYWvxPp5WTLzZiNnPX4bWIs2sUgfFPMI_TpiYdKVvvLpoGIPzsH6adsO9jWoEWBr4-V4pQz7Q7DoYr0ILPytMeqX6mhrZ0l7hSv1sw0AurFAOkuX0Rjq_opsoL)
---
| This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust.

A book not about politics... but about peace.

**It 's called: _Stop, in the Name of God._**

clean_body: The quietest thing Charlie ever did was the most powerful Charlie’s final message—support Turning Point USA & receive his last book. | | - | Fellow Patriot, | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... | | This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. That's not coming from Democratic wishful thinking --_it 's coming from conservative analysts who can see the writing on the wall._ After two decades of Republican control, enthusiasm on the GOP side is fading, turnout is slipping, and special elections are flashing warning signs they can't ignore. One of those warning signs? **Georgia 's 14th District.** **I 'm Shawn Harris, and I'm running in the special election for Congress here in Marjorie Taylor Greene's district. People assume this seat is untouchable. Republicans have relied on that assumption for years. But special elections have a way of exposing reality fast.** [**Will you contribute now to help us seize this moment and hit our $14,000 end-of-year goal by midnight on December 31? This is how underdog races become real ones: with grassroots donations of $14, $30 or more.**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/1vGbBPy2O_40Q-BdbZsREQ~~/AAPPABA~/dUsBupKc3Idy-V1vSjd9DpZOINlT3Tlj-pcQVKMmhAW_U_6yWXkNoyL0gUUtPMq728ulhBh2_EhQ6Gbe9g0g-BuBLjou4MRkvmc5zhNHRJFSVq6FYlV8c-LJ3dTgFrOI4zW9VENqklu4SZJI39OIv_Ne46_7liJGv2VVHyIryh0uPVPrriSrMfHJSQ0kjj2vnjM-_ciyoBTrWL4ZKyBFV7tfTFs5S_DTsjIp8XgHoT27DVOn88aYokIQHrtACfg7ZUECc-RSHLznGGg2UjoeaZpI1_rryi3f4SfEVz9cfckPAVV426yhJ-zuSRP4cfY9) Republicans know they're vulnerable. That's why they're already preparing to run a fear-based campaign -- claiming Democrats will "ruin" Georgia without being able to point to how GOP leadership has actually improved people's lives. Voters are tired of the chaos, tired of the extremism, and tired of being embarrassed by representatives who make headlines instead of progress. ** ** _That 's why this race matters._ ** ** I'm not running for TV attention. I'm running to give this district something it hasn't had in years: **serious leadership, dignity, and a real voice focused on working families.** ** ** But moments like this don't last forever. Momentum only matters if we act on it. ** ** [**Please make a grassroots donation today -- any amount helps -- and help us reach $14,000 by year-end. This district is watching. Georgia is watching. clean_body: | | Even Republican strategists are saying it out loud now: Georgia is on the brink of a blue flip. | That's not coming from Democratic wishful thinking --it 's coming from conservative analysts who can see the writing on the wall. After two decades of Republican control, enthusiasm on the GOP side is fading, turnout is slipping, and special elections are flashing warning signs they can't ignore. One of those warning signs? Georgia 's 14th District. I 'm Shawn Harris, and I'm running in the special election for Congress here in Marjorie Taylor Greene's district. People assume this seat is untouchable. Republicans have relied on that assumption for years. But special elections have a way of exposing reality fast. Republicans know they're vulnerable. That's why they're already preparing to run a fear-based campaign -- claiming Democrats will "ruin" Georgia without being able to point to how GOP leadership has actually improved people's lives. Voters are tired of the chaos, tired of the extremism, and tired of being embarrassed by representatives who make headlines instead of progress. That 's why this race matters. I'm not running for TV attention. I'm running to give this district something it hasn't had in years: serious leadership, dignity, and a real voice focused on working families. But moments like this don't last forever. Momentum only matters if we act on it. ~~ ~~ ~~ Thank you for believing in what's possible, Shawn Harris | | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA
