clean_body: I want to tell you the action Powered by People took in 2025. Think back to that first year of Trump’s presidency. Not long ago, right? The CEOs, the tech moguls, the media giants—they all fell in line. Law firms, Ivy League schools, Congress, even the Supreme Court—every institution with traditional clout seemed ready to bend to his will. It was staggering, infuriating, and honestly, it could make anyone feel powerless. But we didn’t sit back or wait to be told what to do. We chose to fight. To act. Because action is the antidote to despair and it is the key to victory. This email is longer than usual, but I want to show you exactly how our Powered by People team took on 2025, rose to each challenge, and met each moment with strength and determination. It made a huge difference, and I'm proud of what we accomplished. It started with listening. Showing up in every part of Texas to bring people together for no-holds-barred town hall meetings. We wanted to hear what was on people’s minds. Yes, their concerns but also their solutions to overcoming the very real challenges we face. People—Democrats, Republicans, Independents, non-voters alike—having conversations eyeball to eyeball. No question off limits, everyone allowed a chance on the mic. We held town halls in Republican strongholds, places Trump had just won with 70% of the vote. Amarillo, Wichita Falls, Tyler. We had them in suburbs too: Mansfield, Rosenberg (with my friend Tim Walz), Denton, Garland, Humble. And we did the same in bigger cities, from San Antonio and Laredo to Beaumont. Town hall in Garland Town hall in San Antonio Everyone in the room learned from everyone in the room. In this age of misinformation and state-sponsored propaganda, it brought us together on the same page of truth, ready to take action. One moment that stood out was when a woman in Humble what it means to have her health care taken away. Those community meetings at the start of the year led to unprecedented action in the streets. People coming out in force for the Hands Off march in April and the No Kings protests after that. Texas showed up, with events in the places you might expect but also in small towns and rural communities. Powered by People organizers were there every step of the way, registering voters, signing up volunteers, and getting folks added to our network to help them turn out in the next election. We protested Trump’s cuts to foreign aid, his destruction of public education, his “Big Beautiful Bill” that takes the ability to see a doctor away from millions of people while funneling billions to his ultra-rich donors, his attacks on our democracy and our Constitution, the masked, plain-clothes officers he has sweeping our neighbors off the street without a badge or a warrant or any semblance of due process. And we took it directly to him. When Trump invited himself to give the commencement at the University of Alabama in May, we went to Tuscaloosa and joined thousands of students and community members to offer a powerful, positive alternative to his selfish and destructive authoritarianism. Together in Alabama But as spring turned to summer, it became clear to all of us at Powered by People that protesting wouldn’t be enough. We couldn’t just be against things. We needed to be for something. So we hit the road to share a big, bold, positive, unapologetic vision for our future. One that tells people exactly how Democrats will deliver when we win power, incorporating what we had heard during our town halls earlier in the year. We held rallies in Fort Worth (with our friend Bernie) and Amarillo to lay it all out. A future where you can afford to see a doctor, buy a home, send your kids to world-class public schools, and only have to work one job. A future where we have a real democracy; one where we no longer turn our backs on our friends and allies around the world. With Bernie in Fort Worth We took this Texas vision to the rest of the country, holding town halls in North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Virginia, Maryland, Wisconsin, Indiana, Missouri, Nebraska, Oklahoma, and Louisiana. We even held a memorable one in Berlin (Germany—not Texas) with Democrats Abroad to make sure that U.S. citizens living outside the country can use their power to vote to help win critical elections. Thousands of people came out to these events, allowing us to make them into big organizing opportunities... registering folks to vote and plugging them in to volunteer shifts in their local communities. Town hall in Oklahoma City Town hall in Charlotte While traveling to other states this summer, we also had the opportunity to build our coalition and our movement. We worked directly with partner organizations that share our priority of bringing people together and taking action. That meant joining the summer meetings of the Young Democrats of America, the NAACP, UnidosUS, and Netroots Nation. All of this work—the travel, the organizing, the coalition building—was put to the test when Donald Trump ordered Greg Abbott and Texas Republicans to give him five more seats in the House of Representatives... a direct attack on Texas and an effort to seize political power before the first votes of 2026 were even cast. But we weren’t caught flat-footed. In fact, we chose to aggressively fight the President and take our case to the country. I couldn’t be more proud of how Powered by People stepped up to lead this redistricting fight. As Republicans began to redraw the maps in order to steal five Democratic seats, we took action. We protested at the Texas Capitol and testified inside of it. We hosted a 6,000 person rally in Austin (with our friends Joaquin Castro, Jasmine Crockett, James Talarico, Gina Hinojosa, and Greg Casar). We held organizing events in Houston, Abilene, and El Paso. We brought together thousands more in Fort Worth, reminding Trump and the rest of the country that, while the rich and powerful might be genuflecting in anticipatory obedience to the little dictator, in Texas, our knees don’t bend. Rally in Austin During TV interviews, podcasts, and out-of-state events, we connected the dots for our fellow Americans about why what happens in Texas matters to them (Trump is trying to steal these seats in order to hang on to power in the House because if he loses his majority, there will finally be a check on his lawlessness, accountability for his crimes and corruption, and real hope for a better future for this country). We got off the back foot and on to the front foot, leading the call for Democratic-controlled states to fight fire with fire by redrawing their maps to cancel out the Texas gerrymander (thank you, California). We would no longer await the punch thrown by these would-be fascists. Instead we would throw ours first and throw it harder. Rally in Fort Worth But we didn’t just raise awareness, we raised resources too. When the heroic Texas Democrats left the state to break quorum and stop Trump’s power grab, we had their backs. And we continued to have their backs when they returned. Thanks to our grassroots supporters, Powered by People donated over $1 million to the Texas Legislative Black Caucus, the Texas House Democratic Caucus, and the Mexican American Legislative Caucus over the course of the special session. Turns out Republicans don’t like when we fight back. For standing against Trump’s Texas gerrymander, Ken Paxton accused me of bribery, tried to shut down Powered by People entirely, and even asked a judge to imprison me. Did that stop us? No. We continued to fight aggressively, taking Paxton to court, and winning in front of an all Abbott-appointed appeals court. I’m sure Paxton knew he could never prove his lies, but I’m also just as sure that his intent was to bury us in legal action and bankrupt us by turning the full power of the State of Texas against us. What he didn’t count on was that we were never, ever going to give in. Though the months-long fight cost us more than $400,000 in legal fees, our supporters stayed with us through the thick of it and helped us emerge stronger than ever. So strong that we decided to do what’s never been done before—work with allies across Texas to fill every single seat on the ballot with a Democrat. We hit the road to recruit Democratic candidates in every part of the state. We hosted candidate recruitment events in breweries and bars, in church meeting rooms and community centers, on campuses... anywhere we could gather people to remind them what’s at stake and what we can do to meet the moment. And we weren’t just in the districts that are safe for Democrats. We were in Pearland, Waco, College Station, McKinney, and Fort Worth just to name a few. Candidate recruitment event in San Antonio Candidate recruitment event in Waco And here’s the result: Democrats filed to run for 39 out of 39 Congressional seats, 16 out of 16 State Senate seats, and 150 out of 150 State House seats. We’ve scoured the state records (which have been digitized back to 1974) and we can’t find another year where Democrats fielded a candidate for every seat. But we know that it’s not enough just to have candidates on the ballot. They have to have our support too. That’s why Powered by People is organizing on the ground and on college campuses throughout the state. We are registering voters, building new voter relationships and signing up volunteers on campuses like Rice, University of Houston, UT, Austin Community College, UTSA, UTEP, and El Paso Community College. And we know this work works; the young voters who we met and registered and stayed in touch with in 2024 turned out at a rate of 79.5% (versus 42% nationally and 37% in Texas). Voter registration event at University of Houston Finally, there was everything that our Powered by People volunteers were doing when I wasn’t physically with them. When the media wasn’t there. When it wasn’t being documented for Instagram or TikTok. It was the voters being registered every single day. The volunteer shifts happening in every part of the state. The organizing for down ballot races like Senate District 9. And the texts sent, phone calls made, community events attended, action taken. We had a big year and we’re not slowing down now. We’re only going to turn it up in 2026. That's how we can win a U.S. Senate seat, critical Congressional races, state legislative seats... that's how we take back power, and use it to deliver for the people. Thanks for being in the fight with us. Beto

I launched the _**Red Tape Rollback Act of 2025**_ , Georgia’s very own DOGE (Department of Government Efficiency) plan. Here’s what the Red Tape Rollback Act will do:
* Force state agencies to justify EVERY rule and regulation every four years
* Slash compliance burdens on small businesses
* Require economic impact reports for all major new rules
* Give legislators power to request Small Business Impact Analyses

This is our chance to join President Trump in his mission to drain the swamp and put hardworking Americans FIRST!

name: Chris Taylor for Justice
subject: Our election is in 100 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
It may not feel like it yet, but this election is coming up fast.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251228-951&t=1&akid=962%2E294397%2EQYgX5B)
Folks,
It may not feel like it yet, but this election is coming up fast.
**There are only 100 days left, and that means the final phase of this campaign is kicking into high gear.**
* **Here’s our plan:** Get Judge Chris Taylor’s message in front of Wisconsin voters — through ads, organizing, and digital outreach.

* **Here’s the challenge:** Doing all of that and more is expensive, and we’re fully relying on grassroots power to fuel this campaign.

* **Finally, here’s our goal:** We need to raise $115,000 before the month is over. Hitting that milestone ensures we’ll have the resources to reach as many voters as we can leading up to Election Day.

[**Can we count on your support? Please, chip in $10 today to help us make the most impact in these final 100 days:**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251228_2_ak.lfsiA-&amount=10&refcode=em20251228-951&t=3&akid=962%2E294397%2EQYgX5B)

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Our last deadline before an important election year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Every dollar we raise now helps us gear up for 2026.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251228-5741-footer&t=1&akid=5741%2E420207%2ENIU712)
Hi Peter,
**Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is Wednesday, December 31 — and it’s a _big_ one.** It’s our last deadline before a crucial election year, and when our numbers go public, people will be watching closely to see whether this grassroots campaign is ready for what’s to come in 2026.
That’s why we set an ambitious goal of raising $30,000 by the end of the year to show that a people-powered movement can’t be drowned out by corporate PACs or billionaire donors.
[**If you’re able, will you chip in $3 before the deadline to help us reach our goal and support Pramila’s work for our progressive movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251228-2.dfX41c&refcode=em20251228-5741&amount=3&t=2&akid=5741%2E420207%2ENIU712)
And while our fundraising report is important, this isn’t just about what shows up on an FEC filing.
**Every dollar we raise now helps us gear up for 2026 by building the organizing strength we’ll need, reaching voters early, and making sure we have the resources to help Democrats flip the House and put a real check on MAGA power.**
The Trump administration is sure to double down on their authoritarian agenda next year, and the billionaires bankrolling them are counting on everyone else to tune out, get discouraged, or fall behind. **We can’t give them that opening.**
So if you’re all-in on growing our progressive movement, defeating MAGA at the polls next year, and building a government that puts working people first, [**can we count on you to pitch in $3 before Wednesday’s deadline to help us hit our $30,000 end-of-year goal?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251228-2.dfX41c&refcode=em20251228-5741&amount=3&t=3&akid=5741%2E420207%2ENIU712)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251228-2.dfX41c&amount=3&refcode=em20251228-5741&t=22&akid=5741%2E420207%2ENIU712)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251228-5741-footer&t=23&refcode2=5741_420207_NIU712&akid=5741%2E420207%2ENIU712)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Crow HQ
subject: A quick Sunday night note from Crow HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Can we interrupt your Sunday night for just a moment?

Maybe you’re halfway through a show. Maybe you’re scrolling while folding laundry. Maybe you’re doing absolutely nothing at all (honestly, respect). Either way, we’ll keep this short.

Jason, on the other hand, doesn’t really do “off.”

While most of us are powering down for the week ahead, Jason is still doing what he’s always done: standing up for our democracy, pushing back against Trump’s attacks, and refusing to be intimidated for speaking out. Army Ranger habits die hard.

And right now, there’s a big calendar reminder looming: our end-of-year FEC fundraising deadline.

What we raise before December 31 (always in small dollar donations, never corporate PACs or special interests) becomes public in January. It shapes how this campaign is seen. And it sends a clear message about whether Jason has the grassroots support he needs to keep doing what he does best: running toward the fight instead of away from it.

Jason has never backed down for Colorado. If you’re able, we’re asking you to have his back tonight by making a contribution before the end-of-year deadline. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25]

Thanks for being part of this team – even on a Sunday night.

— Crow HQ
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I’ll get straight to the point:
| | |
---
Friend, I’ll get straight to the point: **Today, I’m asking you to chip in to help my friend, Aaron Ford, become the next Governor of Nevada.**
**_[Will you split $5 between Aaron and me to help flip Nevada’s Governorship blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122142327/591702456/661199874?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5656-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGJmMTVhZC00MWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUMDGq5KAYrB1OmR8XOAoe3doSvWHaAr-TzVFLvvzvY=)_**
As Attorney General, Aaron has taken on the big drug companies, greedy corporate landlords, and scammers of all shapes and sizes — _including Donald Trump._ He has always done right by Nevadans, and he’s ready to continue the fight as our next Governor.
But this race won’t be easy by any stretch of the imagination. Aaron is going to be up against millions in MAGA special-interest money in the general election, and we know the GOP will spend every dollar they can attacking Aaron and trying to keep this seat red.
Republicans know as well as we do: _Nevada is Democrats’ best chance to flip a Governorship blue in the midterms — and if we win, we’ll be able to chart a new path forward for our battleground state._
**With the newest poll showing this race tied, now is when we need to rush Aaron our support so he can keep up his momentum — especially with the first public filing deadline of his campaign just 3 days away.**
**_[Friend, if you want to flip Nevada’s Governorship blue and elect a bold champion for hardworking families, will you split a donation of $5 between Aaron and me today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/122142328/591702457/661199874?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5656-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGJmMTVhZC00MWU0LWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AUMDGq5KAYrB1OmR8XOAoe3doSvWHaAr-TzVFLvvzvY=)_**

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: 2,780 to go as of 5 PM CT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
We're aiming for an important goal today and we're hoping you can help – especially if you've been waiting for the most important time to make your first contribution to James.
So far today we've received thousands of donations, and our goal is to get to 7,000 before midnight tonight to keep us on track for the FEC deadline. You can see our progress here:
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251228-2-ak&t=1&akid=350%2E1347274%2Eo8qaZ-)
**The folks who’ve already donated are hoping you’ll[use this link to add your contribution.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251228-2-ak&t=2&akid=350%2E1347274%2Eo8qaZ-)**
Here’s why this matters:
Our campaign has a lot of momentum right now. James is rising in the polls as more people get to know him. But our opponents are looking for any reason to bring us down.
This FEC deadline marks the end of our first full fundraising quarter. It’s the biggest test of our campaign so far. The pressure is on to show we’ve maintained our grassroots strength.
So we can't slow down now. Not with the FEC deadline in 3 days and the primary in 9 weeks, which is why we need to ask:
**[Can you contribute $5 to stand with James before midnight? Help put us in a position to hit our goal, win this race, and take back Texas.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251228-2-ak&t=3&akid=350%2E1347274%2Eo8qaZ-)**

Our campaign is on a path to win. And what we do together before our FEC deadline couldn’t be more important.
Thanks for pitching in today if you can.
Team Talarico

So far today we've received thousands of donations, and our goal is to get to 7,000 before midnight tonight to keep us on track for the FEC deadline. You can see our progress here: - The folks who’ve already donated are hoping you’ll- Here’s why this matters: Our campaign has a lot of momentum right now. Hi Peter,
As December winds down, our team is preparing for one of the most important moments of this campaign: Jena’s Fighting For Colorado Listening Tour , launching in January.
This campaign has always been rooted in Jena’s values – defending democracy, protecting civil rights, standing up for workers, and making sure every Coloradan has a voice. This Fighting For Colorado Listening Tour is critical for Jena to hear from Coloradans.
But to make it possible, we need to close out December strong.
Can you chip in today to help power the Listening Tour and ensure Jena begins 2026 with momentum? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251228-email]
Every contribution counts, and we’re so grateful for your partnership.

Team Jena

name: Team Rayfield
subject: Your Oregon Political Tax Credit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Rayfield
body:
Plan ahead for your Oregon political tax credit by making a donation before the new year to support the work we do defending our Oregon values.. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/countering-trump-tariffs-and-fighting-for-you-20970745?e=1768325bd4)
---
| | | [ ](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=f3313e2666&e=1768325bd4)
---
|
---
| | | Friend,

It's been an incredible year serving as your Attorney General. This past year, we've sued the Trump administration over 50 times to defend Oregon's values. We've argued on behalf of affordability in front of the US Supreme Court, we've held big corporations accountable for ripping off Oregonians, and we protected over $4.5 billion Oregonians rely on.

We succeed because we have your support. Donate today to support our work and keep Oregon at the forefront of protecting liberty and freedom. **If you donate now, you can receive a tax credit when you file your taxes next year.**
---
| [$50 (Individuals)](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=3d389bf924&e=1768325bd4 "$50 \(Individuals\)")
---
| [$100 (Joint-Filing Couples)](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=37d6cddf73&e=1768325bd4 "$100 \(Joint-Filing Couples\)")
---
| Qualifying Oregon taxpayers making under $75,000 per individual (or $150,000 for joint-filing couples) are eligible to make a political contribution of $50 (or $100 for joint-filing couples) before the year ends, and you'll receive that value as a political tax credit subtracted from your Oregon state taxes when you file next year. It's Oregon's democracy in action!

**Can we count on you to make a donation before 2026 to fuel our fight into the next year? **

---
| [Make your donation today](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=958ab8b281&e=1768325bd4 "Make your donation today")
---
| Onward,
Dan
---
| | | _Copyright © 2025 Friends of Dan Rayfield, All rights reserved._
|
Paid for by Friends of Dan Rayfield
PO Box 2284, Corvallis, OR 97339

---

|

name: Team Benson
subject: Please don’t skip this email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1192%2E181023%2EwA1Nmh)
Hey team,
You’re probably getting a ton of fundraising emails and texts claiming the only way to save our democracy is by chipping in right this second.
This isn’t that. But let us break down what will happen if we don’t show that we have the resources:
→ We might have to cut back on travel across Michigan, meaning fewer people hear Jocelyn’s message
→ Our opponents will pounce, trying to counteract the momentum Jocelyn’s campaign has.
→ We’ll have fewer resources to respond to attacks from John James and the GOP — who are _already_ coming after Jocelyn.
That’s why we need to close out 2025 with a strong report — to signal to our opponents and their wealthy allies that we are ready to fight back and win this race.
**[Can you chip in $10 or $25 to support Jocelyn’s campaign today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251228_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1192%2E181023%2EwA1Nmh)**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: A humble request before our deadline
body:
This is what makes our country strong.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)
| **FINAL 2025 FUNDRAISING DEADLINE:_Midnight 12/31/25_** **[Donate to help meet our team’s $1 million online goal and flip NC from red to blue>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3326?t=7&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)** | **[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3326?t=8&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)**
---

_Peter, by now, you know the stakes of this race, but please give me a second to remind you:_
It’s the race that could determine control of the U.S. Senate majority, and my opponent and I couldn’t be more different. He’s an ex-big oil lobbyist; I’ve committed my life to serving NC. He will greenlight the far-right agenda, while I will stand up for our fundamental rights and democracy itself.
**But you might not know the _why_ behind this campaign.**
North Carolina has always been my home. I got my start in public school classrooms — I graduated from UNC for college and law school. And the first time I ran for office, it was in Nash County, where I was born and raised.
Every opportunity I’ve ever had has come my way because I’m lucky enough to be from North Carolina and to have people around me who offered me their help and support.
I know that what’s true here is true in communities across the country, Peter. When people support one another, everyone is stronger for it.
I want the next generation of America’s leaders to have the same opportunities I had. The same strong communities. The same chances to succeed and thrive. And I’m ready to fight for them.
**Let me put it another way: My opponent is running for Donald Trump (he said so himself). I am running for you.**
**[This is going to be the most competitive race of my career, and I won’t be able to succeed without grassroots supporters stepping up. I am making a humble request for you to pitch in now, if a donation before our end-of-quarter filing deadline fits in your budget. Anything you’re able to give will help hit our goal before time runs out.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3326?t=9&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)**
**[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3326?t=10&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)**
---
We can do this together,
Roy Cooper
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3326?t=11&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=12&akid=228%2E124072%2E83sZIw)

North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. ** mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible. The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. If you wish to receive fewer messages from us,

# [District Round-up 12.28.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F12%2F28%2Fdistrict-round-up-12-28-25%2F&sr=0&signature=0025576c8529700551a38e27c7a0f53c&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on December 28, 2025
---
| Dear Neighbor,
---
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: <https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1>
---
In the midst of this darkness, We, The People, are the light. While white, Christian nationalism enshrouds this country with kidnappings, crypto grifts, costly tariffs, cancellations of healthcare food assistance, denials of due process, mass layoffs of federal workers, cancellations of federal programs and agencies, dissolutions of our international relationships and reputation, and gaslighting our neighbors with propaganda, the shadows can feel neverending. However, We, The People, can blaze through with facts, science-based evidence, and the true interests of our nation.
---
Every demonstration we make in the names of Democracy, Reproductive Freedom, Affordability, Gun Safety, Universal Healthcare, Public Education, the Environment, Immigration Reform, and more is a chance to elucidate our neighbors on improvements to our lives.
---
The white Christian nationalists carry much hatred in their hearts. You hear it in their dehumanizing language of immigrants, members of the LGBTQIA+ community, women, people of color, and everyone who is not a professed white Christian male. With a love a our fellow human beings and our country, it is imperative that We, The People, call out such evil-doing through our demonstrations, letters to the editor, and other communications, but those things alone will not effect change.
---
In order to truly bring about the legislation, leadership, stability, and unity this country needs, we must support Democratic candidates, including me.
---
This is why Team Beth Farnham for Congress has been very busy building a volunteer database for you to participate through. By clicking on the button below to sign up to volunteer with us, you not only get to self-select how you would like to help this campaign, you begin to network with volunteers around the district. This database allows you to reach across county committee lines, find like-minded helpers, and work together to not only elect me, but build a strong progressive volunteer coalition across the district for years to come. Whether you’re helping to: staff a booth at a festival, call for fundraising, knock on doors, or do administrative work, you’re illuminating paths for those who didn’t realize our alternatives to the current gloom. So please sign up and shine on!
---
| [**JOIN Us**!](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/welcome-volunteers/)
---
|
---
|
---
Many thanks to Steph Auer and her team of dedicated neighbors for the Gettysburg Holiday Dinner they put on today at The Barn at Herr Ridge. It was a lovely afternoon of fellowship, good food, and helping hands.
---
Many thanks also to the volunteers of Team Beth Farnham for Congress – Jack Stansbury, Sandy Hartzell, Bretni Lentz, and Brian Ecker who helped guide attendees through the parking lot and into the venue.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/choosedemocracy?__cft__%5B0%5D=AZZ52kCZLe_f4i-ST1nS8lVCNpm55zrLnE8DioSgJfcED-oU7daP_ouJzhOjIIaNtfy7H3L9UFosS-vZeL5930_FEIDVZc4ClsxcNXnZkLCJEXzzTmAc2Z8jm1XVb_aVSJ16Q0IRshy95N-pfmk-3G7WcDgqRYGlUpoxVVWEBomAIJisqx5oGGDUsray5YPzQp_cHP05S1UCk8-M3t6zRoQ1&__tn__=*NK-R) and Community!
---
|
---
While I am a strong proponent of separation of Church and State, I do hope that those who claim to be Christian, like me, remember to:
---
feed the hungry,
---
heal the sick,
---
help the poor,
---
and
---
welcome the stranger.
---
Unfortunately, there are many people who claim to be Christian who haven’t internalized such teachings. In fact, Trump bombed parts of Nigeria on Christmas Day, falsely claiming that Muslims in Nigeria are “targeting and viciously killing, primarily, innocent Christians.”
---
Even though Nigerian officials agreed with the US airstrikes in Sokoto State against insurgents who may, or may not, have ties with the Islamic State, the fact is, Muslims in that area are their primary victims. A Nigerian official stated that the news about the strikes should not “get bogged down on the issue of religion.”
---
Even a Nigerian bishop also confirmed that the area does “not have a problem with persecution” of Christians.
---
But parsing the details of the who, what, when, where, and why of these airstrikes takes time and attention, something that Republican leaders like Trump and his cronies clearly don’t expect their followers to have. These manipulators will take any story, including Trump’s airstrikes, and twist it into a false narrative that foments a strong emotional reaction from their base of white Christian nationalists.
---
MAGA cultist, Lara Loomer, wrote, “I can’t think of a better way to celebrate Christmas than by avenging the death of Christians through the justified mass killing of Islamic terrorists. You’ve got to love it!”
---
Another MAGA dehumanizer, Nick Sortor, wrote, “”The US military has just released video of them launching strikes on ISIS terrorists who’re kiIIing Christians in Nigeria It’ll get much, MUCH worse for these subhuman pieces of crap if they don’t stop the kiIIing.”
---
Sadly, many other conservative Americans will be gleeful at the idea that an American President can simply bomb whom he wishes in another country without the express permission of Congress.
---
But it doesn’t have to be this way.
---
Unlike our own US Representative, multi-millionaire John Joyce, I don’t support false narratives to get a vote. I believe in truth and transparency and will use them to underwrite legislation that not only improves our lives, but holds adminstrations accountable for the propaganda they have sold to our conservative neighbors.
---
Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, on November 3rd of next year so I can support a new administration that will not change the narrative to suit their political agenda, but will competently and lawfully advance our international relationships.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/choosedemocracy?__cft__%5B0%5D=AZY-Ori8V1O9xYWCxn8wZQvZnflbgG8op-kt4OhdzkGmmzit7Ecf18GLPOsyE2mmjNx5zd-WdvgeuusI03iQTZR2AIKzQeHPKzeFZbrY2l47AYuP28wma4MDjYd1Z0S8duQuMCpP75CIGug4D9FoVlOgvc-Dzzonsx9NM8Y2PtkHQagz2q7wYBWo1zvIt0QiQ5yJJnVqSGQuL107ku46VJ3O&__tn__=*NK-R) and Truth!
---
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
---
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
---
Sincerely,
---
Beth
---
| [Like](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2025/12/28/district-round-up-12-28-25/?like_actor=248418217&like_hmac=0cf3469fbdc80fdfd158afe8e8712e87&postid=6030&like=1&source=sub_email)
---
---

name: Troy Downing
subject: I never thought I’d be writing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s weird to be on the other side of one of these messages.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**I just want to say I'm sorry, Peter. You deserve better.**
You've probably already gotten 50 texts today from folks asking for your hard-earned dollar & the last thing you want to deal with is another politician looking for a handout.
I get it because I also get those on my phone and laptop. So being the sender this time feels a little awkward.
**This is Troy Downing. I'm a combat veteran, husband, father & conservative Congressman fighting to advance President Trump's agenda.**
Not in a million years did I ever expect to hold federal office.
But when I saw how things were being run in DC, I felt a responsibility to act.
_Now I'm bringing Montana values to the Beltway._
This midterm cycle isn't just another election. It's the key to who controls the House - continuing the MAGA agenda or succumbing to a radical liberal takeover.
Democrats have a war chest in cash aimed at crushing MAGA Republicans like me.
**__They've already funneled massive amounts into House races to wipe out every conservative standing in their way.__**
They can't stand a candidate with my profile – someone who's served our country & isn't afraid to shake up the status quo.
But no matter how hard they come after me, I won't back down.
**_Here's the bottom line:_ **_a win for someone like me will bring us one step closer to protecting our conservative majority._
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._7BDEom95PcvDcRXxOPUA)[ I hate to ask, but the fate of America's future is in your hands... Can you take a leap of faith with a combat vet & chip in to my campaign today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[DONATE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)If you can't contribute, I understand. Just know that your prayers mean the world to me.
Thank you and God bless,
Troy| |
---
Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of War.
Troy Downing For Congress
P.O. Box 20333
Billings, MT 59104
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress, [click here](https://trk.emails.troydowning._)
---
---

name: GOTV PAC
subject: 🔥 Democrats favored to flip the House!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Did you see this week’s headline in Newsweek? Democrats are now favored to win back the House in 2026.
Recent polling shows a clear shift: Americans are losing patience with Republicans, Trump’s approval is underwater, GOP retirements are piling up, and voters are angry about affordability, health care, and broken promises.
But none of it matters if we don’t turn those numbers into turnout.
In 2026, GOTV PAC is working to make sure this election isn’t just a win – it’s a statement. A rejection of Trumpism, a reset for the House, and a chance to deliver for the people who keep getting left behind.
We’re expanding our target map right now, but what we can take on depends on what we can raise – today.
If you’re ready to help flip the House and put the GOP on defense, this is the moment to act. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email282025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Custom Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email282025]
Let’s go win this – and win big.
Team GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. clean_body: [] Peter , Did you see this week’s headline in Newsweek? Democrats are now favored to win back the House in 2026. Recent polling shows a clear shift: Americans are losing patience with Republicans, Trump’s approval is underwater, GOP retirements are piling up, and voters are angry about affordability, health care, and broken promises. But none of it matters if we don’t turn those numbers into turnout. In 2026, GOTV PAC is working to make sure this election isn’t just a win – it’s a statement. A rejection of Trumpism, a reset for the House, and a chance to deliver for the people who keep getting left behind. We’re expanding our target map right now, but what we can take on depends on what we can raise – today. If you’re ready to help flip the House and put the GOP on defense, this is the moment to act. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] DONATE $500 [] Custom Donation [] Let’s go win this – and win big. Team GOTV PAC [] Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts. Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member. Learn more at: gotv.vote [] PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE GOTV PAC 712 H St NE PMB 96591 Washington, DC 20002 United States Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

name: Eduardo Verastegui, Sound of Freedom producer
subject: Alice was trafficked. Here's how she was saved.
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17118311/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvczhtUWtzTmg2cQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjg/LbmNsWjFOdFB6bQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNxNjFoeE1xY3BHMHJscw/gaVHC0g/s7s19cb1656)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, Imagine this... You’re twelve years old. You’ve been lured online, taken from your home, and locked in a freezing basement miles from anywhere. You’re being sold to strangers on the internet. Used. Broadcast. Passed around from one monster to the next. And every night, you lie awake in the dark asking: _“Will anyone come for me?”_ **For Alice... the answer was yes.** But for thousands of other children still in captivity, the answer hasn’t come yet. They are still waiting. And good people like you and me may be their only chance. **[**Patriot, will you be an Agent of Mercy for trafficked children like Alice by making a tax-deductible gift to the Sound of Freedom Foundation today?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
My name is Eduardo Verástegui, and I founded the Sound of Freedom Foundation to rescue children like Alice. **You may know me as the producer of the film**** _Sound of Freedom._****That film awakened the world to the brutal reality of child trafficking.** The movie itself was never the end goal. It was just the beginning. Since the film’s release, I’ve met with world leaders, supported sting operations, and helped expose cartels running trafficking networks. I’ve seen unspeakable horror... and I’ve seen courageous people bring children home. Now, I’m asking you to help us bring home the next.
---
[ **YES! I will help rescue a child today** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
You may be wondering: _How did Alice make it home?_ A Florida-based cyber-investigator — part of our extended network — spotted a familiar username in a trafficking forum. He followed the trail. It led to a match on a missing child: **Alice.** He contacted the FBI. They traced the location. Raided the site. **Rescued Alice. Alive.** She is safe today and healing. Because **someone stepped up** when no one else could. **This is why we launched**** _Operation Search and Rescue._** It’s our most ambitious initiative to date — connecting undercover investigators, cyber intelligence analysts, and law enforcement to: ️✅ Expose child trafficking networks
✅ Rescue enslaved boys and girls
✅ Put predators behind bars for life We have the tools. We have the expertise. What we _really_ need is... YOU. **Patriot, with your support today, you can directly fund this effort. And thanks to a Matching Grant, your gift will go twice as far!** Right now, a $10,000 Search and Rescue Matching Grant is in place to launch our next wave of operations. _That means your donation of $35 becomes $70... $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... and so on..._ But time is running out. This match is limited. The next operation depends on your support. **[**So please, Patriot, make your life-saving gift today to the Sound of Freedom Foundation and become an Agent of Mercy for children like Alice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
